Original Japanese line: 西暦２０５４年　７月[ST:wait ]
fan translation: July, 2054 A.D.[ST:wait ]
localized version: July, 2054 A.D.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球は謎の異星文明同士の
戦闘に巻き込まれました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Earth became caught in the crossfire of a
battle between mysterious alien civilizations.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The Earth was caught in a great battle
between unknown alien forces.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達の技術水準を遙かに超えた兵器による戦闘[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The battle involved weapons far
surpassing our own technological level.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Their weapons were terrifying and powerful
beyond human reckoning.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その理由も知らされないまま
地球は蹂躙され　大地は焦土と化しました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Without ever knowing why, Earth was ravaged,
and the land was reduced to scorched earth.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Our planet was overwhelmed—its surface reduced
to ash and rubble in the blink of an eye.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
事前に地球圏への戦闘の波及を察知していた
統合政府は　地球種汎移民計画を発動[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Expecting the conflict would eventually reach Earth, the Coalition
Government initiated the Earthlife Colonization Project.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The Coalition government knew the war was coming;[ST:page p1=112 ]in response, they prepared the
Earthlife Colonization Project—Project Exodus.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
世界の主要都市からは数多の
恒星間移民船が飛び立ちました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
From major cities across the globe, numerous
interstellar colony ships launched.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Interstellar arks were launched all across the planet—
from every major city on Earth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
４５億年の間
[System:Ruby rt=わたしたち ]生命[/System:Ruby]を育んでくれた故郷からの脱出[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
An escape from the home that had nurtured
[System:Ruby rt=us ]life[/System:Ruby] for four and a half billion years.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Bravely, we leapt from our cradle—our home
for the last four and a half billion years.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ですが　移民船の多くは重力圏離脱の最中に
撃ち落とされ　無事脱出できた船はごく僅か[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
However, many of the colony ships were shot down while escaping
Earth's gravity well, and only a very few made it out safely.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But...most of the arks never even made it out of
the atmosphere. Only a small handful managed to escape.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達の乗る　白鯨はそのうちの一隻でした[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Our ship, the White Whale, was one of them.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Among them was our ship, the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 地球を後にし　放浪の旅に出て二年[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Two years passed after we left Earth
and began wandering through space.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
After leaving Earth behind,
we spent two years wandering in space, searching...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球圏での戦闘から幸運にも
生き残ることが出来た私達でしたが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We considered ourselves lucky to have
survived the conflict near Earth, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We thought of ourselves as the lucky ones—
the pioneers who would settle a new world.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ついに異星文明の追撃部隊に
見つかってしまったのです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Eventually, the alien civilization's
pursuit forces caught up to us.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But our past caught up with us. Literally.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
軍の決死の応戦と　一人の英雄の活躍によって
追撃部隊は退けられましたが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Thanks to the military's desperate counterattack and the
efforts of one hero, the pursuers were driven back. However...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The alien blitz was unrelenting. If not for the efforts
of a lone hero, we would never have survived.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 激しい戦闘で白鯨の主機関も大破[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The fierce battle severely damaged
the White Whale's main engines.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Our ship took heavy damage—we lost control.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
航行能力を失った白鯨は
未知の惑星の重力に捉まり[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The White Whale, having lost its ability to navigate,
was caught by the gravity of an unknown planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
With our flight systems down, the White Whale
was pulled into the gravitational field of a nearby planet,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 船体を崩壊させながら墜落していきました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Its hull breaking apart, the ship
plummeted toward the planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
its hull shattering and breaking to pieces
as we plummeted toward the surface...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そして　二ヶ月が経ちました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: And so, two months passed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Since then, two months have passed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 肯定
fan translation: Nod.
localized version: Nod

Original Japanese line: 黙考
fan translation: Silent contemplation.
localized version: Shake Your Head

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―外部入力を受けつけました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]―External input detected.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Attention: external access confirmed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: １０秒後にスリープを解除[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Disengaging sleep mode in 10 seconds...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Disengaging stasis in 10 seconds...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ７　６　５　４　３　２　１[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Seven... six... five... four...
three... two... one...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Seven...six...five...four...three...two...one...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―ハッチ開放します[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]―Opening hatch.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Releasing hatch. Please stand clear.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―よかった
まだ生き残りがいたのね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]―Oh, good. So there was another survivor.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey there. Looks like you're all in one piece.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 大丈夫？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Are you okay?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Careful...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あまり無理しない方がいいわ
たった今　目覚めたばかりなんだから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Don't push yourself too hard. You've
only just woken up, after all.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Just take it nice and slow, okay?
Your senses'll need time to reactivate.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この辺りに落ちていたのは
あなたのポッドだけ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yours was the only pod I found around here.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Your pod is the only one around that landed intact.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
見つけられてよかったわ
私はエルマ　あなた名前は？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Glad I found you. My name's
Elma. What's yours?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Good thing I found you.
My name's Elma. You wanna tell me yours?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
自分の名前が分からないの？
記憶障害ということかしら[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You don't know your own
name? Maybe it's amnesia[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You don't even remember your own name?
It must be the stasis hangover...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
困ったわね[ST:wide ]―
本当に何も思い出せない？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's a problem... Can you really
not remember anything at all?[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's not good. Just try and focus, all right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いい名前ね
他のことはどう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Nice name. What else do you remember?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Good, there we go. What else you remember?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そう[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I see[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: It'll come.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたの状況については
少しずつ教えてあげるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll explain your situation little by little.[ST:wait ]
localized version: In the meantime, I'll get you up to speed here as best I can.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どう　動けそう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: How are you feeling? Think you can move?[ST:wait ]
localized version: How are your limbs? Can you move?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
目覚めたばかりなんだから無理はしないでね
ゆっくりでいいから行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Don't push yourself. You just woke up.
We'll take it slow, okay? Let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We'll take it easy while you shake the stasis
out of your system. One step at a time, all right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: とりあえず装備品をいくつか渡しておくわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: For now, I'll give you some equipment.[ST:wait ]
localized version: First things first—you'll be needing a weapon.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まずは　この渓谷を抜けましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: First off, let's get out of this canyon.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There you go. All right, let's get going.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うなずいて微笑む
fan translation: Nod and smile.
localized version: Show your body is working fine.

Original Japanese line: 目を伏せ体調について考える
fan translation: Look down, considering how you feel.
localized version: Show you're still disoriented.

Original Japanese line:
白鯨が大破した時　ポッドの多くは
こうして放り出されてしまった[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
When the White Whale broke apart, many
pods were thrown out just like this one[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Most of the White Whale's lifepods
didn't survive the crash...like this one.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなたは幸運だったと言えるわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You could say you were one of the lucky ones.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You're one of the lucky few...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　白鯨のことも覚えてなかったのね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Oh, right... you don't remember
the White Whale, do you?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right—you don't even remember the White Whale, do you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
白鯨は　地球脱出船Ｌ―００２の通称
地球のことは覚えてる？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The White Whale is the nickname for the Earth
escape ship L-002. Do you remember Earth?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You know, the L-002? The ship we escaped Earth on?
You...remember Earth, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなた[ST:wide ]―　いえ　私達の母星[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Your[ST:wide ]― wait, no, our home planet.[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Planet Earth... Your homeworld.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 母星だったと言うべきかしらね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Or maybe I should say, it
used to be our home planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Or rather, it used to be, anyway.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球はあの日　異星人同士の
大規模な戦闘に巻きこまれて[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Earth got caught in the middle of a
massive battle between two alien groups[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Unfortunately, It was caught in a battle
between two alien forces...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 消滅してしまった[ST:wait ]
fan translation: and was completely destroyed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: and destroyed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何か思い出した？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Does that ring a bell?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ring any bells?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
無理はしないで
少しずつ思い出していけばいい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Don't force it. You'll remember
things little by little.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Don't feel bad. It's one memory I'd like to forget.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも今は　のんびりしている場合
じゃないみたいね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Still, this doesn't look like
the time to take it easy.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I know. It's been following me for a while now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここは楽園ではないわ
襲い来る敵とは戦わなくてはならない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This place isn't paradise. We have to
fight the enemies that come after us.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I didn't want to alarm you,
but we're going to need to defend ourselves.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どう　戦える？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well? Can you fight?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You up to the task?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 興味
fan translation: Show Interest.
localized version: Nod

Original Japanese line: 不安
fan translation: Show Anxiety.
localized version: Scowl

Original Japanese line: なかなか良い動きだったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Your movements were pretty good back there.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm, you're not half-bad...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
武器の扱いも問題なさそうだし
これならすぐ仕事につけそうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Your weapon handling seems fine, too. At this
rate, you should be able to start working soon.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
There's plenty of work back in the city for someone
who knows how to handle a weapon, you know.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
興味を持ってくれて嬉しいわ
きっとあなたに合うものがあると思う[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Glad you're interested. I'm sure there's
something that would be a good fit for you.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then you're interested.
In that case, I might have just the job for you...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
するもしないもあなたの自由
話を聞いてから決めてもいいわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Whether you take the work or not is up to you.
You can decide after you hear more about it.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Hey, I'm not trying to pressure you into anything, all right?
It'll be your decision in the end.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
詳しい話は　安全な所に移動してから
さぁ 進みましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We can discuss the details once we get
somewhere safe. Come on, let's keep moving.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But anyway, we can talk more details later.
For now, let's keep moving.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 仕事について詳しく聞く
fan translation: Ask more about the work.
localized version: Show interest in finding work.

Original Japanese line: 顔を伏せ黙る
fan translation: Lower face and be silent.
localized version: Look depressed at the idea of work.

Original Japanese line:
そろそろ夜明けか
雨もやみそうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Looks like dawn is breaking soon. And
the rain seems to be letting up, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The rain's starting to let up. Just in time for sunrise.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いらっしゃい
面白いものが見られるわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come on. You're about to
see something interesting.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Follow me. I promise, you're gonna love this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 驚いたようね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You seem surprised.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Pretty wild, huh?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 彼らがこの惑星の先住民よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Those are this planet's native inhabitants.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They're all indigenous, as far as we can tell.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 新参者の私達としては仲良くしていかないとね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As newcomers here, we need to make
sure we get along with them.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We need to learn to play nice with these guys
if we're going to try and coexist together.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここは惑星ミラ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This place is Planet Mira.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We call this planet "Mira."[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 航宙図にすら載っていない未知の星[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
An unknown world, not even
listed on any star charts.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You won't find it on any starchart.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達の新たな故郷よ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's our new home[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: But it's our new home.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あれが私達が住んでいる居住ユニット
あそこに向かうのよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
See that residential unit? That's where
we live. That's where we're headed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Recognize the Habitat unit? That's where we're headed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 待って　この先は崖よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hold on, there's a cliff up ahead.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Watch yourself—that first step's a doozy.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
飛び降りるなとは言わないけど
おすすめはしない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I'm not going to tell you not to
jump, but I wouldn't recommend it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We can jump if you like—you could handle the fall.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
崖下の原生生物は手強い
それに落ちてあなたが無事という保証もない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The indigenous creatures down there are tough. Plus,
there's no guarantee you'd survive the fall unharmed.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But the indigens down there are another story.
Some big, some mean—all nasty.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この道から海岸線の上の道を渡って行けば
比較的安全にたどり着ける[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If we take this path along the walkway above the coastline,
we should be able to get there relatively safely.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Given our options, the high road here
would be the safer way to go, relatively speaking.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
とは言っても[ST:wide ]―
どちらの道で行くか選ぶのは　あなたよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That said[ST:wide ]― The path we take is up to you.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That said...whichever way you want to go,
I'll follow your lead. You decide.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 遠くで見るよりもずっと大きいでしょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Looks a lot bigger up close, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Looks a lot bigger up close, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
居住ユニットと言っても
恒星間都市移民船の一部よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We call it a residential unit, but it's
actually part of the interstellar colony ship.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And this was just the Habitat unit.
The White Whale was one hell of a ship.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 地上に移せば　これだけの巨大施設になる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once it's moved to the ground, it
becomes a huge facility like this.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Until it all came crashing down, at least.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あれが　ウエストゲート[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's the west gate.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's the west gate.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今は安全のために封鎖されているから[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's sealed off for safety reasons right now.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's closed off now for security reasons...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
左脇の仮設エレベーターに乗って
居住ユニットの中に[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We can take the temporary elevator over on
the left to get inside the residential unit[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But we've repurposed a freight elevator
that will get us in...side...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ルプス　こんな街の近くまで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A Lupus? This close to the city...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Grexes? And they're riled.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
居住ユニットには非戦闘員もいる
中に入られる前にここで斃してしまいたい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There are non-combatants inside the residential unit.
We need to stop it here before it gets inside.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We can't leave them roaming here—not this close to the gate.
We're gonna have to take them down.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 力を貸して！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lend me your strength![ST:wait ]
localized version: You ready?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
本当なら　安全な地域を選んで
着陸したかったのだけれど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ideally, we would have chosen
a safer area to land, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's a shame we had to settle near so much wildlife...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
宇宙には友好的な種族もいれば
そうでない生物もいる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Out in space, you find friendly races,
but you also find creatures that aren't.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Luckily, some species aren't so hostile.
But they aren't necessarily friendly, either.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
無闇に好戦的になる必要はないけれど
自分を護れるのは自分だけ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There's no need to be recklessly aggressive, but in the
end, you're the only one who can protect yourself.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I've come to learn that there's a fine line
between self-defense...and provoking a fight.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それだけは覚えておいて[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Just keep that in mind.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We need to walk that line.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さぁ　行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right, let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, let's head in.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたなら　ここで暮らす人達とも
すぐ馴染めるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I'm sure you'll fit right in
with the people living here.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Who knows—maybe seeing the inside will jog your memory.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どう　なかなかのものでしょう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well? Pretty impressive, huh?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well? Here we are. Not too shabby, huh?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これが白鯨の居住ユニット[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is the White Whale's residential unit.[ST:wait ]
localized version: For a giant beached spaceship, anyway.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いいえ　今ではここが私達の街[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No, now this place is our city.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But...like it or not, this place is our home now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
モデルになった都市からとって
こう呼んでいるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We named it after the city it was modeled on.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We took the name from the city
it was modeled after back on Earth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ニューロサンゼルスと[ST:wait ]
fan translation: New Los Angeles.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We call it New Los Angeles.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ようこそ　ＮＬＡへ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Welcome to NLA.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Welcome to NLA.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こうして
地球人類最後の一人を仲間に迎えた私たちは[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こうして
地球人類最後の一人を仲間に迎えた私たちは[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And so it was that another survivor
came to join our band of refugees.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こうして
地球人類最後の一人を仲間に迎えた私たちは[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And so, after welcoming one of humanity's
last survivors into our midst...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And so it was that another survivor
came to join our band of refugees.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この未開の惑星ミラで
生きていく決意を固めました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
On this untamed planet, Mira, we
strengthened our resolve to survive.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Together, we resolved to forge a new way of life
here on Mira, come what may.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
光に包まれ　消えていった故郷の星
地球[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Earth, our home planet... engulfed
in light and lost forever[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: New LA was our beautiful lie to ourselves...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 戻ることも叶わない　永久への旅[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A journey into eternity, with no way back.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Truth is, we were adrift, heading into the unknown.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 晴れ渡ったニューロサンゼルスの空とは裏腹に[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In contrast to the clear
skies over New Los Angeles,[ST:wait ]
localized version: Our native home was gone, swallowed in a shroud of light...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私たちの未来は
未だ深い霧に包まれたままでした[ST:wait ]
fan translation: our future remained shrouded in a deep fog.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And our future was uncertain—
we had no idea what fate lay in store for us...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それでも私たちは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: And yet, we still[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Only that we had to keep living in order to see it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 興味
fan translation: Interested.
localized version: Show Interest

Original Japanese line: 疑問
fan translation: Question.
localized version: Look Puzzled

Original Japanese line:
異存がなければ今日からここが
あなたの第二の故郷となる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Unless you object, starting today
this place will be your second home.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
How about a quick tour of the facilities
to refresh your memory?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まずは住む所ね
ついてらっしゃい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
First, we need to find you a
place to live. Follow me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's start with your living quarters. Follow me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
勇敢なるＮＬＡ市民の皆さん
モーリス・ショーソン行政長官です[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Brave citizens of NLA! Good day. This

localized version:
Brave citizens of New Los Angeles: Good day.
This is your director general, Maurice Chausson.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今日も　私は皆さんに
誇らしいお知らせを伝えたいと思います[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Today, once again, I have some proud
news that I wish to share with you all.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Today, I once again come to you with news
I am truly delighted to share:[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 昨日　新たに１０人のクルーが保護されました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yesterday, another 10 crew
members were recovered.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yesterday, we repatriated
10 more White Whale crew members.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
様々な専門知識や技能を持つ彼らを
このＮＬＡ市民として迎えることによって[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Welcoming these individuals, with their various
expertise and skills, as citizens of NLA...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
These fellow pioneers will rejoin our ranks as citizens
of NLA, bringing with them skills and know-how[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さらに都市基盤が強化され
発展していくと確信しています[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
will further strengthen our city's foundation
and allow us to develop even more.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
that will bolster our ability to survive—
and indeed flourish—here in our new home.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これはひとえに[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

localized version: This, of course,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 惑星表面探査の重要性を訴えた私の提案に[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

my proposal, which stressed the importance

localized version: is only the latest success in our continuing efforts—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いつ行政長官になったのかしら[ST:wait ]

localized version: "Director general"? Since when?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 一昨日からですよ[ST:wait ]

localized version: Two days ago, ma'am.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

首相みたいなツラしてたまんないっすよねぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
He was just an aide until then, and now he has the look of

localized version:
From "political aide" to "director general"
in just a few weeks...[ST:page p1=90 ]At this rate, he'll be "emperor" by next month.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナ　グイン[ST:wait ]

localized version: Irina. Gwin.[ST:wait ]

localized version: Nice work out there, ma'am.[ST:wait ]

流星の谷で見つかった

THE survivor.

こんな惑星に来てまで

I keep telling them there's no need to cling

localized version: Just check the duct work, would ya?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もう　誰こんなことしたのー[ST:wait ]

Did you mess something

Everything okay?

I'm Lin Lee Koo—mechanic and

Original Japanese line: 驚いたようね[ST:wait ]

And I know. She looks young, and she is young,

オイルとか顔についてます？[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 興味を持つのは分かるわ[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でもね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But you know,[ST:wait ]

despite appearances, she's one of our

young as she may look—and yes, she is young—
she's actually one of our top talents.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まあ　たまにゃ失敗もあるけどな[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何を言ってるんだ　エルマ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What are you talking about, Elma?[ST:wait ]
localized version: No one can know that, Elma.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
君がいたからこそ地球種汎移民計画を
実行に遷すことができたんじゃないか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Isn't it precisely because you were there that we
could carry out the Earthlife Colonization Project?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What we DO know is, without you, there'd have been
no Project Exodus, and no escape, for any of us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
不測の事態が起こったとはいえ
こうしてここで　我々は生きていられるんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even though unexpected things
happened, we're still here, alive.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Did it go perfectly? No.
But we are here, and we are alive. We survived.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 話が逸れたな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We got sidetracked.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So yes, Project Exodus.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
たとえ母星を失ったとしても
種を存続させなくてはならない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if we lost our home planet,
the species had to survive.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Once we learned the Earth might be threatened,
we needed a plan to preserve all her various lifeforms.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そう考えた人達が実行したのが
地球種汎移民計画だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The people who thought that way launched
the Earthlife Colonization Project.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That plan was the Earthlife Colonization Project.
Otherwise known as Project Exodus.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
白鯨で地球を脱出した私達の旅は
二年程続いた[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Our journey after escaping Earth on the
White Whale lasted about two years.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Those of us who escaped on the White Whale
spent over two years wandering in space.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 過酷な日々だったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Those were hard days.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Two hard years.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それでも　居住可能な星を見つけ
そこに移り住む[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Nevertheless, our goal was to find a
habitable planet and settle there.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But we clung to our mission:
find a habitable planet, and settle there.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達の意志は固かった[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Our resolve was strong.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We had no idea how long it would take...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: しかし　旅は突然　終わりを告げた[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But the journey came to a sudden end[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Or...that the decision would eventually be made for us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
異星文明どもは
よっぽど俺達を根絶やしにしたかったらしい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Those alien civilizations must have
really wanted to wipe us out.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The xenoforms found us again, and...
well, it wasn't a happy reunion.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: しつこく追撃部隊を差し向けてきたのさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They kept sending pursuit forces after us.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Earth wasn't enough.
They wanted humanity destroyed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だが幸か不幸か　敵の攻撃で航行不能になった
白鯨の目の前にこの惑星ミラがあった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But for better or worse, when the enemy attack left the White
Whale unable to navigate, Mira was right in front of us.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
For better and for worse, we were close to
planet Mira when we lost control of the White Whale.[ST:page p1=180 ]Inertia and gravity took it from there.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
損傷した船体は
大気圏突入に耐えられなかった　[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The damaged hull could not
withstand atmospheric entry.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The ship had taken way too much damage
to survive entering the atmosphere intact.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達は残された動力を使って
居住ユニットを軟着陸させたのよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We used the power we had left to
soft-land the Residential Unit.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We had no choice: we channeled all the power
we had left to soft-land the Habitat.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうして地上に辿り着いた私達は
生き残った人々を集め[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And so, after we reached the
ground, we gathered the survivors.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Once the dust cleared, we set to work
transforming it into its current state...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
居住ユニットを中心に
この星に人類最初の街を築き[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Centered around the Residential Unit, we
built humanity's first city on this planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Searching for survivors, establishing BLADE,
installing the provisional government...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 暫定自治政府を作ったというわけ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And that's how the Provisional
Government was formed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Basically making it a sustainable city.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ブレイドとは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: As for BLADE[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: BLADE is an acronym.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[System:Ruby rt=神の ]Beyond[/System:Ruby] [System:Ruby rt=言葉を ]the[/System:Ruby] [System:Ruby rt=越えた ]Logos[/System:Ruby] [System:Ruby rt=人工的な ]Artificial[/System:Ruby]
[System:Ruby rt=運命の ]Destiny[/System:Ruby] [System:Ruby rt=解放者 ]Emancipator[/System:Ruby][ST:wait ]
fan translation:
"Beyond the Logos Artificial
Destiny Emancipator."[ST:wait ]
localized version:
"Builders of a Legacy After the Destruction of Earth."
Quite fitting, I think.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 頭の文字を取って　[System:Ruby rt=ブレイド ]ＢＬＡＤＥ[/System:Ruby][ST:wait ]
fan translation: Take the first letters, and you get BLADE.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's a relatively new organization.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
不時着以前の航行時にはなかった組織だ
というよりその必要がなかっただけだがな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's an organization that didn't exist during the journey, before
the crash. Or rather, there just wasn't any need for it then.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Up there in space, we had plenty of provisions,[ST:page p1=90 ]and a crew trained to handle the limited amount
of situations we might encounter in our travels...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
とにもかくにも　未知の敵に襲われ
このミラに不時着して状況は一変した[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In any case, being attacked by unknown enemies and
crash-landing here on Mira changed everything.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But, of course, all that changed after we lost
most of our ship and came crashing down here on Mira.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
水や食料の確保
ミラの探索やＮＬＡの治安維持[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Securing food and water, exploring Mira,
maintaining public order in NLA...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We needed food. Water.
Search and rescue teams. Surveyors. Police...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その他　多岐にわたる活動を
暫定自治政府だけではとても賄いきれなかった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And many other activities... The Provisional
Government couldn't possibly handle it all alone,[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The list goes on and on. It was too much for the provisional
government to manage on its own. So BLADE was born.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そこで　それら活動を引き受ける形で
組織されたのがブレイドだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
so, BLADE was organized to
take on those activities.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The idea was to have one central organization
with different disciplines to fill these various roles.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
母体が不時着以前の統合軍だから
大半が元軍人だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Since its core came from the Coalition Military
before the crash, most members are former soldiers.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Its core was pulled from the Coalition military,
so it's mostly former soldiers.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そして　ここからが重要なんだが[ST:wait ]
fan translation: And here's the important part.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But...fighting isn't our most important duty.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ブレイドにはこの活動とは
別に重要な役割がある[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
BLADE has another important role
apart from those activities.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Right now, we have a single, top priority
that supersedes all others:[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それが　ライフポイントの探索だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's the search for the Life Point.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The search for—and recovery of—the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これを見て[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Take a look at this.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Take a look at this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
元々白鯨にはもっとたくさんの人が
眠ったままの状態で運ばれていたの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Originally, the White Whale carried many
more people who were still asleep.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The White Whale was designed to carry an exceedingly
large number of passengers, all of them held in stasis...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その施設のことを　ライフと呼んでいた[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That facility was called the Life.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All housed in a structure called the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これはその全体構成図[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is the overall schematic for it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This is a complete schematic of that facility.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球脱出以降　船内で目覚めていたのは
操船クルーと戦闘要員を除けば[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
After escaping Earth, the only ones awake on board,
other than the flight crew and combat personnel,[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Only essential personnel were conscious and active for the
journey from Earth. The flight crew, maintenance engineers...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ほとんどがこのライフを管理運営する
スタッフだったというわけ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Most of them were staff assigned
to manage and operate the Life.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And of course, some military,
so we could defend ourselves if necessary.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　ミラに墜落した時
ライフも船体から分離[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But when we crashed on Mira, the Life
separated from the ship's hull, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But the vast majority were in the Lifehold—
ARE in the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
複数のブロックに分かれ
地表各地に散らばってしまった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It broke into several blocks and
scattered all over the planet's surface.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
With any luck, they're all still there, in stasis,
waiting to be rescued.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だから　ライフのある場所[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's why the place where the Life is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: But, there's a problem...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
つまり　ライフポイントを見つけ
眠っている人を助け出さないといけないの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In other words, we have to find the Life
Point and rescue the sleeping people.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We know now the Lifehold broke apart along with
the rest of the ship when we came down on Mira.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このライフポイントの探索こそが
ブレイドの最大の目的よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Searching for the Life Point
is BLADE's primary objective.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What we don't know is exactly where all the pieces landed.
Not very comforting, I know.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなたと出会った時の私も　探索任務中だった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
When I found you, I was in the
middle of a search mission myself.[ST:wait ]
localized version: BLADE's top priority now is locating the missing units.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このＮＬＡで暮らす全住民は
その氏名　年齢　職業は言うに及ばず[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
All residents living here in NLA must register
their name, age, occupation, naturally,[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Ah, yes—all citizens of NLA are required
to register their name, age, and occupation.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
所有する資産や健康状態も
登録が義務づけられている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
but also their assets and health
condition. Registration is mandatory.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We also ask you report any personal assets, and take
a short survey regarding your current state of health.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: このミラに辿り着いた地球人は我々だけだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We're the only Earthlings
who made it to Mira.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All purely as a precaution—I'm sure you understand.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
人類存続のための措置と
理解してもらえればありがたい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I hope you understand it's a necessary
measure for humanity's survival.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
As the caretakers of humanity's survival,
we all have certain responsibilities.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
登録すれば　色んな公共のサービスが
受けられるようになりますよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If you register, you'll be able to
receive various public services, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And hey—it's not all bad.
Registering gets you access to all kinds of public services.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
長々と話してしまったな
君も頭の整理が必要だろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I've talked for quite a while. You probably
need time to organize your thoughts too.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
In any case, I'm sure this is all a lot to digest.
You'll be wanting some time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン君[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-kun.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ms. Koo—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
気分転換がてらブレイドエリアでも
案内してやってくれないか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
For a change of pace, why don't you show
our guest around the BLADE Area a bit?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Even I'M tired of hearing myself speak.
Why don't you take our guest out for some air?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 俺も少し　話し疲れた[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm a little tired from talking myself.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Perhaps a tour of the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Okay!
localized version: Yes, sir![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ではさっそく行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's head out right away![ST:wait ]
localized version: C'mon. We'll keep this briefing brief.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この星について詳しく聞く
fan translation: Ask for details about this planet.
localized version: Ask how we ended up on Mira.

Original Japanese line: ブレイドとは何か尋ねる
fan translation: Ask what BLADE is.
localized version: Ask for more information about BLADE.

Original Japanese line: 登録手続きを急がせる
fan translation: Hurry the registration procedures
localized version: Ask about registration.

Original Japanese line: 疑問
fan translation: Question
localized version: Clarify

Original Japanese line: 浪漫
fan translation: Enthusiasm
localized version: Geek Out

Original Japanese line:
まだブレイド所属じゃないあなたに
ブレイドエリアを案内しろだなんて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Telling me to show you around the BLADE
Area when you aren't even in BLADE yet...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You know, it's not every day we're authorized
to let a civilian tour the administrative district.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ナギおじさま
ブレイド隊員にする気まんまんですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Uncle Nagi is totally planning to make
the newcomer a BLADE member, isn't he?

Uncle Nagi is totally planning to
make her a BLADE member, isn't he?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, Nagi must really, REALLY want her to join BLADE.[ST:wait ]

fan translation:
Uncle Nagi is totally planning to
make him a BLADE member, isn't he?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, Nagi must really, REALLY want him to join BLADE.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ブレイドエリアは　他のエリアと違って[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The BLADE Area is different
from the other areas[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: The AD is a bit different from the other districts.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ブレイド所属の隊員達に
必要な施設を集めたエリアなのよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's where all the facilities
BLADE members need are gathered.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's got everything a BLADE would need,
all in one place, without any extra fluff.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: やっぱりドールってかっこいいですね～[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Dolls are just so cool, aren't they~[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Get...a load...of that Skell...
Even the way that they WALK is sooo coooool...[ST:page p1=180 ]Oh yeah, work it baby...
Mmm-mmm-mmm.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今通り過ぎていったロボットのことですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's that robot that just went by![ST:wait ]
localized version: What?! You don't remember what a Skell is?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達は　ドールって呼んでいます[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We call them Dolls.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That gorgeous exoskeleton that just went by?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
人型からビークルへの完全変形が
できちゃう優れもの！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They're amazing machines that can fully
transform from humanoid to vehicle form![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Basically like the most incredible,
awesomest superweapons EVER?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ビーム兵器で攻撃したり
バリア張って防いだり[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They attack with beam weapons,
defend with barriers[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lasers! Force fields! Bipedal AND vehicular transformations![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すべてのロマンを叶えてくれる超兵器です！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They're superweapons that
make every dream come true![ST:wait ]
localized version: Sorry, just...I get so excited whenever I think about it![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: わかってもらえますか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You get it, right?![ST:wait ]
You get it, right?![ST:wait ]
localized version: Now THIS girl gets it![ST:wait ]

fan translation: You get it, right?![ST:wait ]
localized version: Now THIS guy gets it![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうなんですよ！
ドールはロマンの塊なんですよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Exactly! Dolls are just pure awesome![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Aren't they just the cooolest?!
Just...everything about them![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ビームとか変形とか
もう聞いただけで興奮しちゃいますよね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Beams, transformations... Just hearing
those words gets you excited, right?![ST:wait ]
localized version:
The lasers, the force fields, the bipedal
AND vehicular transformations?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
コクピットで必殺技名とか
叫びたいですよねっ？　ねっ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You want to shout special attack
names in the cockpit, right? Right??[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You ever have that dream where you're inside one,
and it's just transforming over and over? And over?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ですよね～！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Totally~![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeaaah, you know what I'm talkin' about.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あっ　ちなみに私[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah, by the way, I[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Actually, I uh...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いつドールに乗ってもいいように
もう必殺技名　考えてあるんですよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I've already come up with special move names, so
I'm ready whenever I finally get to pilot a Doll![ST:wait ]
localized version:
I don't normally show this to people,
but I've been working on some Skell fan fiction...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]に入っているので
ちょっと待って下さいね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They're saved on my [System:Ruby rt=Device ]terminal[/System:Ruby],
so just wait a sec![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hold on, I'll just pull it up here, one sec...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すっ　すみません　つい[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: S-Sorry! I got carried away[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh... Uh, right. ...Sorry.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
元々は　地球に脅威となりうる異星人との
戦闘を想定して作られた兵器よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Originally, they were weapons created for
battles with aliens who could threaten Earth.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Originally, Skells were developed as a defensive measure—
to counter potential alien threats.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あまりにも強大な異星文明の前に
地球を救うことは叶わなかったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Faced with such a powerful alien civilization,
saving Earth just wasn't possible.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It wasn't enough to save Earth, though—
we were outnumbered and outgunned.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それでも　ミラに不時着後[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Still, after crash-landing on Mira[ST:wait ]
localized version: Still...just look around you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
二ヶ月あまりでＮＬＡをここまで
復興させることができたのは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
the reason we could rebuild NLA this
much in little over two months is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
New LA has gone from basically nothing
to this in just two short months.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
人類の生き残りたいという想いと
ドールの力があったからよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
thanks to humanity's will to survive
and the power of the Dolls.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We could never have come so far so fast
without Skell technology.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
乗ってみたいって顔をしているけど
今はまだ乗れないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You look like you want to pilot
one, but you can't just yet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'd love to get you into one to see for yourself,
but it's not that simple.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ドールに乗るには　ブレイド隊員であることは
もちろんなんですけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
To pilot a Doll, you obviously
have to be a BLADE member, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well yeah, duh.
For one thing, only BLADEs are allowed to pilot Skells,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ドールライセンスがないとだめなんですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: you also need a Doll License.[ST:wait ]
localized version: and even then, you need a license.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さっきも言ったようにドールは
兵器として開発されたものなの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Like I said before, Dolls
were developed as weapons.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
These aren't toys we're talking about—
they're complex machines with powerful weapons.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 万が一　使い方を誤れば大事故になる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If they're used incorrectly, it
could lead to a major accident.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And they're a precious resource—
we only have so many of them to go around.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だから　テストに合格した者のみが
ドールに乗れるようにしたのよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's why only those who pass the
test are allowed to pilot Dolls.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So yes, as you might imagine,
the certification process is a fairly rigorous one.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
