Original Japanese line:
聞いたかね　こんな子でも自分の技術を
活かして働いてるんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Did you hear that? Even a kid like this
is working hard using her own skills.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yes, those lifepods.
Like the one Elma—a BLADE—rescued our friend here from.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 偉いだろう　健気だろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Impressive, isn't it? Admirable, isn't it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Emphasis on the word "rescued."[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それを聞いたら　君もブラブラして
おれなくなるだろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
After hearing that, you can't just sit
around doing nothing either, can you?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Because, if you aren't released,
you just sit there frozen in stasis. Forever.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ナギおじさま　それ言っちゃったら
自発的意志じゃなくなるんじゃないですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Uncle Nagi, if you say that, it isn't
really their own free will anymore, is it?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So did you have an engineering question about lifepods?
...Or is this all part of the guilt trip?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そういえば　そうかもしれんな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Come to think of it, maybe you're right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm sure I have no idea what you're talking about.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: で　どうする？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: So? What'll you do?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now what'll it be, friend?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
リン君は　１３歳で自分の技術を活かして
働いているのか　偉いな　健気だな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lin-kun is working hard at 13 using her
own skills... Impressive. Admirable.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Now, you wouldn't want to refuse the people
who saved your life, would you? Friend?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: １３歳か　偉いな　健気だな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: 13 years old? Impressive. Admirable.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You said no, you wouldn't refuse—that's a yes, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ナギの目を見て強くうなずく
fan translation: Look Nagi in the eyes and nod firmly.
localized version: Look into Nagi's eyes and nod firmly.

Original Japanese line: では早速　研修の説明をしよう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Okay then, let's explain
the training right away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now then, let's discuss that training assignment.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
内容は　指定されたポイントでの
データプローブの設置だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The task is to install a Data
Probe at the designated point.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We've decided to start you out on a probe installation,
just to get your feet wet.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まだ説明していなかったけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I haven't explained this yet, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: I guess we should back up a bit—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ＮＬＡでは　フロンティアネットという
システムを使って[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Here in NLA, we use a
system called FrontierNet[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
here in New LA, we're using a
specialized computer system called FrontierNav[ST:page p1=120 ]to help us deploy a sensor grid across Mira—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このミラの情報をＮＬＡに集めているの
その情報を収集しているのがデータプローブよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
to collect information on Mira and send it back to NLA.
The Data Probes are what gather that information.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
a network of data probes that allows us to monitor conditions
and collect all kinds of information about the planet.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうだ　それを設置してもらうのも
ブレイドの大事な仕事だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Right. Installing them is also
an important job for BLADE.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Expanding that grid and filling in the blind spots
is one of BLADE's highest priorities.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これを見てくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Look at this.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Here, take a look at this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今　表示されているのが
このＮＬＡと周辺の地形だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What's displayed now is NLA
and the surrounding terrain.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What you're seeing on-screen is a terrain map
that includes New LA and the surrounding landmass.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
見て分かると思うが
地形が複数のブロックに分かれていると思う[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As you can probably see, the terrain
is divided into multiple blocks.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
As you can see, we've divided the area
into a series of hexagonal blocks.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
我々はこのブロックを
セグメントと呼んでいる[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We call these blocks Segments.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We call these blocks "segments,"
and together, they form our grid.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このミラ全土にフロンティアネットを
拡充するために[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In order to expand FrontierNet
across all of Mira[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We determined this was the most efficient pattern,
given the limited range of our probes.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
最も効率のいいデータプローブの
設置位置を割り出しているわけだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
we determine the most efficient
locations for installing Data Probes.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Based on it, we know exactly where we need
the probes to go—now we just have to install them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: セグメントの設定には　他にも目的がある[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Segments also serve other purposes.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The sooner the better, as far as I'm concerned.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
例えば　ブレイドの隊員や住民に
何かあって救援に向かう時に[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
For example, if something happens to BLADE
members or residents and we need to send help,[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The FrontierNav probes can also detect
the general locations of living things in the vicinity,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 効率よく目的地を把握することができるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
it lets us pinpoint the
destination efficiently.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
which comes in handy if we need to
track down a BLADE or another citizen.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 本題の研修に戻ろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's get back to the training.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, quite handy indeed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地図上に白く光っている
セグメントがあるだろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You should see a Segment
shining white on the map.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So, for this first exercise you'll be heading here—
to that white segment.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここにデータプローブを
設置してくるというのが研修内容だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Installing a Data Probe there
is your training task.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Go there, install the data probe,
and then come back home.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＮＬＡの東ね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: East of NLA.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Got it. East of the city.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この光点がいま私達のいる
ブレイドホームですから[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This point of light is the
BLADE Home, where we are now[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
In that case, we can take the east gate
out of the administrative district, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここからすぐ近くですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's really close by.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We should be there in no time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それとデータプローブの設置方法は
現地でエルマに教わってくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As for how to install a Data Probe,
learn that from Elma on site.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'll leave the details on the data probe
installation procedure to you, Elma.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　分かったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right, understood.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Of course, Mr. Secretary.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: じゃぁ　行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Okay then, let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, you two—shall we?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 研修ですけど初任務ですからがんばりましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's training, but it's also your
first mission, so let's do our best![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yeah! Training or not,
let's go install the HELL outta that probe![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 推理
fan translation: Deduce
localized version: Speculate

Original Japanese line:
ここからだと目的地まではさっきの
工業エリアのウエストゲートからより[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
From here, compared to taking the Industrial
Area's West Gate we used earlier[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Man, am I glad we pulled an assignment
to the east of the city this time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ブレイドエリアのイーストゲートからの方が
近いですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: it's closer from the BLADE Area's East Gate.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It'd be a long walk all the way back over to the west gate.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hold on...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
周辺に高ランクの原生生物が出現して
全ゲートが封鎖されていたはずじゃなかった？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Weren't all the gates sealed because
high-rank native creatures appeared nearby?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Are we even sure the east gate will be open? Last I heard,
it was still on lockdown from all the high-level indigen activity.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうだったんですけど少し前に警戒レベルが
下がって封鎖解除になりました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They were, but the alert level dropped a
little while ago and the lockdown was lifted.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It was, but they just lowered the threat level earlier today.
The gates are officially open for business.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どこかのチームが
原生生物を斃してくれたんですよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Some team must have defeated
the native creatures for us![ST:wait ]
localized version:
One of our teams must have gone out there
and kicked some furry indigen butt, huh?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ　そうだったんですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh? Was it really you?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Seriously? That was you? Cool![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それは違うわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's not what happened.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I don't think so.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達が戦ったルプスは低ランク
全ゲートを封鎖するほどの脅威対象ではないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The Lupus we fought were low-rank. They
weren't enough of a threat to seal all gates.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Those grexes we took down were fairly routine—
definitely not something they'd lock both gates over, at least.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 確かにそうですけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, that's true, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Then I take my "cool" back.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それより　ルプスを斃したんですか？
二人で？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
More importantly, you took down
Lupus? Just the two of you?[ST:wait ]
localized version: But wait a sec—you guys fought grexes? The two of you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すごいじゃないですか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's amazing![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey, that's still pretty cool.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ルプスは　群れで行動するから
どこのチームも苦戦しているんですよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lupus move in packs, so all the teams
have been struggling with them![ST:wait ]
localized version:
They've been hassling a lot of teams lately,
especially how they hunt in packs and all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 調子にのらない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Don't get carried away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's not get too excited.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
リンも　おだて過ぎないで
怪我でもされたら困るわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And Lin, don't overdo the praise.
It'd be bad if the newbie got hurt.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Confidence can be good.
Overconfidence can be fatal, especially when you're new.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すみません[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Sorry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, you're right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
確かにイリーナのチームの実力なら
ありうるわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
With Iriina's team's skill,
it's certainly possible.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Wouldn't surprise me at all. Irina's team is one of our best.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナさんとグインさんに会ったんですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]
Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]
localized version: How does she know Irina and Gwin?[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Did you meet Iriina-san and Gwin-san?[ST:wait ]
localized version: How does he know Irina and Gwin?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ええ　リンに会う少し前にね
任務に向かう途中だったらしいわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yes, a little before we met you, Lin. It
seems they were on their way to a mission.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We ran into them just before we met up with you.
They were on their way out to an assignment.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 任務に向かう途中だったなら絶対そうですよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If they were heading out on a mission,
then it was definitely them![ST:wait ]
localized version: Well then that settles it! It must have been them, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　見たかったな～
イリーナさん達の活躍[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ahh, I wish I could've seen
Iriina-san and the others in action.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Maaaaaan, forget this amateur-hour probe baloney—
those guys are where the action's at.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: きっとすぐに見られるわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm sure you'll get to see them soon.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'll try not to take that personally.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さぁ　無駄話はこれぐらいにして
任務に戻りましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Right, that's enough idle chat.
Let's get back to the mission.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But enough talk—we've got our mission to deal with.
Let's head out.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Roger.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
じゃぁ　イーストゲートから
目的地に向かいましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Okay then, let's head to the
destination from the East Gate![ST:wait ]
localized version:
That probe isn't gonna install itself.
Let's get to the east gate, shall we?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 自分が斃したと胸を張る
fan translation: Puff out your chest and say you defeated it
localized version: Suggest it was you and Elma.

Original Japanese line: イリーナとグインを思い出し尋ねる
fan translation: Recall Iriina and Gwin, and ask
localized version: Suggest it was Irina and Gwin.

Original Japanese line: 強気
fan translation: Confident
localized version: Attack

Original Japanese line: 疑問
fan translation: Question
localized version: Inquire

Original Japanese line: 信頼
fan translation: Trust
localized version: Unite

Original Japanese line: 信念
fan translation: Conviction
localized version: Protect

Original Japanese line: これって[ST:wide ]―　どういう[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What is[ST:wide ]― How did[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: What...the...hell...happened...here...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あのヴァサルト一体でこれだけの
シミウスを斃したんでしょうか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Could that single Vasalt really have
defeated all these Simius by itself?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You don't think...that one cinicula
could have killed all these simius?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No way...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Unless...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ[ST:wide ]―　さん？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma[ST:wide ]―san?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Unless...what?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 最悪ね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is bad.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This is bad.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なにが最悪なんですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What's bad? I don't get it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: What's bad? I don't follow you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あのヴァサルト[ST:wide ]―　オーバードよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That Vasalt[ST:wide ]― it's an Overd.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That cinicula. It's a tyrant.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh?![ST:wait ]
localized version: Huh?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私には　普通のヴァサルトに見えますけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It just looks like a normal
Vasalt to me, though[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: But...it...looks just like any other cinicula?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
一体のシミウスが　ヴァサルトを三、四体
斃したのなら普通にありうることだわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If one Simius took down three or four
Vasalt, that would be perfectly normal.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Think about it: your typical simius is way higher up
on the food chain than your typical cinicula, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でもね　今　目の前にある光景はその逆
他のヴァサルトがいた形跡もない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But what we're seeing now is the opposite. And
there's no sign any other Vasalt were here.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Usually, we'd find one simius standing over three or four
cinicula corpses. But here, the tables have been turned.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうなれば　この状況を説明できる答えは[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If that's the case, the only
explanation for this situation is[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And I don't see a single trace
of any other indigens in the area.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あのヴァサルトはオーバード
という以外はない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
there's only one possibility:
that Vasalt is an Overd.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There's only one explanation: that cinicula is a tyrant.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ブレイドレポートデータベースで
調べてみます！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll check the BLADE Report Database![ST:wait ]
localized version: Let me check the BLADE report database.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あのヴァサルトがオーバードなら
きっと何か載っているはずです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If that Vasalt is an Overd, there's
bound to be something listed.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If there's a tyrant this close to the city,
SOMEONE must have run across it...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あります！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Found it![ST:wait ]
localized version: Bingo.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ですけど　ここからかなり外れたエリアでの
活動が報告されています[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But its activity has been reported
in an area pretty far from here.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
There was a cinicula tyrant sighted not too long ago—
but it was a couple of segments further out.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
逃げるブレイド隊員を追ってここまで来たか
もっと別の理由があるのか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Did it chase fleeing BLADE members
here, or is there some other reason?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It could've followed the BLADE that spotted it back towards
New LA, or come here to feed, or who knows what. [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こんな近くにオーバードがいるのに
ブレイド本部　何も動きがないですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
With an Overd this close, BLADE
HQ isn't making any moves.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That's crazy. I can't believe there's a tyrant right on our
doorstep and HQ isn't doing a thing about it...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
データプローブが
設置されていない場所の情報は[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Information from places where Data
Probes haven't been installed[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, don't forget why they sent us here in the first place—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: フロンティアネットでは拾うことはできない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: can't be picked up by FrontierNet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: FrontierNav's range is still limited.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
監視していたデータプローブの
セグメントから外れて[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It must have moved out of the Segment
monitored by the Data Probe[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, right—they couldn't track it if there's no local probe.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ロストしてしまったんですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They must have lost track of it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They must've lost it when it went off the grid.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ちょちょちょちょ　ちょっと待って下さい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: W-w-w-wait a minute, please![ST:wait ]
localized version: Whoa whoa whoooa there, rookie.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
落ち着いて下さい！
相手はオーバードなんですから！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Calm down! We're talking about an Overd here![ST:wait ]
localized version:
We're talking about a tyrant here!
Do you even understand what that means?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まだ　教えていなかったわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I hadn't told you yet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We should probably explain.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
オーバードというのはＮＬＡにとって
脅威対象となる原生生物の中でもランク外[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Among the native creatures that pose a threat
to NLA, Overds are outside the normal ranks[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
"Tyrant" is our term for any indigenous lifeform
that falls outside of our usual threat ranking system.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
つまりランクを付けられないほど
規格外の脅威を秘めた原生生物の総称よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In other words, it's a general term for native creatures that
pose such an abnormal threat that no rank can be assigned.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
In other words, they're too powerful for us to even
measure how dangerous they would be to take on.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ただ　単純に強いというだけで
選ばれているわけじゃなくて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
However, they aren't designated
simply for being strong.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And "too powerful" doesn't always just mean physically strong.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何か一つでも脅威的な能力を持っていれば
対象となるんです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If they have even one threatening ability,
they qualify for the designation.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If a creature has even a single especially nasty trait,
it's classified as a tyrant.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: オーバードというのは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: An Overd is[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: The "tyrant" designation[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ミラに住む原生生物の中でも人類にとって
脅威となる原生生物のことです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
among the native creatures living on Mira, it
refers to those that become a threat to humanity.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
is given to creatures that pose a special threat in one way
or another. That doesn't always mean raw strength—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
実際　戦ってみたら低ランクだった
ということもあったみたいですけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Apparently there have been cases where, once
fought, they turned out to be low-rank.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
some tyrants will actually register as low-rank when
you find them out in the field and engage them in combat.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも　勘違いはしないで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But don't get the wrong idea.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But don't let that fool you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
オーバードに指定されている原生生物は
単純に強さで選ばれているわけではない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Native creatures designated as Overds
aren't chosen simply for strength.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If a creature shows up as a tyrant, you can be sure
it's got at least one nasty trait or ability to speak of.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
一つでも人類の脅威となりうる能力を
有していれば指定の対象となるの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If they possess even one ability that could threaten
humanity, they become a target for designation.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The system can't account for everything, though,
so don't let your guard down, no matter what rank it assigns.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ブレイドでも１、２を争う実力のチームでも
数名の死傷者をだしてしまう原生生物[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
A native creature that can cause casualties even among
teams ranked first or second in skill within BLADE.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Even some of BLADE's very best teams have come back
with serious injuries after running into a tyrant in the field...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それが　オーバードよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's an Overd.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...If they come back at all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:undisp ][ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:undisp ][ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私なんかにありがとうございます[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thank you for trusting someone like me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, all right—I'm game if you are.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　私やります！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san, I'll do it![ST:wait ]
localized version: Count me in, Elma. Let's do this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この先　ここで生きていく以上[ST:wait ]
fan translation: As long as we're going to live here,[ST:wait ]
localized version: If we're gonna settle here on this planet,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
オーバードと遭遇することなんて
何度もあると思います[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I think we'll run into Overds many times.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
we're gonna have to get used to
dealing with tyrants now and then.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その度に逃げ出すわけにもいかないですから[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We can't just run away every time.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We can't just keep running forever, you know?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それに　今逃げてＮＬＡに被害が出たら
絶対後悔します[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Besides, if we run away now and NLA suffers
damage, I'll definitely regret it.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Besides, I'd never forgive myself if someone else
ended up getting hurt because we just left it here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうね
やりましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right. Let's do it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right. Let's do it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よく考えた上で　なのね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You've thought this through, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: As long as you understand the risks involved.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lin?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私もやります！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Count me in.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Count me in.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＮＬＡのこともそうですけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Of course, NLA is part of it, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: The same goes for everyone in New LA, but,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この先　ここで生きていく以上
オーバードとの戦闘は避けられませんから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As long as we're going to live here,
fights with Overds can't be avoided.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
if we're gonna settle here on this planet, we're gonna
have to get used to dealing with tyrants now and then.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それに　みなさんとなら
なんか斃せる気がしてきました！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Besides, with all of you here, I'm starting
to feel like we can actually take it down![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Besides, if I need to? I can always run away
while it's busy chewing on one of you guys![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ふふっ　そうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Fufu. That's right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Heh—fair enough.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 二人共　無理だけはしないでね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Just don't push yourselves
too hard, either of you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But don't push it, okay? Either of you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
斃せるに越したことはないけど
一旦引かせるだけでも十分よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Defeating it would be best, but even
making it retreat for now is enough.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If we can take it down, great, but if not,
even just luring it away would be a moral victory.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その間にデータプローブを設置すれば[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If we install the Data Probe in the meantime,[ST:wait ]
localized version: As long as we buy enough time to install the probe,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あいつがまたＮＬＡに接近してきても
今度はフロンティアネットで捕捉ができる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
even if that thing approaches NLA again, we
can track it with FrontierNet next time.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
we can use FrontierNav to track it or any other tyrant
that comes this close to the city from now on.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
オーバードは　今までの原生生物とは違う
しっかり準備をしましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Overds are different from the native creatures
we've faced so far. Let's prepare thoroughly.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Just make sure you're ready before we attack—
this'll be tougher than anything else we've faced.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 戦う姿勢を見せる
fan translation: Take a fighting stance
localized version: Suggest killing the tyrant.

Original Japanese line: オーバードとは何か尋ねる
fan translation: Ask what an Overd is.
localized version: Ask what a tyrant is.

Original Japanese line: リンとエルマを見て微笑む
fan translation: Look at Lin and Elma and smile
localized version: Suggest the three of you can handle it.

Original Japanese line: NLAを見つめ拳を強く握る
fan translation: Gaze at NLA and clench your fist tightly.
localized version: Say you can't just leave it so close to New LA.

Original Japanese line: やりましたね　エルマさん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We did it, Elma-san![ST:wait ]
localized version: We. Are. Awesooome![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よくやったわ　リン
それに[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Good job, Lin. And[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Nice work, Lin. You fought well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなたもね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: you too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You did too.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 早速　データプローブの設置を始めましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's start installing the
Data Probe right away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now, let's get down to business and install that data probe.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ぐずぐずしているとまた新たな原生生物に
遭遇する危険がある[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If we linger, we risk encountering
more native creatures.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If we stay here for long, there's no telling
what other playmates might show up.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この光のオブジェクトが
フロンティアネットスポット[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This glowing object is a FrontierNet Spot.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This beam of light indicates a FrontierNav site.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: データプローブを設置するのに最適な場所よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's the optimal place to
install a Data Probe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It marks the ideal spot to bury the probe.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 興味
fan translation: Interest
localized version: Launch

Original Japanese line: 決心
fan translation: Decision
localized version: Step Up

Original Japanese line: 決意
fan translation: Determination
localized version: Take Charge

Original Japanese line:
データプローブの取り付け　完了しました
起動準備にかかります[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Data Probe attachment complete.
Beginning startup preparations.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Okay, the probe should be ready for insertion.
I'll just boot it up.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ありがとう　リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thank you, Lin.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Thanks, Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この円筒形の機械が　データプローブ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This cylindrical machine is the Data Probe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The top half of the cylinder contains the probe itself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
先端からレーザーを照射して
土を溶解しながら進むようになっているわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's designed to advance by firing a
laser from its tip and melting the soil.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The bottom half is a laser—it dissolves the soil
so the probe can burrow to the proper depth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
最初は　地上に設置していたのよ
でも　原生生物による破壊が頻繁に起きてね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
At first, we installed them on the surface.
But native creatures often destroyed them.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We tried just planting them on the surface at first,[ST:page p1=70 ]but we kept running into problems
with the local wildlife damaging the goods.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今のこの地中深くに設置するものに
改造されたの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
So we modified the design so it
could be buried deep underground.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Burying them is going to save us all
a lot of time and headaches in the long run.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: How does it look?[ST:wait ]
localized version: We all set?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
準備完了です
いつでもどうぞ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Prep complete! Ready when you are![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, ma'am. Whenever you're ready.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
設置の合図は　[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]から行うのよ
やってみて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Send the installation signal
from the [System:Ruby rt=Device ]terminal[/System:Ruby]. Go ahead.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Why don't you do the honors? You can launch it
right from your comm device. Give it a try.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ！？　私ですか？？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Eh!? Me??[ST:wait ]
localized version: What? You want me to do it?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ダメですよ！
それじゃ　研修にならないじゃないですか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
No way! Then it wouldn't
be training, would it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now, now. There's nothing to it, trust me. It's easy.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
怖いことなんて全然ないですから
ポチッとやっちゃって下さい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There's nothing scary about it at
all, so just press the button![ST:wait ]
localized version:
And besides, this is supposed to be
YOUR training mission, remember?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたは　もうブレイドの一員なのよ
これぐらいのことで怖気づいてどうするの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You're already a member of BLADE. How will you
manage if something like this scares you?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Which is exactly why we're here. You're going to have plenty
of firsts as you become a BLADE—you'd best get used to it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あとは　目標地点まで到達するのを待つだけよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Now we just wait for it to
reach the target depth.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Good, now we just need to give it a minute
to reach the target depth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: データプローブ　起動確認[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Data Probe activation confirmed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Aaand installation complete.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
フロンティアネットへの接続も
正常に行われています[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Connection to FrontierNet is
proceeding normally, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We are now online with a solid connection to FrontierNav.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
うん　上出来ね
今の方法をよく覚えておいて[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Good, well done. Remember how you did that.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Excellent. See? At the end of the day,
there's really not much to it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
フロンティアネットスポットは効率よく情報を
収集するために一定の間隔で指定されている　[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
FrontierNet Spots are designated at fixed
intervals to collect information efficiently.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The hardest part was calculating the ideal probe locations.
We need them spread out evenly to maximize data collection.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフポイントを発見するためには[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: In order to discover the Life Point[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yup, planting probes is easy.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
広範囲にデータプローブを
設置する必要がありますから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
we need to install Data
Probes over a wide area.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And the more we plant,
the more likely we are to find missing crew,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
フロンティアネットスポットを見つけたら
どんどん設置していきましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
When you find FrontierNet
Spots, keep installing probes![ST:wait ]
localized version:
so anytime you see a probe site, 
there's no excuse not to plant that sucker.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これで研修は終わりよ
ブレイドホームに戻ってナギに報告しましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's it for the training. Let's head back
to the BLADE Home and report to Nagi.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That'll do it for your training.
Let's head back to the barracks and report to Secretary Nagi.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンを見つめ設置をお願いする
fan translation: Look at Lin and ask her to handle the installation
localized version: Suggest Lin should take care of it.

Original Japanese line: エルマを見つめ首を振る
fan translation: Look at Elma and shake head.
localized version: Remind Elma you've never done this before.

Original Japanese line: うなずき[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を操作する
fan translation: Nod and operate the terminal.
localized version: Nod and launch the probe.

Original Japanese line: 心を決め[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を操作する
fan translation: Make up your mind and operate the terminal.
localized version: Put aside your fears and launch the probe.

Original Japanese line: 決意を新たに[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を操作する
fan translation: With renewed resolve, operate the terminal.
localized version: Show your worth and launch the probe.

Original Japanese line: ヴァンダム司令！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Commander Vandham!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おう　戻ってきやがったか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Oh, so you finally dragged
yourselves back, eh?
localized version: Well now, look what the cat dragged in...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
わざわざお出迎え？
こちらから本部に出頭したのに[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You came all the way out here to meet
us? We were heading to HQ anyway.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Sorry we missed you last time—
we could have come to meet you at HQ, you know.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 待ちきれなくなっただけさ　なぁ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Just couldn't wait any longer, eh?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Indeed. I suggested as much—twice.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 俺が聞きに来てやった方が早いだろう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's faster if I come here and ask, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: And we know how much I enjoy being told what to do.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
多少手間取ったみたいだが
ま　初めてにしちゃあ　上出来だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Looks like it took you some time, but
well, for a first try, you did fine.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Anyway, I hear you tangled with a tyrant
WAY out of your league. On a training mission, no less.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 任務終了　ご苦労さん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Mission complete. Good work.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That was reckless. And goddamn magnificent.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 興味
fan translation: Show Interest
localized version: Get Started

Original Japanese line: 疑問
fan translation: Question
localized version: Get More Info

Original Japanese line: 肯定
fan translation: Yes
localized version: Decide

Original Japanese line: 否定
fan translation: No
localized version: Hesitate

Original Japanese line:
ところで　ナギに仕事を押し付けて
どこ行ってたの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
By the way, where did you go,
dumping the work on Nagi?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So, Commander, to what do we owe the pleasure
of your visit here today?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おいおい　ブレイド司令ってのも忙しいんだぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Hey now, the BLADE Commander
is busy too, y'know.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, I can't just ask Nagi to do everything for me—
I'd be out of a job.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 新隊員のスカウトを人任せにするくらいにか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Busy enough to leave scouting
new members to someone else?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey, I delivered you the new recruit, didn't I?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よく言うぜ　よし俺が説得しようって
ノリノリだったくせに[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You can talk, considering how fired up you
were, saying "Okay, I'll persuade them!"[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yeah, yeah. You won the bet. Don't worry about it, all right?
I'll settle up with you later—you know I'm good for it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうなの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Is that so?[ST:wait ]
localized version: The "bet"?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうだったかな[ST:wide ]―
あとは頼んだぞ　司令[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Was that so?[ST:wide ]― I'll leave the
rest to you, Commander.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'm sure I'm needed elsewhere.
If you'll all excuse me. Commander.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ナギおじさま　逃げましたね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Uncle Nagi totally ran away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, that wasn't obvious at all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
呆れた
軍務長官とブレイド司令が揃いも揃って[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Unbelievable. The Secretary of Defense
and the BLADE Commander, both of you...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Heh. Look at you two.
I swear, you're like two children excited about a new toy.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お前さんだって見込みある新人を見つけたって
嬉しそうだったじゃないか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Weren't you looking happy yourself,
saying you'd found a promising newbie?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Look who's talking. I don't recall ever seeing you
file a request to personally train a rescue before?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうだったかしら[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Was I?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Is that so odd?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おいおい　つれないな
ツンデレってやつか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come on now, don't be so cold. Are
you one of those 'tsundere' types?[ST:wait ]

Come on now, don't be so cold. Are
you one of those 'tsundere' types?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It is before we'd even asked her to become a BLADE,
Little Miss Stick-in-the-rear.[ST:wait ]

fan translation:
Come on now, don't be so cold. Are
you one of those 'tsundere' types?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It is before we'd even asked him to become a BLADE,
Little Miss Stick-in-the-rear.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　あなた達のスラングは
よく分からないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well, I don't really understand your slang.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Usually, I ask when I don't get your slang expressions,
but something tells me to just let that one go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そんなことより　そいつが新入りか！
いいツラがまえじゃないか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
More importantly, is that the
newbie? You've got a good look![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Enough about that. Where are your manners, anyway?
I still haven't been introduced to our new recruit here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ブレイドのヴァンダム司令です[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is BLADE's Commander, Vandham.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander Vandham is BLADE's top officer.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 元は白鯨で技師長をやっていたんだが[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Originally I was the Chief
Engineer on the White Whale, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: In a past life, I was Chief Engineer on the White Whale.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このミラに着いてからはなんの因果か
ブレイドの司令官をやっている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Since arriving on Mira, by some twist of
fate, I've been serving as BLADE Commander.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Same idea, basically—someone has a problem, I fix it.
You follow?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よろしくな　新入り[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Nice to meet ya, newbie.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Not much for conversation, are ya?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それで要件は？
新人の顔を見に来たわけではないんでしょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
So what's your business? You didn't just
come here to see the newcomer, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So you still haven't told us why you're here.
From the look of things, I'm guessing this isn't a social call.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 分かるか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You can tell?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You don't think?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
分かるわよ
あなたはそんなタイプじゃない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Of course. You're not that type of person.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No, so let's cut the crap and get down to business.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
なら本題に入るか　要件は二つ
所属ユニオンと任務の依頼だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Okay, let's get to it. Two things: Union
affiliation, and a mission request.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Hah! Sounds like you're learning
my expressions just fine, Elma.[ST:page p1=90 ]Anyway, first we need Chatty Cathy here
to choose a division and pull an assignment.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そう急ぐな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Don't be in such a hurry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Whoa there, itchy-trigger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
早く自由に駆けまわりたいのは分かるが
所属ユニオンを決めないとそれもできないぞ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I know you want to run around freely already, but
you can't even do that until you pick your Union.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I know you're just chaffin' at the bit to run out there and grab
the world by its tail, but you need to choose a division first.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ユニオンの説明が終わったら
おのずと任務の内容も分かるさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once I'm done explaining the Unions,
you'll understand the mission too.[ST:wait ]

traveling around Mira, installing Data

as many as we can, as fast as we can.

to ensure the human species doesn't

only eliminates native creatures that

and they tend to keep them strictly to creatures

is issued directly from

that's because it can't possibly be

localized version:

no activity from intelligent life forms has been confirmed,

there's a large number of indigens in the area—

Finding it, or handling the indigens that get in your way.

Original Japanese line: 困ったわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's a problem.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオに向き直り名前を告げる

fan translation: Cross your arms and prompt him to introduce himself first.
localized version: Insist he introduce himself first.

fan translation: Guard

Original Japanese line: 弱気
fan translation: Timid
localized version: Act Selfishly

localized version: H-hey! Down in front! I can't see![ST:wait ]

任せてください！

fan translation: Leave it to me! I'll protect you![ST:wait ]

localized version: Whatever it is, at least it's not a Prone.[ST:wait ]

localized version:
Ah, yes, a thousand pardons. We are called "L'cirufe".

inhabited this planet since times of antiquity.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンを庇うように前に出る
fan translation: Step forward as if to protect Lin.

Original Japanese line: リンの後ろにそっと下がる
fan translation: Quietly move behind Lin.
localized version: Use Lin as a shield.

Original Japanese line: ルーさんはノポンを知ってますも！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lu-san knows Nopon, mo!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Friend...knows about Nopon people?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ええ　私の作るゲージュツ品を

Nopon purchase my wares quite often, you know.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 故事に言う　カモといったところですね[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それ　お得意様って言わないんだ[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この星に古くから暮らしているとのことだけど[ST:wait ]

localized version: So Mr. L, you've lived here a long time?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい　ここは静かでいい星ですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes. It's a quiet, nice planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Just "L"—and yes. Such a nice, quiet world.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
動物達も虫達も皆
おとなしく気立てのいい者ばかり[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The animals and insects are all
docile and good-natured creatures.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The wildlife and insects are all so docile—
such gentle dispositions.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えーー　何回も襲われているじゃないですか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh? We've been attacked plenty of times![ST:wait ]
localized version: Are you kidding me?! They attack us all the time![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Indeed![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
タツがいなかったら　みんな今頃
エサになってましたも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If Tatsu wasn't here, you'd
all be food by now, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yes, friends lucky Tatsu here to protect them
from becoming main course.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうね　次に襲われたら
差し出す餌もあることだし[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Right. If we're attacked next
time, we have bait to offer up.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yeah, 'cuz we can toss you out as an appetizer
and run away while they're snacking.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だから　それは
お腹が減っていただけなんです[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's just because they were hungry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, the creatures here are hungry, yes. Granted.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全然　おとなしくないんじゃ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Not docile at all, then[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: "Gentle disposition" my butt.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ただねぇ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's just[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's just...hmmm...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ただ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Just...?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 最近は　騒がしい連中が次々とこの星に現れて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Recently, noisy groups have been showing
up one after another on this planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, who can blame them,
with all the commotion here as of late?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　あなた方のことじゃありませんよ
バイアス人とか　そういった連中のことです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ah, I don't mean you. I mean the
Bias, and groups like them.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Not that we're pointing our fingers at you, mind.
No, it's those Prone. Sons of bastards.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ルーさんは　バイアス人が嫌いなんですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lu-san, do you hate the Bias?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, we're not their biggest fans either.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それはもう[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Absolutely[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: We loathe them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私の平穏な暮らしを破壊してくれた
憎むべき連中ですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They're the hateful bunch who
destroyed my peaceful life.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They have ruined our once-peaceful life here. RUINED![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 故事に言うところの　不倶戴天の仲です[ST:wait ]
fan translation: As the old saying goes, we're sworn enemies.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They are all...how should we say? Asscaves.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ルー　あなた
ずいぶん地球の言語に詳しいようね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lu, you seem quite knowledgeable
about Earth's language.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Close enough. By the way, L,
you seem to speak our language quite fluently.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ちょっと間違えているような気もするけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Though I get the feeling you're
getting some of it wrong[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well...yeah. Most of the time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
実はこの先にある宇宙船の
残骸のようなものの中で[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Actually, inside what looked like
spaceship wreckage up ahead,[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We owe it all to that wreckage back there—
what a treasure trove![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: データ[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]というものを見つけましてね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I found something called a data [System:Ruby rt=Device ]terminal[/System:Ruby].[ST:wait ]
localized version: Especially the data terminal we found inside.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私の知的好奇心の泉は
それで満たされているのですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That has filled the spring of
my intellectual curiosity.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It is the ultimate portable snack
for satisfying our insatiable curiosity![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この先ってことは
ライフポイントのことでしょうか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: "Up ahead"... you mean the Life Point?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
"Wreckage back there"... 
You think that's our piece of the Lifehold?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どうやらそうみたいね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Seems like it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Certainly sounds like it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ルー　よければその[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を貸してくれない？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lu, if you don't mind, could
you lend us that [System:Ruby rt=Device ]terminal[/System:Ruby]?[ST:wait ]
localized version: L, can we take a look at this terminal you found?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　もちろんですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Of course, of course.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Of course, of course.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ありがとう
リン　ちょっとこれを解析してみて[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thanks. Lin, try analyzing this.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Thanks. Lin, see what you can make of it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Okay.[ST:wait ]
localized version: On it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 結果出ました　書籍データのようです[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I have the results. Looks like book data.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay...yep. This is library data.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ちょっと見せて[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let me see.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let me see.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
なるほど　この先にあるのはライフの一部
データベースユニットの可能性が高いわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I see. What's up ahead is part of
the Life, likely the Database Unit.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Huh. So it is. The unit L stumbled upon
must be part of the Lifehold's Archives.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: じゃあ　ライフの本体じゃないんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Then it's not the main Life core.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So...not the Core, then.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あれだけバラバラになって
墜ちていったのだから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
After it broke into so
many pieces when it fell,[ST:wait ]
localized version: The entire ship was torn to bits when we came down.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
一緒に見つかったら
奇跡と言っていいでしょうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
finding them together would
probably be a miracle.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The odds of any single piece of Lifehold
being the Core aren't very high.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I see[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, I guess not...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン　落ち込む事はないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin, there's no need to feel down.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now, now, Lin, don't be glum.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
たとえ本命ではないデータベースだけ
だったとしても　それも人類の大切な遺産よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if it's just the Database Unit and not the core,
that's still an important part of humanity's heritage.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The Lifehold Archives are the sum total
of all human knowledge—this is still a really big find.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: とにかく現地で確認してみましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Anyway, let's check it out.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We should try and secure it ASAP.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, you're right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今はやめた方がいいですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You had better not go now.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now...might not be a good time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どうしてですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Why's that, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Why not?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 先ほどまで残骸の近くにいたのですが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I was near the wreckage until
just a moment ago, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Why else? ...The Asscaves![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あの憎っくきバイアス人が
現れたので戻ってきたのですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
those hateful Bias people
appeared, so I came back.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We just came from there,
and Prone are all over the wreckage...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: バイアスが[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Bias...[ST:wait ]
localized version: What?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　悪い予感がします！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san, I have a bad feeling![ST:wait ]
localized version: Uh-oh... This is bad.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね　急ぎましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right. Let's hurry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Very bad—let's go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなた方は私にとっては
もはや友人といってよい方々だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
To me, you are already people
I could call friends.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Apologies we didn't mention it before—
we assumed you'd abandoned it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私も一緒に参りましょう
これぞ故事に言う　寄らば文殊の知恵！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I shall accompany you as well. This is what the old
saying calls 'too many heads are better than none.'[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Allow us to show you the way. After all, as you say—
too many heads are better than none, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: やっぱりまちがえてる[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Still getting it wrong[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Uh...close enough.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何となくうなずく
fan translation: Nod vaguely.
localized version: Concur the wildlife is peaceful.

Original Japanese line: 何度も襲われたとツッコむ
fan translation: Interject that you've been attacked many times.
localized version: Claim the wildlife is hostile.

Original Japanese line: ああっ　やられましたですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah, they got us, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh noooooo![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　なんということを[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ahh, how could they[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: We were afraid of this...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ひどい[ST:wide ]―　私達の　地球の大切な遺産を[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Horrible[ST:wide ]― our precious heritage from Earth...[ST:wait ]
localized version: But...why? Do these monsters just destroy everything they see?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうやら　ただの好戦的な異星人って
だけではなさそうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Apparently, they aren't
simply hostile aliens.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No. This is organized. Calculated.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 明確な意図を持ってライフを攻撃している[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They're attacking the Life with clear intent.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We aren't the only ones hunting down the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そういえば　この前
地球人を皆殺しにするって[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come to think of it... earlier

localized version: What was it? "All Earth aliens must die," right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まだ間に合うかもしれない
やるわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We might still make it in time. Let's do it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We have to try and salvage what we can. Let's go![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ゲーティア様　あいつラ　地球人でス[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Goetia-sama, those guys are Earthlings.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Mistress Goetia. These are Earth aliens.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ふーん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hmm.[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この目で見るまでは信じられなかったけど
どうやら本当だったようだねぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I couldn't believe it until I saw it myself,
but it seems it was true after all.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, well, well... Seeing truly is believing, isn't it?
Who would have thought...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: くっ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ugh![ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: バイアス人とは違う　別種の異星人が[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Different from the Bias...
another type of alien[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: She's not a Prone, but they're working together...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 地球人だったら　どうするんですか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What are you going to do
if we are Earthlings?![ST:wait ]
localized version: Why would you do this? Why do you hate us?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
殲滅するのさ
それがあたし達グロウスの義務[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Annihilate. That's our duty as Growth.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hate? Human extinction is duty—our duty, as Ganglion.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウス？
それがあなた達の組織ということね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Growth? So that's your organization.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ganglion? So that's what you call yourselves?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうさね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Indeed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
貴様ら地球人は
この宇宙に発生した癌細胞みたいなもの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Earthlings are like cancer cells that
have appeared in this universe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Humanity is a blight...a great cancer, festering on the cosmos.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 滅ぼさなければならないのさ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They must be destroyed![ST:wait ]
localized version: Our job is to eradicate it![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
随分と手前勝手な論理ね
