fan translation:
That's quite the selfish logic. Is
that why you destroyed the Life?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Humanity is here in peace—
what gives you the right to destroy the Lifehold?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: こいつはライフっていうのかい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You call this thing the Life?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Is that what you call it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まるで原始人
随分と時代遅れの機械を使ってるねぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
So primitive. You're using
pretty outdated technology.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So primitive. Your language...your technology...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まぁいい
こいつも貴様ら地球人も全て消し去る[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well, fine. This thing and all
you Earthlings will be erased.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And yet, so dangerous. You must be purged.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それがあたしらグロウスの論理
グロウスの正義さ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's our Growth logic. Growth's justice![ST:wait ]
localized version: This is our calling as Ganglion—the cause of the righteous![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ならば私達は　私達の論理を貫くまで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Then we'll just stick to our logic.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then you'll forgive us for defending ourselves
against your "righteous" cause.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いいよ　殺しがいがある
眠ってるだけの奴らよりずっとね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Good. You'll be worth killing. Much more
than those guys who are just sleeping![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, this should at least be more entertaining
than stamping out the lives of your sleeping brethren![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
忌々しいね
原始生物の分際で[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Damn you, mere primitive creatures.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Wretched little primates!
You don't know when to quit, do you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 覚えときな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Remember this![ST:wait ]
localized version: This isn't over![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この惑星に[System:Ruby rt=きさまら ]地球人[/System:Ruby]が住み着く余地なんてない！
いや　宇宙のどこにもないのさっ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There's no room for [System:Ruby rt=You Bastards ]Earthlings[/System:Ruby] to settle on
this planet! No, nowhere in the universe![ST:wait ]
localized version:
You cannot escape us, on this planet or any other.
Sooner or later, your kind will be cleansed![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ゲーティア様　今のうちに[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Goetia-sama, now's your chance...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Mistress Goetia! Now! Quickly![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もももも～[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Momomomo~[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あの機動兵器　まさか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: (That mech... Could it be?)[ST:wait ]
localized version: (That mech... Could it be?)[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
残念です　グロウスを斃したところで
失われたモノは還らない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's regrettable. Even defeating Growth
won't bring back what was lost.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
A well fought victory indeed.
Such a shame it cannot bring back that which was lost to you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 故事に言う　覆水盆に返らず[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As the old saying goes, "no use
crying over spilled milk".[ST:wait ]
localized version: But this is spilled milk over the dam, now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
なんであの異星人達はあんなに
地球人を憎むんでしょう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Why did those aliens hate Earthlings so much?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I just don't get it...
What do they have against humans?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼らがどうやってこの星に来たのかは
分からないけれど　一つだけ確信が持てたわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I don't know how they got to this planet,
but I'm certain of one thing now.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'm not sure how they wound up on Mira,
but you saw the mech—that is definitely them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]
localized version: Who?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球を戦いに巻き込んだ者達が
誰であるのかをね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Who the ones who dragged
Earth into the war were.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The aliens that destroyed Earth—
the Ganglion were among them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No way!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼らがその全てではないにしても間違いなく
地球を襲撃した異星人のうちの一勢力ね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if it wasn't all of them, they're definitely
one faction of the aliens who attacked Earth.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It wasn't just them, of course, but they were definitely
one of the forces involved in that battle.[ST:page p1=150 ]I'm absolutely positive now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あのドールに似た機動兵器も[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That Doll-like mech we just saw—[ST:wait ]
localized version: That Skell-like mech we just saw—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ＮＬＡのデータベースに
記録されているものと一致するはずよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
should match what's recorded
in the NLA database.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
check it against the NLA records and
I'm pretty sure it'll come back with a perfect match.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんな[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: How could[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こんな結果になってしまったけど
あなたの協力に感謝するわ　ルー[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even though it turned out this way,
I appreciate your cooperation, Lu.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Anyway, we really appreciate all your help here, L,
but we need to be heading back now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いえいえ　力及ばず申し訳ありません[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Not at all. I apologize I couldn't do more.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Not at all! We only wish we could have done more...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何かお礼が出来るといいのだけど
生憎こんな状態だし[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I wish I could offer some thanks, but
unfortunately, given the situation...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I wish we could compensate you somehow,
but honestly, there's nothing left for us to give...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: お礼ですか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thanks...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Compensate, you say?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうだ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I know![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなた方の街へ連れて行ってもらえませんか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Could you take me to your city?[ST:wait ]
localized version: How about allowing us to accompany you back to your city?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私たちの街へ？
一応　理由を聞かせてもらえる？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: To our city? Can I ask why, exactly?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You want to come back to New LA?
...Why, exactly?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: データベースユニットが破壊されてしまい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Database Unit was destroyed,[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, our treasure trove was destroyed...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私の好奇心が満たされる術は
なくなってしまいました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
the means to satisfy my
curiosity have disappeared.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Without the Archives, we're afraid
our thirst for knowledge cannot be quenched.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ですが　異星人の街があるとすれば格別[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
However, if there's an alien
city, that's another matter.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But an entire Earth city to explore?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おそらくそこには
未知の知的体験が待っているでしょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Unknown intellectual experiences await there.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Such an experience would provide
compensation beyond compare![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: お礼の件はそれで！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let that be my reward![ST:wait ]
localized version: The thought makes us tingle![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 変な異星人[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Weird alien.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oookay...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなたはルーの提案をどう思う？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What do you think of Lu's proposal?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm... What do you think, Rook?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね　私達はグロウスとは違う[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right. We're different from Growth.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah. We're not like the Ganglion, after all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この星の先住民と仲良くやっていきたいと
思ってるもの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We want to get along with
the natives of this planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We want to live in harmony with all the other species here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうですか？　私はルーさんがグロウスだとは
思えませんけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Really? I can't imagine
Lu-san is Growth, though[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You think so? This guy?
I dunno. I'm just not seeing it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
確かに顔はちょっと怖いですし　言葉遣いも
変ですけど　悪い人じゃないと思います[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Sure, his face is a bit scary, and he talks
funny, but I don't think he's a bad guy.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I mean, he talks funny, and he's got one of those
"blah!" faces, but he doesn't seem like a bad guy.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
リンさんのいうとおりですも
センジューミンに悪い人はいないですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lin-san is right, mo! There
are no bad natives, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Linly right. All Miran natives are good, honest folk![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたの負けね
それに私達はグロウスとは違う[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You lose. Besides, we're
different from Growth.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Looks like you're outvoted.
Besides, we can't be like the Ganglion.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この星の先住民と仲良くやっていきたいと
思ってるもの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We want to get along with
the natives of this planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We want to live in harmony with all the other species here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
決まりですね　では早速　行きましょう
故事に言う　善は急げです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Settled then. Okay, let's go right away. As the
old saying goes, "strike while the iron is hot!"[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then it's settled. Excellent. Let's be off!
The early worm is for the birds.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ルーのこともあるし
ＮＬＡへ戻ってヴァンダムに報告しましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There's also the matter of Lu. Let's return
to NLA and report to Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Right, let's start heading back.
We should report to the commander at once.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 面白くなりそうだと微笑む
fan translation: Smile, thinking it seems like fun.
localized version: Suggest it sounds like fun.

Original Japanese line: グロウスである可能性を示唆
fan translation: Suggest Lu might be Growth.
localized version: Suggest L could be a spy for the Ganglion.

Original Japanese line:
んっ！？　そいつは誰だ？
どうやら異星人のようだが[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hmm? Who's that? Looks like an alien, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Hm? Either you picked up another xeno
or someone's been holding their breath too long.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 夜光の森で出会ったルーさんです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This is Lu-san, who we
met in Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This is L. We met in Noctilum.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
個体名はル・シルフェ
この星に古くから暮らす者です[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
My designation is Lu Cirufe. I am one who has
lived on this planet since ancient times.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We are L'cirufe, if it please you.
This planet has been our home since days of yore.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ほう　この星に古くから[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Oh? A longtime resident?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh? A longtime resident?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だから連れてきたのよ
彼から得られる情報は貴重よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's why we brought him back. The
information we can get from him is valuable.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That's why we brought him back.
His knowledge could prove invaluable.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＮＬＡへの居住を認めてあげたいのだけれど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I'd like to allow him to
reside in NLA, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'd like to request permission for him to stay in New LA.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
行政長官としては　軽々に異分子を
受け入れることはできないな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As Director General, I cannot
lightly accept a foreign element.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We can't allow just anyone to waltz into our city on a whim.
How much do we know about him?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 彼は信じられる[ST:wide ]―　私はそう感じたわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: He is trustworthy[ST:wide ]― That's what I felt.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I know enough. Enough to say that we can trust him.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: センジューミンに悪い人はいないですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No bad people among natives, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: All Miran natives are good, honest folk![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
タツ君はともかく　エルマ
君が言うのならばそうなのだろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Tatsu-kun aside, Elma, if you
say so, then it must be so.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yes, Tatsu, yes.
Anyway, Elma, you do seem quite sure of yourself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よし　分かった
俺も責任を持とう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Alright, understood. I will
also take responsibility.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, I'll share the responsibility. He can stay.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それでいいかな　行政長官閣下[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Is that alright then, Your
Excellency, Director General?[ST:wait ]
localized version: If...that's acceptable, Mr. Director General?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 君達がそうまで言うのならばな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If you two insist so much...[ST:wait ]
localized version: If you're both certain—so be it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おお　ありがとうございます！
これぞ故事に言う　類は友を呼ぶ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ohh, thank you so much! This is what the saying
calls "birds of a feather flock together!"[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Many thanks, good sirs!
Truly, we are walking on the ninth cloud of seventh heaven![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
堅苦しいのは無しにしましょう
ルーとお呼びください[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's drop the formalities.
Please, call me Lu.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Please, call us L. The rest is far too formal.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その方が私も気が楽です[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That way I'm more at ease, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And honestly, we prefer L anyway.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ではエルマ大佐
ライフポイントの件　報告を聞かせてくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Then, Colonel Elma, tell me your
report about the Life Point.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
More importantly, Colonel—
what happened with the Lifehold unit?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうか[ST:wide ]―　やはり本命ではなかったか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I see— so it wasn't the
primary target after all.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I see... So it wasn't the Core after all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
見つかったのは
データベースユニットのうちの一つ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We found one of the Database Units.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No. We confirmed it was one of the Archive units.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ユニットナンバーは０７[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Unit Number: 07.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Unit Number 07.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
０７というと[ST:wide ]―
ＬＣが記録されているユニットか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
07, huh[ST:wide ]― That's the unit with
the LC archives, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: 07? ...That would that be the LC repository, wouldn't it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その三分の一だな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's one-third of it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: One of three, but yes.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＬＣ[ST:wide ]―　アメリカ議会図書館の収蔵物は[ST:wait ]
fan translation: LC[ST:wide ]― The Library of Congress archives[ST:wait ]
localized version: The entirety of the Library of Congress archives.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ユニット０７から０９に
分割記録されていたはずだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
were supposed to be divided and
recorded on Units 07 to 09.[ST:wait ]
localized version: As I recall, the data was stored on units 07 through 09.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まぁ　不幸中の幸いだったな
壊されたのが本命でなくて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well, lucky in a way. At least what
was destroyed wasn't the main one.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, thank God it wasn't the Core.
This situation coulda been a lot worse.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうかしら？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I wonder about that.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I wonder.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ん？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hm?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hm?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
有史以来　刊行された書籍などを
集めたデータベースよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's a database containing books and such
published since the start of recorded history.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The LC archives contained nearly every
published work in mankind's history.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 人の歩み　心の歴史が刻まれた書籍は[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Books where the progress of humanity and
the history of human hearts are recorded.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's not like it's just a bunch of
random books and manuscripts, you know?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何物にも代え難い　地球人類が
誇るべき文化遺産ではなくて？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Isn't it an irreplaceable cultural heritage
that Earthlings should be proud of?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's a history of human thought.
A record of opinions and emotions.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いや　そいつは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No, that's[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: I mean, yeah, sure, but—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
全部ではないにしても
その一部が永久に失われた[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
While not everything is gone, some
of it has been lost forever.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
So if you stop and consider what it means
to lose even a third of that data?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これは重大な損失　文化の死よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is a grave loss, the death of culture.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's a cultural and historical loss of catastrophic proportions.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ん　ん[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Mm, mm[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: このＮＬＡにもデータベースはある[ST:wait ]
fan translation: NLA has its own database, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We do have parity data for the archives here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ユニットナンバーが分かっているのなら
復元も出来るかもしれん[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If we know the Unit Number,
restoration might be possible.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We know which unit was lost,
so hopefully we can find some way to restore it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そう願っているわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I hope so.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's hope so.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんなことより[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: More importantly[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Moving on—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウスという　その敵性異星人とやら
間違いないのかね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That hostile alien group called
Growth, are you certain it's them?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
These "Ganglion"—you're certain
they were involved in the destruction of Earth?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　これを見て[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes, take a look at this.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Here. See for yourself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
北京上空で戦闘を繰り広げていた
兵器と同一の機体ね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's the same type of mech
that fought over Beijing.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The left shot is from a battle over Beijing;
the right from our encounter.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
つまり　地球を襲撃した異星人達が
この星にもいると[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In other words, the aliens who attacked
Earth are also on this planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Son of a... Is it possible this is their native planet?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ルーもタツも　彼らが先住民ではない
と言っていた[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lu and Tatsu both said they aren't natives.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu told us they aren't from here. And L confirmed it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 彼らがこの星に降り立ってから日は浅い[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They haven't been on this planet long.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They're recent arrivals. Very recent.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
我々を追ってきたのか
それとも単なる偶然か[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Did they follow us here, or
is it just a coincidence?[ST:wait ]
localized version: So...either it's one hell of a coincidence, or they followed us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
意図的にライフを
破壊していたことから推察して[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Judging by the fact that they were
intentionally destroying the Life,[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Considering they appear to be
systematically targeting the Lifehold,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球人に対するアプローチは
能動的といえるわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
their approach to Earthlings
can be described as proactive.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'd say that leaves no question they followed us here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 彼らもライフの意味を知り　探しているのか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Do they also know what the Life
means, and are searching for it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Could they possibly know the purpose of the Lifehold?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺達が見つけていないだけで
既に破壊されている可能性はあるぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's possible some have already been destroyed,
and we simply haven't found them yet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Maybe the whole reason we haven't found the Core yet
is 'cause those scumbags already trashed it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうであるなら
こんな会話は出来ていないはずだが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If that's the case, we wouldn't
even be having this conversation.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If so, none of us would be here
talking in the first place, would we?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そりゃ　まぁそうだ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well, yeah, that's true[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ah, you got a point there...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 非公式だが　他にも数件[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Unofficially, there have
been other cases, too[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: This information doesn't leave this room—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
パスファインダーのチームが
異星人と接触したという報告もある[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We've also gotten reports of Pathfinder
teams making contact with aliens.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But we've had several recent Pathfinder reports
of xeno sightings and contact.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その全てがグロウスとは限らないが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Not all of them are
necessarily Growth, though.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They may or may not be Ganglion...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これまで以上に　防備は固めておいた方が
よさそうだな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We should probably keep our
defenses strong more than ever.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But regardless, I propose we double down
on our defenses going forward.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ご苦労だった　エルマ
引き続きライフポイントの探索を頼む[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Good work, Elma. Please continue
searching for the Life Point.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That'll be all, Elma.
Please continue hunting for any signs of the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解したわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, sir.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 我々に残された時間は少ない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We don't have much time left.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Remember, the clock is always ticking.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
一刻も早く
あれの場所を見つけなくてはならん[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We need to find that unit
as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We HAVE to find that unit before it's too late.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―　ブレイド司令室　[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]― BLADE Command Room [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: —BLADE Command Center—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフポイントは　この先みたいですけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Looks like the Life Point is up ahead, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: The Lifehold piece should be further ahead.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この岩山を越えていくんですも！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We're going over this rocky mountain, mo!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Friends will climb big, rocky mountain?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
むむむ　無理ですも！
このか弱いタツにはぜ～ったい無理ですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Nnngh, impossible, mo! For frail little
Tatsu, it's totally impossible, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: B-but how?! Tatsu has tiny feet! Stubby, flimsy limbs![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: か弱いね[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Frail, huh[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: No spine, either.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　タツじゃないですけど
確かにこの岩山を越えて行くのは無理そうです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But, it's not just Tatsu. It really does seem
impossible to cross this rocky mountain.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But the turnip does have a point.
I don't think there's any way we could scale those cliffs.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね　多少　遠回りにはなるけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right. It'll be a bit of a detour, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Agreed. We'll need to take a detour.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あそこから回りこんで行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's try going around that way.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's try going around that way.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ライフポイントは
この岩山の向こうみたいですけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Looks like the Life Point is
beyond this rocky mountain, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: The Lifehold piece should be beyond this mountain.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ももも　この岩山を越えて行くんですも！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Momomomo, we're going over
this rocky mountain, mo!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Wh-what? Friends will climb big, rocky mountain?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
タツは平気でも
リンさんにはゼッタイ無理ですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if Tatsu is okay, Lin-san
absolutely can't do it, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Tatsu has no problem,
but what about Linly's poor, weak stick legs?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
失礼ね！
無理なのはあんたでしょ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: How rude! You're the one who can't do it![ST:wait ]
localized version: EXCUSE me? At least I HAVE legs.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 登れるですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You can climb it, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Linly go first, then.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Wh-what?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマさん　タツが無理そうなので
別の道で行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Elma-san, since Tatsu seems like he
can't make it, let's find another way.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Uh...hey, uh, Elma? I think we should find another way.
You know, for Tatsu's sake.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Agreed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここに来る途中に分かれ道があったわね
戻ってそちらを進みましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There was a fork in the path on the way
here. Let's go back and take that route.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I noticed the path forked on the way here—
why don't we head back and try that route?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンさん　ずるいですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-san, you're sneaky, mo.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Sure Linly, blame the Nopon...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いやぁ　ホントいつも美味しいなぁ
リンちゃんの料理は[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ahh, Lin-chan's cooking
is always so delicious.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I can't get over your cooking, Lin.
That was delicious![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
嬉しいです！
でも　ごめんなさい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm glad! But I'm sorry too...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Thanks, Gwin, glad you liked it!
I hope it was enough?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お二人が来るとわかってたら
もっとたくさん作っておいたのに[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If I'd known the two of you were
coming, I would have made much more.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If I'd known we were expecting company,
I definitely would have made more.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
全くですも！
タツの分が減ってしまいましたですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Exactly, mo! My portion got smaller, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, yes! Then maybe Tatsu could eat full portion! Meh![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ごめんごめん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Sorry, sorry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Sorry, pint-size.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グインの奴　背は低いくせに食べる量は
人の三倍なんだから　困ったもんだよな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That Gwin, short as he is, eats three times
as much as a normal person. What a pain.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What Gwin lacks in stature, he more than makes up for
with his monstrous appetite. He's...kind of a pig.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 背が低いは余計っすよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The short part was uncalled for![ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay, first of all? I'm taller than you![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だいたい　イリーナ中尉の方が
僕より食ったじゃないすか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Besides, Lieutenant Iriina, you
ate more than I did, didn't you?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And second, you just ate almost double what I did!
Who's the pig here?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
で　あなた達[ST:wide ]―
何か用があったんじゃないのかしら[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
So, you all[ST:wide ]― Didn't you
have some business here?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'm assuming you didn't just come here to argue?
What's going on?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
実は　北の海岸地帯で原生生物が暴れていて
アームズのチームが負傷したらしいんです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:

but that ship should've at least been

fan translation: Have you seen the clock on BLADE Tower?[ST:wait ]
localized version: The readout on BLADE Tower... You've seen it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あの時計はね

fan translation: That clock is displaying a countdown.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's not some kind of special clock or anything like that.
It's a countdown.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あるカウントダウンってなんですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What kind of countdown, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Big number counts down to what?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフの稼働限界よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Life's operational limit.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The Lifehold shutting down.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:undisp ][ST:wait ]
localized version: What?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
白鯨の主動力炉から切り離されたライフには

fan translation:
The Life, separated from the White Whale's main

localized version:
The Lifehold lost its power source when we lost the

Original Japanese line:
私達はそれまでに何としても見つけ出し

fan translation:
We absolutely must find it before

localized version:
We need to locate the Lifehold AND get a power source

Original Japanese line: もし　見つけられなかったら[ST:wait ]
fan translation: And if we can't find it...?[ST:wait ]
localized version: And...if we don't?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この身体は永久に活動を停止する[ST:wait ]
fan translation: These bodies will cease functioning forever.[ST:wait ]
localized version: These bodies will no longer sustain us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: つまり[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: In other words[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: We'll die.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 永遠の闇の世界　死が訪れる[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A world of eternal darkness... death comes[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Not just die, Lin. Die out.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全ての地球人に　何ら分け隔て無く平等にね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
To every Earthling, equally,

localized version:
It would mean the end of the human race as we know it. 
The end of everything.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　この後どうされます？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san, what now?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, on that cheerful note...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 体調は[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Your condition[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay, Rook.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 大丈夫なようね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: seems alright.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You good to go?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ではブレイドタワーへ行きましょう
ヴァンダムに任務の報告をしないとね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's go to BLADE Tower. We need to
report the mission to Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then let's report back to HQ.
I'm sure the Commander will want to hear about this himself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―　[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]メンテナンスセンター　[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]―B.B. Maintenance Center [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: —Mimeosome Maintenance Center—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 左腕の具合を確かめうなずく
fan translation: Check left arm and nod.
localized version: Check your arm and nod approvingly.

Original Japanese line: 左腕を見つめて首をかしげる
fan translation: Look at left arm and tilt head doubtfully.
localized version: Check your arm and shake your head.

Original Japanese line:
おう　このマ・ノン人達から聞いたぞ

fan translation:
Oh, I heard everything from
these Ma-non. Good work.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Welcome back. Your floppy friends here

Original Japanese line:
新入り　正義感を燃やすのはいいが

fan translation:
Newbie, it's fine to be fired up with

localized version:
Just watch yourself out there, Big Shot.
You're still new at this, and we can't afford to lose ya.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: スペアにも限りがあるんだからな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We only have so many spares to go around.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We only got so many spare parts to go around.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ユーオーケイ？

fan translation: Everything okay? Is your body alright now?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Feeling better, are we? You took a nasty hit, no?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
当たり前ですよ！
私がメンテしたんですもの！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Of course! I'm the one
who did the maintenance![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
当たり前ですよ！
私がメンテしたんですもの！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Of course! I'm the one
who did the maintenance![ST:wait ]
localized version: She'll be fine. I patched her up myself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
当たり前ですよ！
私がメンテしたんですもの！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Of course! I'm the one
who did the maintenance![ST:wait ]
localized version: He'll be fine. I patched him up myself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よかったジャン！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's great, jan![ST:wait ]
localized version: That's great, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ボク達がここで暮らせるようになったのも

fan translation:
It's thanks to you guys we could start

localized version:
We were worried sick, you know? We're still new in town,

Original Japanese line: 暮らす[ST:wide ]―　きみ達もここに住むんですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Wait[ST:wide ]― You're going to live here too, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Wait... Then Ma-non will live here, too?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その通りだ　ＮＬＡ行政府は

fan translation:
That's right. The NLA government has concluded

localized version:
Correct. The NLA government has reached an accord

Original Japanese line:
彼らの安全を保証するため

fan translation:
To guarantee their safety, we decided

localized version:
It guarantees their safety and provides them

Original Japanese line:
モーリス行政長官
話はまとまったのね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Director General Maurice, so
the talks concluded, I see.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That's great to hear, Director General.
I wasn't sure how you'd react.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　たとえ種族が異なっても

fan translation:
Yes. Even if our species are different, if

localized version:
Mmm. "We don't need to be from the same species
to be able to recognize our common ground."[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 以前　君が言った言葉だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Those were your words from before.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Someone told me that once.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 随分昔のことを覚えているのね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You remember things from a long time ago.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Heh—that was a lifetime ago.
That's quite a memory you have.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 記憶力は良い方だからな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: My memory's pretty good.[ST:wait ]
localized version: A blessing and a curse, believe me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ボク達は宇宙を旅するうち[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: While we were travelling through space[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: So you're all stuck here too, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
原因不明の航行トラブルに巻きこまれて
この惑星に辿り着いたんだヨネ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
we got caught in navigation trouble for some unknown
reason and ended up on this planet, y'know.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We were just cruising along out in space, you know?[ST:page p1=60 ]And suddenly our nav system goes all screwy
and we find ourselves here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ミー達の船には　サマールの民が持たない
技術も使われてるからねー[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Our ship uses technology even the

localized version:
Which is pretty weird, considering our tech

Original Japanese line: あいつら　それが欲しくなったんジャナイ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Maybe that's what those guys wanted, yeah?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You saw how bad they wanted it, yeah?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
サマール？

fan translation:
Samaar? Wasn't the ones

localized version: Samaar? ...I thought it was the Ganglion that attacked you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: サマールはでっかーい星間連合だよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Samaar is a huge interstellar federation, yo.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You don't know about Samaar? Seriously?
As in the interstellar federation, Samaar?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何せあいつらの居住空間は

fan translation:
Their living space is about a 6 million

localized version:
I mean, they only rule over a radius of

Original Japanese line: ６００万光年！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: 6 million light years!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Six MILLION?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それって他の銀河にも

fan translation:
Doesn't that mean they live

localized version: But...that would span multiple galaxies...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: オフコース[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Of course.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, yeah.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウスはただの犯罪結社

fan translation:
Growth is just a criminal syndicate.
Only a tiny part of Samaar, jan.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The Ganglion are a run-of-the-mill crime syndicate.
Just one tiny part of Samaar, you know?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あれでごく一部というのか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You call that a tiny part...?[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm... Just one tiny part...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
マ・ノンの皆さん　あなた方の知識を

fan translation:
Ma-non, we would appreciate it if you

localized version:
My good Ma-non—in the spirit of our agreement,

Original Japanese line:
いいよいいよ　ボク達が知ってることなら

fan translation:
Sure, sure! If it's something we

localized version:
Of course, of course! We'll tell you all we know, okay?
After all, we are friends now, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それじゃあ地球人のフレンズ

fan translation:
Well then, Earthling friends, please

localized version:
We are, right? Friends?
Earth human heroes will protect us, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: このＮＬＡでイッショに暮らす市民としてネ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: As citizens living together in NLA, okay![ST:wait ]
localized version: Because we live here now......right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: きたきた　あれがボク達の船だヨ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Here it comes! That's our ship, yo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh look, look! Here comes our little ship now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何をしている！
応戦しろ　近づけるな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What are you doing! Fight back!
Don't let them get close![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Don't just stand there! Push back!
We can't let them get close![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うわああああっ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ドール部隊でも無力だというのか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Are you saying even the
Doll Squad is powerless?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Even our Skells are powerless before them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これ以上は　兵士を無駄に

fan translation:
I think doing any more than this will

localized version:
Continuing to persist here is meaningless.

Original Japanese line:
ようやく見つけた　あの方へ通じる

fan translation:
Even though we finally found a

localized version:
After all this time, we've finally found
a clue that may lead us to the Great One...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　この惑星を取り囲む宇宙は

fan translation:
But the space surrounding this

localized version:
With respect, the phenomenon space surrounding
this planet is only 800 exedits in diameter.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
光速で三日も進めば事象空間が

fan translation:
If you travel at light speed for three days,

localized version:
Three days at light speed is

Original Japanese line:
サマール星間連合の本国もあの方もこの宇宙の

fan translation:
Isn't it possible that neither the Samaar Federation

localized version:
If the Great One or the Samaar Federation homeland were
here, don't you think we would have found something by now?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球とかいう銀河の辺境で

fan translation:
It was one thing to fight those guys in that

localized version:
It's one thing to engage the enemy all the way out

Original Japanese line:
何だかよく分からない光に包まれて

fan translation:
then we were wrapped in some weird light, and next
thing we know, we're on this primitive planet...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But then, to be swallowed up by that strange light and
dumped off here, in this primordial hellhole? Are we cursed?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おまけに地球人まで居る始末[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And to top it off, even
Earthlings are here too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And trapped with humans, of all things...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここがあの世だって言われても
あたしは信じますよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if someone told me this was

localized version:
It's like some sick joke.
If someone told me this was death, I'd believe them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だからこそだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's precisely why.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All the more reason to persist![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
事象の限界を越えるためにも
アレを手に入れなくてはならぬ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
To transcend the limits of this

localized version:
We must retrieve it if we ever hope to

Original Japanese line: ルクザール様[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Luxaar-sama.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Grandmaster Luxaar.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What is it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Speak.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 実は[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Actually[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: I bring news...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そのような者がおるのか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Such a person exists?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Really. And he can be trusted...?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 面白い[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Interesting.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Most interesting.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その献策　乗ってみるのも一興かもしれんな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It may be amusing to accept that proposal.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, a most interesting proposal, indeed...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何をしている！
応戦しろ[ST:wide ]―近づけるな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What are you doing! Fight back[ST:wide ]―
Don't let them get close![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Don't just stand there! Push back!
We can't let them get close![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―　グロウス旗艦　[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]― Growth Flagship [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: —Ganglion Flagship—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いやしかし　美味かったな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Man, that was delicious.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now THAT was a meal.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンは料理が上手だな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin, you're good at cooking.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm impressed, Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うちの奴らも見習ってほしいわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I wish my people could learn from you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: My team could learn a thing or two.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ありがとうございます！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thanks![ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm glad you liked it![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―で　何故いきなり　お茶しに来たわけ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]―So, why did you suddenly drop by for tea?[ST:wait ]
localized version: But you didn't stop by just for a meal, did you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いや　仕事の話をしに来たんだよ　もちろん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No, I came to talk about work, of course.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No—you know me, Elma. It's about a job.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何だか私の知識が必要とのことでして[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It seems my knowledge is needed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It would seem to us the good sir would like to pick our brain.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これぞ　故事に言う　馬の耳に念仏[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This is what the old saying calls
'preaching sutras to a horse's ears'![ST:wait ]
localized version: Of course, we will gladly let him in one ear and out the other![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ　そうだったんですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh? Was that it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Almost, L. Almost that time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 異星人の機動兵器が見つかった？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They found an alien mobile weapon?[ST:wait ]
localized version: An alien mech?! What type?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうだ　未知の種族のものらしくてな

fan translation:
Yeah. Looks like it belongs to an unknown
species. It's a type we've never seen before.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
No idea. It doesn't match anything on record,
as far as I can tell. No one's seen anything like it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうやら放棄されているみたいなんだが
そいつを回収したい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It seems to have been abandoned.
I want to recover it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It looks abandoned, too. Totally ripe for the picking.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それはメカニックの血が騒ぐ話ですねえ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That stirs a mechanic's blood![ST:wait ]
localized version: Ohhh, man, you're givin' me goosebumps![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だろ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 場所はここだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's located here.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's located here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
夜光の森の奥[ST:wide ]―
それでルーが呼ばれたわけね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Deep in Nightglow Forest[ST:wide ]― So
that's why Lu was called.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That's pretty deep in Noctilum...
No wonder you wanted to talk to L.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Exactly.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
気になるのは　どうもグロウスも
こいつを狙っているらしいんだが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The concern is that Growth also
seems to be after this thing.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But here's the rub—the Ganglion are after it, too.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
フロンティアネットの反応を観測する分には

fan translation:
Judging by the FrontierNet readings, they've
already failed to recover it many times.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
From what we can tell over FrontierNav,
they've gone after it several times already—and failed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そりゃそうでしょう
あの地には　私だって近づけません[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That figures. Even I can't
get close to that place.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, yes, that doesn't surprise us in the least.
That's tainted land.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何か特別な事情があるのね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There must be some special reason.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Tainted? That doesn't sound good.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい　彼の地にはプラエドが棲息しております[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes. Praedo live there.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They are savage beasts! Ferocious! Insatiable![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 原因はこいつらしい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Seems like these things are the cause.[ST:wait ]
localized version: He's talking about these.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 前に夜光の森に行った時は　見ませんでしたね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We didn't see them when we went
to Nightglow Forest before.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We didn't run into anything like that in Noctilum, did we?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ええ　この生物は森の奥深く[ST:wide ]―
ごく一部にしか棲息していません[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yes. These creatures live deep within
the forest[ST:wide ]― in only a very small area.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The tainted are territorial.

Yes. In a few minutes, not

As the old saying goes, [System:Ruby rt=Leaving no trace behind ]'A

localized version: No, ma'am![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ルーさんとタツは　お留守番ね[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おお　ご配慮いただき嬉しいです[ST:wait ]

Of course! Since I've been

Well, of course!

Original Japanese line: ももももも～～っ！！[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なるほどな[ST:wait ]

localized version: (This must be their handiwork...)[ST:wait ]

localized version: Lin, contact Commander Vandham.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さて　後は帰るだけだな[ST:wait ]

Relax, Linly. After quick lunch, Tatsu fly back home

fan translation: All the way through the forest! On foot![ST:wait ]
localized version: You won't last 10 seconds out here![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: へ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Huh?[ST:wait ]

localized version: Well, that was fun. Let's get the hell outta here.[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Ah![ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

localized version: Was that thing trying to help us?[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]

localized version: Commander? What are you doing out here?[ST:wait ]

えっ

fan translation: Okay, thank you very much, Commander Vandham![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, sir! Oh my God, thank you so much, Commander![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 外部装甲はともかく[ST:wait ]

I have no idea what material the

But I'm not detecting ANY known materials

Original Japanese line: 動力源らしきものも見あたらないですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I can't find anything that

localized version: In fact, I can't even find a power source.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:

localized version:

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
What about a cockpit? Is there

localized version: What about a cockpit? Or any space for a pilot?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Since there's a cavity in the center of the chest, maybe

localized version:
Let's see here...
There is a cavity in the middle of the chest area...[ST:page p1=120 ]If this thing is a vehicle, that'd have to be the cockpit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まあ　あんな所に放置されているくらいだ

fan translation:
Well, given that it was abandoned in a place like

localized version:
Hmm... Perhaps it's not a weapon?

Original Japanese line:

But didn't they say Growth kept

localized version:
But it was also worth the Ganglion

Original Japanese line: きっと何かあるに違いない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There must be something special about it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Surely it must hold some value.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そりゃ理屈ですな

localized version:

Original Japanese line: リン君に無理を言っても仕方ない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No point asking the impossible of Lin-kun.[ST:wait ]
localized version: but we can't expect her to work miracles.[ST:wait ]

localized version:

Ah, you don't remember, do

Ah, right, you wouldn't know what I'm talking about,

[ST:wide ]―というのが　今回の指令だ

[ST:wide ]―That is the directive this

Original Japanese line: そんなことだから[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

you end up serving the likes

fan translation: [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 分かれ道ね[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
分かったわ

Original Japanese line: ああ　そうだ　至急[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 詳細はフロンティアネットにあげておいて[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もうダウンロード可能になってます[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: チーム全員の[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]に転送します[ST:wait ]

localized version: I'll send it to everyone's comm devices.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 頼む[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あたしが[System:Ruby rt=とっかん ]吶喊[/System:Ruby]する[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Concern

Original Japanese line:
でも　敵は多かったですけど
何か変じゃなかったですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There were a lot of enemies,
but didn't something seem off?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Sorry, ma'am—you're right...
Though it does feel a bit odd, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
本気じゃないというか
弱すぎるというか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Like they weren't really trying,
or maybe they were too weak[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: There were so many of them, but they barely put up a fight.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私もそれは妙に思っていた[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I thought that was strange too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: My thoughts exactly...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですね　数は多かったですけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's right. There were
so many of them, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right? There were so many of them...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 確かに　手応えがなさ過ぎる[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They barely put up a fight...[ST:wait ]
localized version: But they barely put up a fight...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 主力は別にいる[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The main force must be somewhere else.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Could this have been a diversion?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
先行したイリーナ達が心配だわ
急いで追いましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I'm worried about Iriina's team up
ahead. Let's hurry after them![ST:wait ]
localized version:
We need to catch up with Irina's team
before it's too late. Let's move![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ガッツポーズでドヤ顔をする
fan translation: Strike a victory pose with a smug look.
localized version: Remark how strong your team has become.

Original Japanese line: 敵が弱すぎた違和感を伝える
fan translation: Express unease that the enemy was too weak.
localized version: Express concern that it felt too easy.

Original Japanese line: グインさん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Gwin-san.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Gwin![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
リンちゃん　もう来たの？
あれだけの大群だったのに？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lin-chan, you're already here? Even
after fighting such a huge horde?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Whoa—that was fast.
And you were so outnumbered and everything![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: タツのチームをなめないでほしいですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Don't underestimate Tatsu's team, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Nothing can stop Team Tatsu![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あんなやつら朝飯まえですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Guys like that are easy work, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu eat baddies like them for breakfast![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 朝飯にしちゃうよ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll make breakfast out of you[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Says tomorrow's breakfast.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマ大佐
来援　ありがとうございました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel Elma, thank you for the backup.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Colonel! Ma'am! Well done out there![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お互い様よ
それよりもイリーナとマーカスは？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Likewise. More importantly,
where are Iriina and Marcus?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Likewise. Now—what happened to Irina and Marcus?
Where are they?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あそこのライフの近くにいますけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: They're near the Life over there, but[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: They're up checking on the Lifehold unit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここにいるのはあなた達だけ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Are you the only ones here?[ST:wait ]
localized version: And you've had no sign of hostiles?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: No, dead quiet.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おかしいわね
主力は別にいると思っていたけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Strange. I thought the main
force was somewhere else.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm, okay... It just felt so much like a...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Could it be[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: A trap![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
イリーナ　マーカス
逃げて！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Iriina! Marcus! Run!![ST:wait ]
localized version: Irina! Marcus! RUN![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えっ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Huh!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: マーカス！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Marcus![ST:wait ]
localized version: Marcus![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right![ST:wait ]
localized version: Right![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あ～ら　残念
原始種族はカンが鋭いのかしら[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Aww, too bad. I wonder if primitive
species have sharp intuition?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ohh, what a shame. You didn't fall for my little surprise?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その声　夜光の森の時の！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That voice... The woman
from Nightglow Forest![ST:wait ]
localized version: That voice... The woman from Noctilum?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 主力は別にいると思っていたけど　案の定ね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The main force was somewhere
else... just as I suspected.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I knew they had to be holding back
their big guns for something. And here it is.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なぁるほど　まあいいわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I see... Oh well.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, aren't you the clever one.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
貴様らはこの機体で
踏みつぶしてやればよいのだから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I just need to crush you
bastards with this unit.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What you just saw was only a prelude.
An amusement, if you will.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達を罠にはめるためにライフを[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You used the Life to lure us into a trap...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Blowing up our Lifehold...amuses you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 罠ってのとはちょーっと違うわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's a little different from a trap.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, perhaps "amusement" is not quite the word.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あたしの目的は　それその顔[ST:wait ]
fan translation: My goal is... those faces right there.[ST:wait ]
localized version: More like, a deep satisfaction.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そんな風に絶望にゆがんだ
地球人の顔を見たいがためさね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I want to see Earthlings' faces
twisted in despair like that.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Like, curing an illness. Or scrubbing an ugly stain clean.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 目障りだからねぇ　地球人は[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Earthlings are an eyesore, you see.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The stain of humanity.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
もっともぉ　本当に目障りなのは
生身の地球人なんだけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Though what's truly an eyesore are
the flesh-and-blood Earthlings.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Of course, the true pleasure will come
from watching your real bodies burn...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ま　貴様らみたいな作り物の機械人形でもね
ついでにぶち壊してやったら楽しいからね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well, even destroying manufactured puppets
like you is fun, so I'll do it anyway.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Not that I won't enjoy trashing these crude puppets of yours.
It'll certainly be enough to tide me over for the time being...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それだけさ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's all![ST:wait ]
localized version: Till the real fun begins.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あんた　[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]のこともライフのことも[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You know about B.B.s and the Life[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: Then they know about the Lifehold and mims...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
知ってるさ
ちょいと事情通がいるんでねぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I know. Because I've got someone
quite well-informed working with me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You primate. We know all about your kind.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だから地球人が焦る理由も分かってるんだよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's why I also understand
why Earthlings are panicking.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Your fool's errand to gather these trinkets.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 稼働時間にリミットがあるんだろう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There's a limit to the
operational time, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Your race against time...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフとやらの稼働限界[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The operational limit of this so-called Life.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Human extinction is inevitable.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そいつを待てば貴様らは
皆　動けなくなってしまうわけだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If I wait for that, you bastards
will all be unable to move.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I could simply wait for the clock to run out,
but where's the fun in that?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 本当はそれを待ってもいいんだけどねぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Truthfully, I could just
wait for that, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: I much prefer to see the looks on your faces.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　地球人の目の前で
そいつをぶち壊してやるのも楽し[ST:wide ]―ッ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
smashing that thing right in front of
you Earthlings would also be fu[ST:wide ]―![ST:wait ]
localized version: How your features melt in fear as you twist in agony and—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 黙りなさい　サマールの蛮族よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Be silent, barbarian of Samaar![ST:wait ]
localized version: That's enough—you Samaarian witch![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなた達の傲慢さが
宇宙に多くの悲劇を起こすこととなった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Your arrogance has caused many
tragedies throughout the universe.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Enough of your talk...
Enough of the pain you've caused the universe.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あの悲劇を　もう繰り返させはしない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I won't let that tragedy repeat itself.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The only agony...would be suffering you any longer.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あんた　地球人のくせに
何を知ってるっていうのさ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You're just an Earthling. What
could you possibly know?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, please. What would a mere human know of our history?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あいつを斃す[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Take her down.[ST:wait ]
localized version: She is mine.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナチームは周りのドールを[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Iriina's team, handle the surrounding Dolls![ST:wait ]
localized version: Irina—your team has the others.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right![ST:wait ]
localized version: Right![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ大佐[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel Elma.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I just...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あの異星人達　何だってあそこまで
地球人を憎んでるんでしょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Why do they hate Earthlings so much?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Why would these aliens...be THIS determined to destroy us?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼らの中に　単なる憎しみを超えた
何かがあることだけは確かね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's certain that something more
than simple hatred is driving them.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Honestly? If I had to venture a guess...
I'd say they're afraid.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 自らの生存を脅かされるような何かが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Something like a threat
to their own survival.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They fear humans... They feel threatened.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あたしらだって好きで
宇宙に出てきたわけじゃない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's not like we came out
into space by choice either.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We threaten them? WE didn't blow up their planet![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
地球を失って[ST:wide ]―
それで　こんな星まで来たのに[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We lost Earth[ST:wide ]― and even after coming
all the way to a planet like this[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version:
WE didn't hunt them halfway across the galaxy
to wipe out their whole goddamn species![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナ中尉[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lieutenant Iriina...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lieutenant...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ごめん　つい思い出しちゃったよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Sorry, I just remembered.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm sorry, it just...brings back a lot of emotions.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もう平気　行こう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm fine now. Let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'll be fine. Let's go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あ　はい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Oh, right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: If you say so.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマ大佐
こちらは先にＮＬＡへ帰還します[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel Elma, we'll head back to NLA first.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Colonel, with your permission,
my team will report back to the city.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ミッションへの支援　感謝いたします[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thank you for supporting the mission.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I can't thank you enough for your support.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナさん[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Iriina-san[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
localized version: What was that about?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
イリーナには弟がいたのよ
グインの親友でもあった弟が[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Iriina had a younger brother who
was also Gwin's best friend.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Irina had a younger brother...
He was best friends with Gwin, actually.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼は白鯨に乗れなかった
地球と運命を共にしたの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
He couldn't get on the White
Whale. He shared Earth's fate.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But he...he didn't make it onto the White Whale.
We lost him when we lost Earth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よくある話[ST:wide ]―
で　すませたくはないけどそれが現実[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I don't want to dismiss it as a
common story[ST:wide ]― but that's reality.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Everyone's got a story like that...
not that it makes it any easier.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴァンダム司令　ただいま帰還しました！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Commander Vandham, we've just returned![ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander—we located the Lifehold, but...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イリーナもさっき報告に来た[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Iriina already came by to report.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah—Irina already briefed me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全員無傷で帰還とは　さすがだな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Impressive. All of you made it back unharmed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm just glad you all got back here safe 'n' sound.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも　データベースユニットが破壊された[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But the Database Unit was destroyed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Wish we could say the same for that Archive unit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これでまた一つ
地球の遺産が失われてしまったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And with that, another piece
of Earth's heritage is lost.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Another swath of Earth's legacy... It's irreplaceable.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 残念だが　クルーを失うよりマシだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's unfortunate, but better
than losing crew members.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, well, so are all of you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よし　飯行くか
俺のおごりだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Alright, let's go eat. My treat.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So cheer up, huh? C'mon, let's get you guys fed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今回はお前らに世話になったからな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You all helped me out this time.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Dinner is on me this time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 珍しいわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's unusual.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay, this is weird.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 珍しいですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Really unusual.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Very weird.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 珍しいですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Indeed unusual, mo.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu is suspicious![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ぐっ[ST:wide ]―　お前ら揃いも揃って[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ngh[ST:wide ]― The three of you, all at once...[ST:wait ]
localized version: What, a commander can't treat his troops?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　本当にお礼なんて
らしくないこと言わないで[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But really, don't say things like
"thanks." It's not like you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: If you're trying to thank us for this job, there's really no need.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここは未知の星[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But this is an unknown planet.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This time it was Irina's team.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達もいつイリーナ達と同じようなことに
なるか分からないんだから[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We never know when we might end up in
the same situation as Iriina's team.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Next time it could be my team;
any BLADE would do the same for us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そりゃそうだが[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, true, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay, fair enough.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンさんのご飯が一番ですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-san's cooking is the best, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Besides, Linly cooks best![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: タツ　いいこというね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Tatsu, good point![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey—thanks, Tatsu![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今日は　特別にデザートつけちゃう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Today, I'll add dessert specially for you![ST:wait ]
localized version: Just for that, I'll make you some dessert, today.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もももも～！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Mo-mo-mo-mo-mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh-ho-ho-hooo![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だそうよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: See?[ST:wait ]
localized version: There you go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンの料理にはさすがに勝てないな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I guess I can't compete with Lin's cooking.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The spud's right—no one cooks like Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴァンダム司令も食べに来てくださいね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Commander Vandham, please come eat too![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Thanks, Commander!
If you wanted to join us, maybe I could—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おう　分かった[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, got it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Great, let's eat![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 揚げもの
fan translation: Deep-fried food
localized version: Something Fried

Original Japanese line: 煮込み
fan translation: Simmered food
localized version: Something Braised

Original Japanese line: 包み焼き
fan translation: Wrapped roast
localized version: Something Baked

Original Japanese line: 漬け焼き
fan translation: Marinated grill
localized version: Something Broiled

Original Japanese line: 炒めもの
fan translation: Stir-fry
localized version: Something Stir-Fried

Original Japanese line: 珍味
fan translation: Delicacy
localized version: Something Fancy

Original Japanese line: 今日は何を作ろうかな～[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What should I make today~[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm, what am I in the mood to make?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それいいですね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's a good idea![ST:wait ]
localized version: Now that is a good idea![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: フライドチキン
fan translation: Fried chicken
localized version: Suggest fried chicken.

Original Japanese line: お肉のワイン煮
fan translation: Meat simmered in wine
localized version: Suggest beef braised in wine.

Original Japanese line: ミートパイ
fan translation: Meat pie
localized version: Suggest pot pie.

Original Japanese line: タンドリーチキン
fan translation: Tandoori chicken
localized version: Suggest tandoori chicken.

Original Japanese line: チキンソテー
fan translation: Chicken sauté
localized version: Suggest chicken sauté.

Original Japanese line: フォアグラ
fan translation: Foie gras
localized version: Suggest foie gras.

Original Japanese line:
リンさん　リンさん
なにを作ってるんですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-san! Lin-san! What are you making, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Linly! Linly! What is Linly making?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＮＬＡ防衛を指揮するナギ・ケンタロウだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I am Nagi Kentarou, commander
of NLA's defense forces.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Citizens of NLA, this is Secretary Nagi.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここには　白鯨時代に俺の部下だった者も多い
俺が嘘が苦手なことは知っているだろう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Many of you here served under me back on the
White Whale. You know I'm no good at lying.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Those of you that have served under me—here,
or on the White Whale—know I'm not one to mince words.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だから事実だけを告げよう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: So I will tell you only the facts.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So I'll get right to the point:[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 非常事態だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is a state of emergency.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We are at war.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
現在　このＮＬＡにグロウスと呼ばれる
異星人結社の大部隊が迫っている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
A large force from the alien syndicate known
as Growth is currently approaching NLA.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Even now, the hostile alien force known as
the Ganglion is marching on New Los Angeles.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ドール級の陸戦兵器に加えて
未確認の大型飛行兵器も観測されている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We know they have Doll-class ground weapons, and reports
confirm unidentified large flying weapons as well.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We know they possess Skell-class ground-based units,
and we have reports of unidentified flying weaponry as well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: こちらからの交渉要請にも応じる様子はない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They show no sign of responding
to our calls for negotiation.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Director General Chausson is attempting to open a dialogue,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
モーリス行政長官は
対話への努力を続けているが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Director General Maurice continues
to pursue dialogue, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
but our enemy has shown no signs
of being open to negotiation.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺としては武力による防衛の準備を
進めなくてはならん[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As for me, I must proceed with
preparations for armed defense.[ST:wait ]
localized version: In light of all this, it is my duty to prepare us all for the worst.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

That is why I have gathered

However, NLA is no longer

Original Japanese line: 彼らは　戦闘兵器をもたん[ST:wait ]

localized version: This is a temporary measure.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だがそれでもこのＮＬＡのため[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But even so, for NLA's sake,[ST:wait ]
localized version: But also, a very good example...[ST:wait ]

いや　我々地球人のために

fan translation:
no... for the sake of us Earthlings, they

localized version:
of how we all—human and xenoform alike—

Original Japanese line: ここで我々がやらないでどうする[ST:wait ]

localized version: For those of us who will fight,[ST:wait ]

If any of you lose your B.B. in this battle, I

localized version:

Original Japanese line: 諸君[ST:wait ]

localized version: Troops...[ST:wait ]

localized version:
A trying battle awaits us, but we MUST repel

Original Japanese line: 頼む[ST:wait ]

localized version: We're counting on you.[ST:wait ]

localized version: Shake Your Head

localized version:

I'd love it if Chausson could negotiate

They treat Earthlings like

So that means they're counting

remember, we're a team.

localized version: Oh, you too now?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ大佐　奴らにしてやられましたね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Colonel Elma, they really did
a number on us, didn't they?[ST:wait ]
localized version: So, Colonel—we lost the alien Skell...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でもあれ　奴らにとっての神像って話でしょ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But isn't that supposed to be
like a god statue to them?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, last I heard we weren't even sure what it was.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 神像の一体や二体取られたからって[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Just because one or two
god statues were taken...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Doesn't seem like much of a loss to me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だといいのだけれど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If only it were that simple[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: If only it were that simple...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 大佐？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ma'am?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
とにかく　グロウスの狙いが
