fan translation:
Anyway, whatever the Growth's
objective was, it doesn't matter.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The important thing is,
we managed to repel the invasion force.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達の任務はＮＬＡを防衛すること
そして　それは果たされた[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Our mission was to defend NLA.
And that was accomplished.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We're still alive, and NLA's still standing.
I'll take that as a victory.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 確かに[ST:wait ]
fan translation: True.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hell yeah.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマ大佐の言う通りっすよ
僕達　勝ったんだ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel Elma's right! We won![ST:wait ]
localized version: The Colonel's right—we did good here today. We won.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうか　そうですよね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I see. You're right.
localized version: Yeah... Yeah, you're right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それじゃ　みんなでヴァンダム司令に
報告に行きましょうか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well then, shall we all go report
to Commander Vandham together?[ST:wait ]
localized version: So hey, why don't we all go report back to HQ together?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　そうしよう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, let's do that.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Sure—sounds good.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
悪いけどイリーナ達だけ
先に行ってもらってもいいかしら？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Sorry, but could you and
Gwin go on ahead, Iriina?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Actually—Irina, you guys should go on ahead.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 格納庫の様子が気になってね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm concerned about the state of the hangar.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I have an errand to run with my team first.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 分かりました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Roger that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
では　私達は任務の報告に行きます
失礼します[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Then we'll go report on
the mission. Excuse us.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then we'll see you back at headquarters in a bit.
Colonel.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達は格納庫に向かいましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's head to the hangar.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's go check out the hangar.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right![ST:wait ]
localized version: Right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: イケメンの最新型を勧める
fan translation: Recommend the latest "handsome" model.
localized version: Suggest he gets the latest "young and rugged" model.

Original Japanese line: モデル体型の最新型を勧める
fan translation: Recommend the latest "model physique" type.
localized version: Suggest he gets the latest "hip and fashionable" model.

Original Japanese line: ちくしょうッ　アイツら赦せない！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Damn it! I won't forgive them![ST:wait ]
localized version: Stupid worms. I'll kill every last one of them.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 赦せない赦せない！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Unforgivable![ST:wait ]
localized version: EVERY! LAST! ONE OF THEM![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: アタシの手で殺してやるんだからッ！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll kill them with my own hands!![ST:wait ]
localized version: I'll kill them with my own bare hands if I have to![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
すまねぇ　俺達が持ち場を離れた隙に
まんまと奪われちまった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Sorry... While we were
away, they snatched it.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
There's no excuse. This wouldn't have happened
if I didn't order my men to leave their posts.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 街に侵入されたんだし　仕方ないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The city was invaded. It couldn't be helped.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You were just trying to help. It's okay.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 被害が少なかっただけよかったと思いましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's just be glad the damage wasn't worse.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We should count ourselves lucky
we ended up with so few casualties.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まあ　そうだな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, I guess so.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Sorry to break up the love-in.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: しかし[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But still[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: But you know...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
奴ら　あのドールになんだって
そこまでこだわってたんだ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Why were they so fixated
on that Doll, anyway?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
There must be SOMETHING to that Skell
if they were this worried about it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さあ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Who knows[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: I wonder.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼らは何故あの機体が
私達に回収されていることを[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
(Why did they know that we
had recovered that unit?)[ST:wait ]
localized version: (The bigger question is how they even knew we had it...)[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そしてここに保管されていたことを
知っていたのだろう[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
(And how did they know it
was being stored here...?)[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: (And how did they know exactly where we were keeping it...)[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: (No way...)[ST:wait ]
localized version: (No way...)[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おお　あの方をお迎えする器が
今　我がもとに！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ohh! The vessel to welcome the
Great One is now in my possession![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeees—at last. The Great One's divine vessel is mine.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうか　どうかこの惑星に降誕し
私をお導きくださいませ[ST:wide ]―！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Please, please descend onto this
planet and guide me, I beseech you[ST:wide ]—!![ST:wait ]
localized version:
I beg you, oh Great One! Descend to this
humble planet and guide me! I am yours to command![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いやぁ　美味いメシだったぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ahhh, that was a damn good meal.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ahhh, now THAT hit the spot.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よかった　誰か来ると思って
作りすぎちゃったので助かりました！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Good! I thought someone might come,
so I made too much. You saved me![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Glad you enjoyed it, sir. I figured someone might
show up unannounced, so I made a little extra this time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おう　じゃあ次から残ったら出前してくれや[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yeah? Then next time you have
leftovers, deliver 'em![ST:wait ]
localized version: Great! Then I'll just show up for random meals as I please.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なんですか　それ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What are you talking about?![ST:wait ]
localized version: That's...not what I meant.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今日はな　いい報告がある[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Got some good news for you today.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay, good news first:[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: また見つかったぞ　ライフポイントがな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Another Life Point's been found.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Some Pathfinders detected another piece of the Lifehold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 本当ですか！？　やったぁ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Really!? Yay![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yesss! Is it the core?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よかったですも～
ホントよかったですも～！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's great, mo~! Really great, mo~![ST:wait ]
localized version: Woo-hoo! Tatsu do Dance of Discovery![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今回の任務は　そのライフポイントに
向かい先行調査をしてもらう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Your mission this time is to head to that Life
Point and conduct an advance investigation.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We don't know what it is—
which is why we need you to check it out ASAP.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
座標エリアはＮＬＡの北方
通称　白樹の大陸だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The coordinate area is north of NLA,
in the place known as White Woods.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The coordinates we have for it are
up north of New LA, in Sylvalum.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　白樹の大陸って
直近の予備調査の結果では[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Wait—White Woods? According to the results
of the latest preliminary survey,[ST:wait ]
localized version: One sec—Sylvalum? Correct me if I'm wrong, but uhhh...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウスの勢力範囲の可能性が高いって
出てましたけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
there's a high chance it's within
Growth's sphere of influence...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Didn't we just detect signs of a Ganglion presence there?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その通りだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's the bad news.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だからこそ　戦闘力の高いチームに
引き受けてもらいてぇ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's exactly why I want a team with
high combat strength to take it on.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Which is why I'm only asking
our top combat units to take this on.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解したわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Understood.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
誰かがやらなければならないことね
すぐにとりかかる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Someone has to do it. We'll
get started immediately.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Consider it done, Commander.
We'll get started immediately.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すまねぇ　助かるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Sorry about this. I appreciate it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Was hoping you'd say that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
実は先行隊としてすでに
ラオのチームが向かってる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Actually, Lao's team is already
heading there as the advance party.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I talked to Lao's team as well, by the way.
They're already en route.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここで奴らと合流してくれ
頼んだぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Rendezvous with them here.
I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You'll rendezvous with them here. Good luck.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
稼働時間も半分を切った
これが本命だとありがたいんだがな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Our operating time has also fallen below half.
I'd be grateful if this is the real one.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I just pray this is the piece we need.
There's not much time left...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさん！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao-san!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lao![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hey...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そんな[ST:wide ]―
ラオさんのチームの人たちはみんな[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
No[ST:wide ]— Everyone on Lao-san's
team... they're all[ST:wide ]—?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You can't be serious...
Your entire team? ...Gone?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　グロウスの奴らの手にかかってな

fan translation:
Yeah... the Growth got
them. It was my mistake.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Dead. Killed by Ganglion. And it's all my fault.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達がもっと早く到着していれば[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If only we'd arrived sooner...[ST:wait ]
localized version: If only we'd gotten here sooner.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あいつらはやられずにすんだってか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You think they would've made it?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What, you think you could have stopped it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 別にいいじゃねぇか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Either way, what does it matter?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What's it matter, anyway?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ライフを見つけたら好きなだけ
蘇ってこられるんだからよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once we find the Life, they can come
back as many times as they want, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We can just bring them all back
once we find the Lifehold, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさん[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao-san[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey, Lao...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 幸運だよな　俺達は[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We're lucky, aren't we?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Look at us, the chosen few.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
人類の大部分は　地球と共に

fan translation:
Even though most of humanity
disappeared along with Earth...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
All those people we left on Earth...
They never had a chance.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺達は何度でも復活できる身体を手に入れて
のうのうと生きている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We got bodies that can revive over and
over, and here we are, living carefree.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But us? We can be reborn.
We get as many damn chances as we want.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
セントラルライフを確保できなければ
その幸運も全て無意味になるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If we can't secure the Central Life,
that luck will all become meaningless.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
IF we find the core.
Without that, there's no chance—for any of us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
もういいわ　ラオ

fan translation: Enough, Lao. Getting you treated comes first.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Look, we can talk later—for now,
we need to get you back to the city.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達と一緒に　一度ＮＬＡに戻りましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Come back to NLA with us for now.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's regroup there so we can get you patched up.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いや　駄目だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No, I can't.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No way.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウスに本命を渡すことになったら
取り返しがつかない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If the Growth get their hands on
the real one, we can't undo that.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What if it turns out to be the core
and the Ganglion get to it first?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あんた達は先を急いでくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You need to hurry on ahead.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You can't let that happen.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさんを置いてなんて行けません！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We can't just leave you behind, Lao-san![ST:wait ]
localized version: We can't just leave you here, Lao![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
心配しなさんな
テスタメントの奴らにでも拾ってもらうさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Don't worry. I'll have the Testament
guys pick me up or something.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You can and you will.
I'll be fine until the Reclaimers can get here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Still...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフの座標を転送した[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I've transferred the Life coordinates.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm sending you all the intel we have.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここから北の方角だ
悪いが　よろしく頼む[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's north of here. Sorry,
but I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's further north from here.
Sorry I can't help—it's up to you now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解したわ　引き受ける[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood. We'll handle it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Don't worry—we can handle it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
急ぎましょう　グロウスに見つかる前に
任務をすませてしまいたい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's hurry. I want to finish the
mission before Growth finds us.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Let's get moving. With luck, we can secure
the Lifehold before the Ganglion know we're here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この先はグロウスが多くて危険だ
君はどこかで待っていた方がいいんじゃないか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's dangerous ahead, with many Growth around.
Wouldn't it be better if you waited somewhere?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Maybe you should sit this one out.
The place is crawling with Ganglion.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ありがとうございます[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thank you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's why I'm going.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Exactly why.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私　エルマさん達と一緒に行きますね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm going with Elma-san and everyone.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm part of a team, and we have a job to do.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この先が危険なエリアなら
それこそ　いつも以上にがんばらなきゃ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If the area ahead is dangerous, that's all the
more reason I need to try harder than ever![ST:wait ]
localized version:
If it's going to be dangerous,
that's all the more reason for us to stick together.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私　もっとみんなの役に立ちたいんです！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I want to be more useful to everyone![ST:wait ]
localized version: And I'm a lot more capable than you think, Lao.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
心配してくださって
ありがとうございます！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Thank you for worrying about me![ST:wait ]
localized version:
But I know you're trying to look out for me.
And I appreciate it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あいつらだって　[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]を失うだけだ
死ぬわけじゃない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They only lose their B.B.s. It's
not like they actually die.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's not like they'll be killed...
They'll just lose their mims, is all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 気にすることはないんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No need to worry about it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: What's it matter, anyway...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 警戒
fan translation: Be Wary
localized version: Refuse

Original Japanese line: ここが　ライフポイント？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is the Life Point location?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Is this the spot? That's weird.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なんにも無いですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There's nothing here, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu don't see anything.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リン　もう一度座標の確認をお願い[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin, please double-check the coordinates.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lin, go ahead and double-check the coordinates, would you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: は　はい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: R-Right![ST:wait ]
localized version: R-right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何かしら　この違和感[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What is this... strange feeling...?[ST:wait ]
localized version: (I have a bad feeling about this...)[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No way...![ST:wait ]
localized version: Don't tell me—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san![ST:wait ]
localized version: Elma![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
未確認の熱源反応が多数
囲まれてます！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Multiple unidentified heat
signatures! We're surrounded![ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'm picking up multiple incoming heat signatures.
We're surrounded![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これは　罠[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is... a trap...[ST:wait ]
localized version: I knew it... We've been tricked![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 武装解除せよ　地球人[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Disarm, Earthlings![ST:wait ]
localized version: Lower your weapons, humans.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 見たことのない種族[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A species I haven't seen before...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Haven't seen this species before...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お犬さんですも！
ワンワンも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's doggies, mo! Woof woof, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Look at cute kitty! Here, kitty kitty![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ち　違うでしょ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Th-They're not![ST:wait ]
localized version: Shut up! They'll hear![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
我らラースの民を見るのは
初めてのようだな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It seems this is your first time
seeing us, the people of Lars.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Your first time laying eyes on the proud people of Wroth?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 地球人よ　貴公達は完全に包囲されている[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Earthlings. You are completely surrounded.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Surrender, humans. We have you surrounded.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
武器を捨てて　おとなしく投降するがよい
誇りある武人としての待遇を約するとしよう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lay down your weapons and surrender quietly. We
promise to treat you as proud warriors deserve.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If you put away your weapons and comply, you will be
treated with the respect that warriors of your caliber deserve.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 皆　この状況で抵抗は無意味よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Everyone, resistance is
meaningless in this situation.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Do as they say, everyone—we don't have a choice.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ルクザールめ
お膳立てを整えてくれておいたというわけか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
(That damn Luxaar... So he set

localized version:

Original Japanese line: ダグ　あなたも来てたのね[ST:wait ]

localized version:

localized version: Lao suggested we go after it. He even planned the mission.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そして　グロウスは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

fan translation:

localized version:
and the Ganglion know exactly where it is when they

Oh boy...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
This time too, we followed his information

localized version:

Original Japanese line: グロウスの部隊に待ち伏せされた[ST:wait ]

localized version: Turned out to be a Ganglion ambush.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオ　彼はおそらく[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

Even so, it's also a fact that he's

Original Japanese line: あいつの口から[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: from his own mouth[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私もよ[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうか　そいつはありがてぇ[ST:wait ]

He's not the type to sell out

Original Japanese line:
分かったわ

Original Japanese line: そして[ST:wide ]―　あなたが信じている人を[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ありがたい　感謝する[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ゆっくりとうなずく

Original Japanese line: 大きく首を左右に振る
fan translation: Shake your head strongly.
localized version: Show you still trust Lao.

Original Japanese line: いやぁ　いつ食ってもリンの料理はうまいな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ahh, Lin's cooking is delicious

localized version:
Man oh man, Lin,

Original Japanese line: 下ごしらえバッチリですから！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's because the prep work is perfect![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さて　今回の任務だが[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Alright, about this mission...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right, let's get started.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その前に　話さなけりゃならんことが二点ある[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Before that, there are two

localized version: Well, before that, I need to clear something up.[ST:wait ]
Commander?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まず一点目[ST:wait ]
fan translation: First.[ST:wait ]

例の件を受けて　パスファインダー周辺の

Original Japanese line: それって[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You mean[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: つまり犯人が[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Then that means the culprit is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ももも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Mo mo mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Scary Vandham-san is

localized version: Tatsu like muscle man better when he angry and yelling.[ST:wait ]

Tatsu has a point, though.

Original Japanese line: あなたもそう思うでしょう？[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　よろしく頼む[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　私もそう思っていたの[ST:wait ]

localized version: Yeah. I've been thinking the same thing.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まず間違いないでしょうね[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 謝罪は不要だと手を振る

localized version: Tell Elma a simple apology isn't enough.

Original Japanese line: 地球人メ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―　グロウス兵器格納庫　[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Supreme Commander Luxaar![ST:wait ]
localized version: Grandmaster, sir![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ありがとうございます！[ST:wait ]

localized version: All in a day's work.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ただ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: However[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: One thing:[ST:wait ]

Tatsu will be an old Nopon

Original Japanese line:
ううん　そうじゃないよ
今回は　私が直したけど[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
No, no, that's not it. I fixed
this one manually, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Simmer down, potato skin—it's not that bad.
I fixed this one manually,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これ以外のプローブは　修正したプログラムを
転送するだけで直るんだよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The other probes can be fixed just by
transferring the corrected program.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
but now I can upload that patch and fix
all the other probes throughout the network at once.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よくわかりませんが　安心しましたですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Tatsu doesn't really understand,
but I'm relieved, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Whew! Whatever Linly talking about, Tatsu believe her![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この星のプローブの数
いっぱい　いーっぱいありますも[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There are lots and loooots of
probes on this planet, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu do Dance of Relief not to fix soooooo many probes![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうだよね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, that's true.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これまでいくつものプローブを
打ち込んでがんばってきたよね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We've worked so hard launching
all those probes, haven't we?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We have planted a lot of them, haven't we?
And really, what's it gotten us?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンさん？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-san?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmmm?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達だけじゃない
たくさんのチームが作業を続けてます[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's not just us. Plenty of teams
are still keeping up the work.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Not just us, everyone—all of BLADE. All of NLA.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　いくらフロンティアネットが広がっても
セントラルライフはみつからない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But no matter how far FrontierNet expands,
we still can't find the Central Life.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We spent all this time on FrontierNav, you know?
What if we never find the core?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どうしてなんですか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Why is that?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Then what do we do?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
もしかしたら　私達が探してるものは
この星の上にないんじゃ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Maybe the thing we're looking
for isn't even on this planet[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We've searched all over this planet looking for
the Lifehold Core—what if it's not even here?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ううん
地上に落ちた時に壊れてしまったのかも[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Or maybe... it broke when
it fell to the surface[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What if...the whole thing smashed to bits
when it crashed down?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんなはずはないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's impossible.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You know that's not possible.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But![ST:wait ]
localized version: Do I?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私達の[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]を動かしている意識は
この身体の中にあるわけじゃない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The consciousness that moves our
B.B.s isn't inside these bodies.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Our consciousnesses aren't here—
they're controlling these mims remotely from the core.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: セントラルライフにある[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's in the Central Life.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It can't have been destroyed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
当然　通信のラグを感じさせない距離で
健在だということになるわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Naturally, that means it's intact, and close
enough for us not to feel any communication lag.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
In fact, it has to be somewhere relatively close,
or we would feel the lag.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですよね[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You're right[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: You're right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ごめんなさい[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm sorry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I...just...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いいのよ　疲れて当然だわ
見知らぬ星に流れ着いて[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's okay. Of course you're tired,

localized version:
It's okay, Lin. I know you're tired.
It's been a long couple of months.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ずっと[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]で生きていかなくては
ならなくて　大人だって疲れる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even adults get tired from having
to keep living in a B.B...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Being inside these mims takes its toll on all of us—
it's only natural to feel like this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 今日まで耐えてきたあなたは偉いわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You've done well, enduring
it all the way to today.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But I promise—it's going to be all right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]をデザインした人って
何を考えてたんでしょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I wonder what the person who
designed the B.B. was thinking.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What were they thinking when they
designed these things anyway...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なにか困ったことでもあるんですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Is something wrong, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm? What Linly mean?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
だって[ST:wide ]―　こんないっぱい涙流せるように
しなくてもいいのに[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Because[ST:wide ]— they didn't have to make
me able to shed this many tears.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
These mims—why would you make an
artificial body that can cry tears?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 恥ずかしいよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's embarrassing.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So embarrassing...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
涙は必要なものよ
洗い流すという大事な機能[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Tears are necessary. They serve the
important function of washing things away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, lots of reasons. Tears lubricate the eyes...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 目に入ったゴミや埃を[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Like dirt and dust that get in your eyes...[ST:wait ]
localized version: They flush out dust and debris...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そして　心の中にたまったものもね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And the things that build
up in your heart, too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And unwanted feelings, too. You feel better, don't you?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よくできてるんですね
人の身体も[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]も[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
They're well made, aren't they?
Both human bodies and B.B.s.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I guess those mim makers knew what they were doing after all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いつかデザイナーに会えたら
お礼を言うといいわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If you ever meet the designers,
you should thank them.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, if I ever see them, I'll be sure to tell them you said so.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right![ST:wait ]
localized version: Thanks.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: な　なんですも　この音は？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Wh-What's that sound, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Hmm? ...Friends hear that?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 畏怖
fan translation: Show Fear
localized version: Give Up

Original Japanese line: なんですも　あれ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What's that, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: There—what is it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさか[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No way[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lin?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
動体接近警報
こんな大質量物体が！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Moving object approach warning!
An object with that much mass!?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Incoming mobile target...
It's really, really big...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 大きいですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's huge, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Bigger than caravan big![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ノポンの伝説の聖地
サイハテ村よりも大きいですも！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's bigger than the Nopon's legendary
sacred place, Frontier Village, mo!![ST:wait ]
localized version: Bigger than even legendary Frontier Village big![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 地球規格のＩＦＦ発信は行われていない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's not transmitting an
Earth-standard IFF signal.[ST:wait ]
localized version: If its transponders aren't responding to our IFF signal...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 敵性物体とみなす　退避して[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Consider it hostile. Take cover![ST:wait ]
localized version: we have to assume it's hostile! Take cover![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: こんな場所で再会するなんてねェ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Fancy meeting you in a place like this![ST:wait ]
localized version: Well well well, what do we have here?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
街を灼く前にこの間のお礼を

fan translation:
Before I burn the city, how about
I pay you back properly, eh?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
A little appetizer of sorts before
we hit the city for the main course?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あれだけの巨体　殲滅兵器と見て間違いないわ

fan translation:
With a frame that huge, it's definitely an

localized version:
Wait—something that size, on that course...
It must be targeting NLA.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あいつにＮＬＡを灼かせるわけにはいかない

fan translation:
We can't let it burn NLA.
Everyone, we'll stop it here![ST:wait ]
localized version:
We can't let it get anywhere near the city.
We have to put a stop to it here![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたなら　そう言ってくれると思ってたわ

fan translation:
I thought you'd say that.
I'm counting on you.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I figured you'd say as much.
Remember, the entire city is counting on us![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私たちで護りましょう　ＮＬＡを！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's protect NLA ourselves![ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's knock this big piece of junk right outta the sky![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
もう逃げ場なんてないですよ！
戦いましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There's nowhere to run anymore! Let's fight![ST:wait ]
localized version: Run? Where you planning to go? We have to fight![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私達が護るのよ　ＮＬＡを[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We're the ones who will protect NLA.[ST:wait ]
localized version: She's right. We have to protect the city. Let's go![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
アイツらけなげだネェ
必死の決意ってヤツ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
How admirable. Is that what
you call desperate resolve?![ST:wait ]
localized version: They stopped running...? They're even dumber than I thought![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リーズ　侮るの　良くない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Riiz. Underestimating them is not good.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ryyz. Underestimating bad.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
っるさいネェ
木偶の坊は黙って見てりゃいいんだヨ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Shut up! A blockhead like you

localized version: Yes, thanks for the brilliant insight there, genius.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さぁ　地球人ども　消し炭になっちまいなッ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Now, you damn Earthlings, turn to cinders![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Now sit back and watch while I
BURN THE HUMAN SCUM ALIVE![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 絶対にここで斃すと誓う
fan translation: Swear to defeat it here, no matter what.
localized version: Swear to defeat it here.

Original Japanese line: 辺りを見回して逃げ道を探す
fan translation: Look around for an escape route.
localized version: Abandon all hope and prepare to run.

Original Japanese line: アイツらちょこまかと逃げ回りヤガッテ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Damn them, scurrying around like that![ST:wait ]
localized version: Would those cowards sit still for a minute?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええい　辺り一帯灼き尽くしてやろうかッ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Damn it! Maybe I should burn

localized version: I'll fry the whole damn planet if I have to![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リーズ　ヤツらの街を灼くんじゃなかったのか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Riiz, weren't we supposed to burn their city?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ryyz, have you forgotten human city?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 黙ってろ　うすら木偶！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Shut up, you dimwitted blockhead![ST:wait ]
localized version: SILENCE![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あんなヤツらに舐められっぱなしじゃ

fan translation:
I can't stand letting guys like

localized version: Stop with all the thinking—it's not your strong suit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
But we can't fight well like this. The

localized version:
But you cannot win like this.
You must transform Zu Pharg, now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今やろうと思ってたんダ
アタシに指図するんじゃないヨ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I was just about to do that!
Don't you order me around, yo![ST:wait ]
localized version:
I was just about to, okay?!
Now would you kindly please SHUT UP?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: クソ　あんなゴミ共相手に　チクショウ！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Crap! Against trash like that... Damn it!![ST:wait ]
localized version: No one makes a fool of me...NO ONE![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 信じられない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Unbelievable...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Holy crap...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あんな大質量の機体が飛行したまま変形まで[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Such a massive machine, and it can

localized version: How could something that big transform in-flight?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
つまりグロウスは　重力制御での飛行に

fan translation:
In other words, the Growth have succeeded

localized version:
The Ganglion must have some kind of
antigravitational flight technology.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうとしか考えられません[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's the only explanation.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's the only thing that makes sense.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ドール用フライトパックは

fan translation: Because Doll flight packs fly using lift.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Our flight modules still rely on propulsion.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
技術的には彼らの方がずっと上ですね

fan translation:
Technologically, they're far ahead

localized version:
I hate to admit it, but this is way beyond

Original Japanese line:
ドールへの重力制御システム搭載も

fan translation:
Development is moving forward on equipping

localized version:
Humanity's made great advances before—

Original Japanese line: 今言っても仕方ないことね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No use talking about that now, though.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That won't end here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You're right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I hope you're right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: アンタ達　調子に乗りすぎたネ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You people got too carried away![ST:wait ]
localized version: C'mon, don't we all just want to coexist peacefully?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この姿を見たら

fan translation:
Once you see this form, you'll have no

localized version:
But now that you've seen our little secret,
I've no choice but to WIPE YOU OUT![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんなッ　何で地球人なんかにィ[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
No way! How could we lose

localized version: No...they're just puny...wretched...little...humans![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リーズッ[ST:wide ]―！！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Riiz[ST:wide ]—!![ST:wait ]
localized version: Ryyz![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 恐ろしい敵でしたも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That was a terrifying enemy, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Bye-bye, nasty robot.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも　グロウスもタツ達を敵にまわす

fan translation:
But now the Growth must know how scary it

localized version:
Ganglion learn hard way what happens

Original Japanese line: 皆のおかげで　破壊することは出来たけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Thanks to everyone, we managed

localized version: We fought as a team and we fought well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
このクラスの機動兵器は

fan translation:
I'd like to think there are no more

localized version: I only hope there aren't any more like this back at their base...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こんなのに数で来られたら

fan translation:

localized version:
If these things hit the city in numbers,
we'd have no chance at all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: True.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それだけに一刻も早く

fan translation:
All the more reason we need to find

localized version:
Exactly another reason we need to find
that Lifehold Core as soon as possible.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
白樹の大陸で出会った

fan translation:
Remember what the Larsian named Ga
Derg told us in the White Woods...[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Remember what the Wrothian prince told us in Sylvalum?
About the Ganglion?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: グロウスは地球人本来の身体を恐れている[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Growth fear Earthlings' original bodies.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Apparently...they fear actual human bodies.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その理由は分からないけれど
私達に勝機があるとしたら[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I don't know why, but if we

localized version: I don't know why that is...but it might be the key to victory.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私たちの　身体[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Our... bodies[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Or the key to...survival...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 究極の逸品
fan translation: The ultimate masterpiece
localized version: Chef's Choice

Original Japanese line: 至極の逸品
fan translation: An exquisite delicacy
localized version: House Special

Original Japanese line: 今日は何を作ろうかな～[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What should I make today~?[ST:wait ]
localized version: So, what should I whip up today?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それいいですね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That sounds good![ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, you got it![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すぐに格納庫に来てくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Come to the hangar right away.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We need you in the hangar—now![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どうかしたの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Is something wrong?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ラオの奴が[ST:wide ]―
おい　そこを動くな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's Lao[ST:wide ]— Hey! Don't move![ST:wait ]
localized version: It's Lao, he— Hey! Get away from that![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: と　とにかく来てくれ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: J-Just get over here![ST:wait ]
localized version: Elma, get yer butts over here![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうしたんでしょうか？
ラオさんがって聞こえましたけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What do you think happened? I

localized version:
What was that all about?
Did I hear him talking to Lao?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
From his voice, it sounds like an

localized version:
Whatever it was, it didn't sound very good.

Original Japanese line: リンリーシェフの自信作
fan translation: Chef Linly's signature dish
localized version: Ask for the Chef Koo Choice.

Original Japanese line: リンリー板長の自信作
fan translation: Head Chef Linly's signature dish
localized version: Ask for the Lin Lee Special.

Original Japanese line: ラオ　何考えてる！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao, what are you thinking!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Boy, have you lost your mind?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その情報が俺達にとって

fan translation: You know what that information means to us![ST:wait ]
localized version:
You know damn well what that data means to us—

Original Japanese line:
分かっているさ
だから俺は行動したんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I know. That's exactly why I took action.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Of course I do—it means an end to this giant lie.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ずっと待ってたんだ　この日を[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I've been waiting for this

localized version: I've been waiting a long time for this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: くっ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Tch.[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴァンダム　何があったの！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Vandham, what happened!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander, what's going on?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's Lao.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ask Lao.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

He's taking the data [System:Ruby rt=device ]terminal[/System:Ruby] and

localized version: We caught him stealing a data terminal with classified intel.[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Lao-san is!?[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Explain yourself, Lao.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Explain yourself, Lao![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

localized version: You should've let me die that day, Elma.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

Original Japanese line: そんな！[ST:wait ]

localized version: I had my suspicions. But I didn't want to believe it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 正直だな[ST:wait ]

localized version: Your mistake.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

Whatever. While I'm at it, I'll take

localized version:

Original Japanese line: グロウスへの手土産としてな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A souvenir for the Growth.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The Ganglion'll appreciate the gift.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ふざけるなっ！

fan translation:
Don't give me that crap! If you're leaving,

localized version:
Boy, I am going to kick your ass so hard,

Original Japanese line: あんたに素手でかなうかよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Like I could beat you bare-handed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Not if you value your precious data.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオ　てめぇ　どういうつもりだ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lao! You bastard, what the

localized version: Lao, what the hell is going on here?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 次から次へと　暇を持て余しているようだな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
One after another... Looks like you

localized version:
Oh, look at this—the whole gang's

Original Japanese line: 茶化すな　ラオ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Don't make jokes, Lao![ST:wait ]
localized version: What the hell, Lao?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Stop! There's something we

localized version:
Hold your fire!
He's got the only copy of that data on his mim.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: くっ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Damn it[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Dammit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そういうことだ

fan translation: That's how it is. Sorry, Doug.[ST:wait ]
localized version: A little insurance policy. Sorry, Doug.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
本気で裏切ったのか　ラオ

fan translation:
Did you seriously betray us,

localized version: You'd betray all your friends? Your entire species?![ST:wait ]

歩く脳みそや犬みたいな連中と

fan translation:
Joining hands with walking brains and

localized version:
I'm no big fan of theirs, believe me—

Original Japanese line: だが　目的が同じなら組むことはできる[ST:wait ]

But if our goals line up,

localized version: But the Ganglion and I share a common goal.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 目的だと？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Goal?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ダグ　お前には分かるだろう？[ST:wait ]

localized version: Think about it, Doug. You know the answer.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 分からねえ　分かりたくもねえ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I don't understand... and I

localized version: The hell I do! You've lost it, man.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 俺はもう行くぜ　じゃぁな[ST:wait ]

localized version: Yeah...I lost it all. Good-bye.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Lao![ST:wait ]

fan translation: Speculate
localized version: Assume

Original Japanese line: 静観
fan translation: Observe
localized version: Be Patient

Original Japanese line: 質問
fan translation: Question
localized version: Clarify

Original Japanese line: さて　詳しい話聞かせてもらえるわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Now, I assume you can give us the details?[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, what exactly happened back there?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

ライフの座標はデータプローブからの情報と

fan translation:
The Life coordinates were calculated using information

localized version:
You all know how FrontierNav uses the White Whale's

Original Japanese line:
フロンティアネットが解析して
おおよその位置を割り出している[ST:wait ]

and FrontierNet analyzed that data to

localized version:
then cross-checks it with our probes
to narrow down possible Lifehold coordinates.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 皆　知っているな？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You all know that much, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, all that work paid off.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
データプローブの数も増え

The number of Data Probes has increased, and the

localized version:
We've finally got enough probes in the ground

Original Japanese line: で　ついに本命[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: And so, finally, the real target[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: In other words,[ST:wait ]

つまりはライフの本体

In other words, we've found the coordinates

localized version:
we can isolate every possible landing zone,

Original Japanese line: ええっ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Whaaat!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もも！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Momo!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それは本当なの？[ST:wait ]

localized version: Are you certain?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　まず間違いないだろう[ST:wait ]

localized version: That's what the eggheads tell me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンさん　やったですも！[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うん　じゃ　急がないと[ST:wait ]

localized version: [ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そういうこと[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's what this is.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もしかして　もう壊れちゃってたとか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Could it be... already broken or something?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だとしたら私達は活動を停止しているはずよ[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　そうか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah, right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そういうことね　ヴァンダム[ST:wait ]

localized version: Lao sabotaged the whole operation?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　奴は解析途中の[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を奪っていったんだ

localized version:
That's right. He took the terminal that was analyzing

Original Japanese line: あの判断は間違っていないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That decision wasn't wrong.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No actually, it's a good thing we didn't.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:

localized version:
No one had any idea where on his mim

Original Japanese line:
万が一誤射してしまったら
解析は一からやり直しよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If we had accidentally shot it, the analysis

localized version:
If it was damaged, we'd have to
start the entire simulation over again.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でも　それでは活動限界時間には間に合わない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But then we wouldn't make it

localized version:
And there's not enough operating time
left on the clock for that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その通りだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Exactly.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もちろん　すでに始めている[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Of course, we've already started.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

localized version:
But the coordinates were calculated from

fan translation:

Redoing all the work we did up until this point

Original Japanese line:
解析結果が出る前に

fan translation:
The operational limit will arrive before

localized version:
Which means the Lifehold would run out of time first,

Original Japanese line: ああ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Bingo.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 道はひとつね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There is only one path.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Then we have no choice.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさんに会ってデータ[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を返してもらう[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
彼はおそらく白樹の大陸の北方にあるという

localized version:
For now, let's assume he's headed for that

Original Japanese line: 急いで追うわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We'll go after him immediately.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We'll need to hurry.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あの異星人　ガ・デルグが言ってた場所ですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That place the alien Ga
Derg mentioned, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: I just hope that Ga Jiarg guy was telling the truth...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いつも頼りっぱなしだが　今回も頼む[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I know I'm always relying on you,
but I'm counting on you again.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Everything is riding on this mission. Don't screw it up.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオの野郎　いったい何をしようってんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Lao, that bastard... what the
hell is he trying to do?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That goddamn, good-for-nothing...
What the hell is he after?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオの名前を出す
fan translation: Bring up Lao's name.
localized version: Suggest it's because of Lao.

Original Japanese line: 黙って話の続きを待つ
fan translation: Wait silently for him to continue.
localized version: Hear the Commander out.

Original Japanese line: ラオを撃っていればと悔やむ
fan translation: Regret not shooting Lao.
localized version: Say you should have shot Lao.

Original Japanese line: この反応は[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

localized version: This reading...[ST:wait ]

localized version: It's the Prog Ares![ST:wait ]

fan translation:
The Prog Ares identification signal is coming

This puts its signature in the middle of

Original Japanese line: ということは　ラオさんもそこに[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That means Lao-san is there too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You think we found Lao, then?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
間違いないわ
行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No doubt about it. Let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: He can't be far. Let's go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes![ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うーん　開きませんね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Hmm, it won't open.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Uhhh, I have no idea how to open this.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こちらの入口ではないのかもしれない

fan translation:
This might not be the entrance.

localized version:
Hmm, all right...let's look around

Original Japanese line: あっちにもう一つ入口があるですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: There's another entrance over there, mo.[ST:wait ]
localized version: How about door up over there?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さすがにすんなりってわけには
いかなそうですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As expected, it doesn't look

localized version: Somehow I knew something like this was going to happen.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 時間が惜しい　一気に殲滅するわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Time is precious. We'll

localized version: The clock's ticking. Take it down, quickly![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何でしょう　これ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What is this?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What do you think it is?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 鍵のようだけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It looks like a key, but...[ST:wait ]
localized version: Part of a machine?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さっきの開かなかった入口の
カギじゃないですかも[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Isn't this the key to the entrance
that wouldn't open earlier, mo?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さっきの開かなかった入口の
カギじゃないですかも[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Isn't this the key to the entrance
that wouldn't open earlier, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Silly friends—it obviously key to big door from before![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さっきの開かなかった入口の
カギじゃないですかも[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Isn't this the key to the entrance
that wouldn't open earlier, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Silly friends—it obviously key to big door from before![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうかもしれないわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That might be it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I actually think he's right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: タツ　さえてるね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Tatsu, you're sharp![ST:wait ]
localized version: I...uh...okay. Wow.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これでドールでも来れますね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: With this, we can bring the Dolls in too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: This way we can ride our Skells in.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Exactly.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さすが　ＮＬＡ１のチームは違うなぁ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As expected... NLA's number-one

localized version: I expected no less from NLA's #1 team.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさん！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lao-san![ST:wait ]
localized version: Lao![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ルクザール[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Luxaar[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Heh.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
グロウス総帥の脳みそ野郎は　俺達の生身の

fan translation:
That brain-headed Supreme Commander of the Growth
is terrified of our flesh-and-blood bodies.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The Ganglion really are afraid, you know.[ST:page p1=60 ]Even Luxaar—their leader—
trembles at the idea we might get our bodies back.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
なもんで　俺にはここで
あんたらの足止めをしとけってよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: So he told me to stall you guys here.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That's why he had me stick around here—
to keep you out of his tendrils.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[System:Ruby rt=デバイス ]端末[/System:Ruby]を持っているのがあなたである以上

fan translation:
Since you're the one holding the [System:Ruby rt=device ]terminal[/System:Ruby],
we had no choice but to come here.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You knew we had no choice—
we had to chase after that stolen data terminal.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
奴らがライフを破壊すればこの[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]を
動かしてる俺達の意識も消える[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once they destroy the Life, the consciousness
operating these [System:Ruby rt=B.B.s ]Blue Bloods[/System:Ruby] will vanish too.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
None of this will matter soon.
Once they destroy the Lifehold Core, and all of us with it...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あと少しさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Just a little longer now.[ST:wait ]
localized version: this'll all be over.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あなたはそれが恐ろしくないの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Aren't you afraid of that?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You don't sound so excited anymore.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 恐ろしいどころか　楽しみさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Afraid? On the contrary,
I'm looking forward to it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Course I'm excited, why wouldn't I be...?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
幽霊として徘徊する
この偽りの生から解放されるんだからな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Because I'll be freed from this false
life, wandering around like a ghost.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We can finally stop living this goddamned lie.
We'll all be free, at last.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 偽りの生だなんて[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A false life...?[ST:wait ]
localized version: We'll all be DEAD, Lao![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
たとえ[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]だとしても私達は生きてます！
偽物なんかじゃない！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if we are [System:Ruby rt=B.B.s ]Blue Bloods[/System:Ruby], we
are alive! We aren't fakes![ST:wait ]
localized version:
How does that free anyone?
Instead of reuniting with our real flesh and blood?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いいや　俺達は死んだのさ
あの時　地球と一緒にな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
No... we died. Back then,

localized version:
Wrong. We're already dead, Lin.
Our flesh and blood burned away with the Earth.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 悪いけど　会話を楽しんでいる余裕はないの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Sorry, but we don't have time
to enjoy a conversation.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Listen, Lao, we don't have time for a debate here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
話をしたいなら聞いてあげるけど

fan translation:
If you want to talk, I'll listen,
but we are going to attack.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We came here for that terminal,

Original Japanese line: 了解だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Of course.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
じゃあ　対話に付き合ってもらう代わりに

fan translation:
Well then... since you humored me with a conversation,
I suppose I'll humor you with a battle.[ST:wait ]
localized version:

But without the full NLA mainframe working on it,

Original Japanese line:

Then we have no choice.
Let's get back to the city ASAP.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ラオさん　一緒にＮＬＡに帰りましょう[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
バカを言うな

Yeah, right.

Original Japanese line:

localized version:

Original Japanese line: 帰りましょう　ラオさん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's go home, Lao-san.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Come on, Lao. Let's go home.[ST:wait ]

分かった

localized version:
Fine, whatever.

Original Japanese line: そうですけど[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wait ]

we knew there'd be cases like Lao.

localized version:
Brave citizens of New Los Angeles:
this is your director general, Maurice Chausson.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation: I am glad to have reached this day.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Today, I come before you with truly joyous news.[ST:wait ]

Thanks to the tireless efforts of the

we have finally identified where your

localized version:
we have finally—finally—succeeded in

But as long as we forge ahead with the same

and become one of the forms of

and take our place as living, breathing residents

localized version:
your mission is to secure the Lifehold Core,

fan translation: Boldness
localized version: Chow Down
