Original Japanese line:
イリーナの言う通りだ
俺は確かに焦って不安になっていた[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Irina's right. I really
was impatient and scared.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'm on edge. Worried. Freaked out—all of it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 赦してくれるか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Will you forgive me?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Forgive me, okay?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ゆるしません！
特製ココア１０杯の刑です！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I won't forgive you! The penalty
is ten cups of special cocoa![ST:wait ]
localized version: No, but bring me 10 hot cocoas...and we'll talk.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あの店のだな
オッケイ　了解だ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: From that shop, right? Okay, roger that![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Heh. From that place you love, right?
Okay, you got it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　せっかくのリンの手料理
皆でいただきましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Now, let's all eat Lin's home cooking.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
All right, everyone, Lin went to all this trouble,
so let's dig in before it gets cold.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうですも！
お腹ペコペコですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes, mo! I'm starving, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu like this plan! Tatsu is starving![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よぉし　食うぞ食うぞ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Alright, let's eat, let's eat![ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, you don't have to ask me twice.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ちょ　ちょっといきなりぃ！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: W-Wait, so suddenly!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Whoa-whoa-whoa![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: お前ずるいぞ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You're sneaky![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey, wait for us![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それはタツのですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's Tatsu's, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Save some for Tatsu![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ダグさんもどうぞ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Doug-san, you too![ST:wait ]
localized version: Help yourself, Doug.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Heh. Roger that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 食った食った！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I ate, I ate![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh man, am I stuffed![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: お腹いっぱいだよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm full.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I couldn't eat another bite.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: タツ　動けないですも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Tatsu can't move, mo.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu. Cannot. Move.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
リン　美味しかったわ
ありがとう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin, it was delicious. Thank you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Amazing as always, Lin. Thank you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
初めて食ったが　ヴァンダム司令や
イリーナがよく食べに来るのも分かるな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That was my first time eating it, but now I see
why Commander Vandham and Irina come by so often.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Now I get why Irina and the Commander
are always making excuses to swing by.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うまかったよ　リン[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It was good, Lin.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That was delicious, Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: えへへ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ehehe[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, you guys.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そんな面と向かって褒められたら
照れちゃうじゃないですか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
When you praise me to my face
like that, I get embarrassed.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Don't make me blush. I'm just glad you enjoyed it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さて　俺はそろそろ戻る
料理ありがとな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well then, I should head back
soon. Thanks for the food.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, I should be getting back.
Thanks for the eats.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 中尉　僕らも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lieutenant, we should go too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Shall we, Lieutenant?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　そうだな
リン　楽しかったよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, you're right. Lin, that was fun.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Yeah, we'd better go too.
This was really great, Lin—thanks.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: リンちゃん　ありがとう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Lin-chan, thank you![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, this was fun, Lin.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
では　私もこれで
楽しいお祭でした[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well then, I shall take my leave.
It was a lovely festival.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Indeed, it was a most enjoyable food ritual.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: みなさん　がんばりましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Everyone, let's do our best![ST:wait ]
localized version: All right—good luck out there, guys![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマ　座標の解析が終わった
チームメンバーと一緒にすぐ来てくれ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Elma, the coordinate analysis is complete.
Come at once with your team members.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Elma, the analysis is just about finished.
Gather your team and get over here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Roger.[ST:wait ]
localized version: On our way.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 仲間と過ごす今を楽しむ
fan translation: Enjoy this moment with friends.
localized version: Enjoy this time with friends.

Original Japanese line: 脇目もふらず料理に手を出す
fan translation: Reach for the food without looking away.
localized version: Dive right in and start eating.

Original Japanese line: ここにセントラルライフが？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Central Life is here?[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's the Lifehold Core?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 座標は黒鋼の大陸西方の洋上を指している[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The coordinates point to the ocean
west of the Black Steel Continent.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The coordinates place it off the west coast of Cauldros.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうやら　海中に沈んでいるみたいね
今まで見つからなかったわけだわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It looks like it's sunk beneath the sea.
No wonder we couldn't find it until now.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It’s no wonder we couldn’t find it—
it’s way out in the middle of the ocean.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 海の底にあるですも？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It's at the bottom of the sea, mo?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Did it sink underwater?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
たとえ海底だろうと
私達は行かなければならない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if it's on the ocean
floor, we still have to go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We'll find out soon enough—let's suit up and get going.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でしょ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Secretary?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 君達の働きに人類の存続がかかっている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The survival of humanity
depends on your work.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Our survival as a species hinges on your efforts.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ　我々を救ってくれ　頼む[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma, please save us. I beg you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Elma, we need your help. Please save us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 他人行儀な真似はやめて　ナギ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Don't be so formal, Nagi.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We're all in this together, Secretary.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私はそのためにあなた達の船に乗り
そして今　ここにいる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I boarded your ship for that very
purpose, and now I am here.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
My goal hasn't changed since I first set foot on
the White Whale. You of all people should know that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私の決意はあの頃から
何一つ変わっていないわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
My determination hasn't changed
a bit since back then.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I intend to see this through. That should go without saying.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
すまんな
いつも君を頼ってばかりで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm sorry. We always end up relying on you.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I know... It's just—we've put so much on your shoulders.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その代わり　全てが解決したら
長い休暇をちょうだい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In exchange, once everything is
resolved, give me a long vacation.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You can make it up to me with a nice,
long vacation once this is all over.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この星は興味が尽きないわ
任務とは関係なく行ってみたい所が沢山あるの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This planet never stops fascinating me. There are
so many places I want to see, mission or not.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
This planet fascinates me to no end.
I'd love to take some time to explore it with no agenda.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: それだったらタツが案内しますも[ST:wait ]
fan translation: In that case, Tatsu will guide you, mo.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh-ho! Can Tatsu be Elma's guide?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あ　もちろんお代はいらないですも
ロハでいいですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ah, of course, no payment needed,
mo. Free of charge is fine, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Of course, Tatsu do it free of charge.
It's all over the house.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: タツったら　どこでそんな言葉覚えたのよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Honestly Tatsu, where did
you learn a word like that?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let me guess: L taught you that one?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
セントラルライフの座標は
各チームに連絡済みだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We've already transmitted the Central
Life's coordinates to each team.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We've sent the coordinates to every BLADE team we got.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
エルマ　お前さんには全チームの
前線指揮を執ってもらいたい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Elma, I want you to take
frontline command of all teams.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Elma, I want you to act as commander
for everyone out there in the field.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 謹んでお受けするわ　技師長[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I humbly accept, Chief Engineer.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I'd be honored, Mr. Chief Engineer.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: やっぱ　その呼び名の方がしっくり来るな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I knew it. That title feels much better![ST:wait ]
localized version: Ha ha! I forgot how much I missed being called that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 司令　なんてのはカタッ苦しくていかんわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
"Commander" and all that is
too stiff and stuffy for me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: "Commander" makes me feel like some useless old stuffed shirt.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: だと思ったわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I figured as much.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah, and shirts aren't your style.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: では皆　行くわよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well then, everyone, let's go![ST:wait ]
localized version: All right team—let's go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes![ST:wait ]
localized version: Roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: お弁当も持ったですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I brought the bento too, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Tatsu has lunches all packed![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　あれを！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san, look at that![ST:wait ]
localized version: Elma, there it is![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 一足遅かったか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Were we a step too late!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Damn! They got to it already![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
いえ　まだよ
見て　あの海面を[ST:wait ]
fan translation: No, not yet. Look at the surface of the sea.[ST:wait ]
localized version: No. Not yet. Look where it meets the water.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 防御フィールド！？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A defensive field!?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Is that a force field?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ライフは　人類存続に不可欠なシステム[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The Life is an essential system
for humanity's survival.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The Lifehold was designed to sustain human life at all costs.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その中枢を護るための防御フィールドは
まだ破られていない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The defensive field protecting its
core has not been breached yet.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The defensive shields that surround the Core
won't go down so easily.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ってことは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Which means[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: So in other words—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: セントラルライフは無事なんですね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The Central Life is safe, isn't it![ST:wait ]
localized version: We've nothing to worry about?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　でも安心はできない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes, but we can't rest easy.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I didn't say that. Remember—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
防御フィールドで敵侵入を防いでも
稼働限界時間が延びるわけじゃない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Even if the defensive field keeps the enemy
out, it won't extend the operational limit.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
they don't need to break into the Core—
they just have to keep us out until time runs out.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 急ぐわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We must hurry.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Which is soon.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
人類の未来のため
グロウスをやっつけちゃいましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
For the sake of humanity's
future, let's defeat the Growth![ST:wait ]
localized version: Speaking of time—it's time to kick some Ganglion butt![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そうですも！
けっちょんけっちょんにしてやるですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
That's right, mo! We'll
beat them to a pulp, mo![ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes! Yes! Friends kick Ganglion in butts![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 頼もしいわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's reassuring.[ST:wait ]
localized version: That's the spirit.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そう　これは[ST:wide ]―
全ての人の希望を背負った戦い[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yes, this is[ST:wide ]— A battle that
carries everyone's hopes.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I need you all at your best.
Everyone's counting on us to see this through.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 引くことは出来ない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We cannot retreat.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And we won't get a second chance.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマより　各チームに告げる[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is Elma to all teams.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All units, this is your commander, Elma.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これより私のチームがセントラルライフ
内部に突入　予備システムを起動させる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
My team will now breach the Central
Life and activate the backup system.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
My team will take point. We'll breach the Core,
and then once inside, attempt to activate the backup power.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ダグ　イリーナ　グイン　ルーは同行して[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Doug, Irina, Gwin, and L, accompany us.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Doug, Irina, Gwin, and L—you're with us.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
他のチームは進路確保を最優先
突入後は拠点防衛に専念[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
All other teams, make securing our route your top priority.
Once we breach, focus on defending the position.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
All other teams, focus on clearing our approach,
then defend our position once we're in.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
作戦目的は敵の殲滅ではない
間違えないで[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The mission objective is not to annihilate
the enemy. Do not forget that.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
That is your priority—NOT destroying all enemy craft.
Are we clear?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: チーム・グラシーザ了解！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Team Grasida, roger![ST:wait ]
localized version: Team Grasida, roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: トリシューラ了解！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Trishula, roger![ST:wait ]
localized version: Trishula, roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ニンギルス了解！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ningirsu, roger![ST:wait ]
localized version: Ningirsu, roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: バルムンク了解！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Balmung, roger![ST:wait ]
localized version: Balmung, roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
チーム・ズールト　敵を掃討しつつ
大佐の進路を確保します！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Team Surtr. We will secure the Colonel's
route while mopping up enemies![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Team Surtr, roger!
We'll take out any hostiles along your approach.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 突入部隊　行くわよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Breach unit, move out.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Breach team, let's go![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Roger![ST:wait ]
localized version: Roger![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここがセントラルライフ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is the Central Life[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Finally...the Lifehold Core.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
急ぎましょう
敵に侵入される前に中へ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's hurry. We need to get inside
before the enemy breaks in.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's hurry, before they can follow us inside![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ようやく辿り着いた[ST:wait ]
fan translation: We've finally arrived.[ST:wait ]
localized version: All right, here we go.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここに　ここに私達の身体があるんですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Here... Our bodies are here, aren't they?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Our real bodies... We can finally be whole again.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
セントラルライフ制御システムより
通達します[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Notification from the Central
Life Control System.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Attention: this is Lifehold Core Control.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
システム残存エネルギーが
０コンマ２を切りました[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Remaining system energy has
dropped below zero point two.[ST:wait ]
localized version: System energy levels have dropped below zero point two.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 防御フィールド消失まで１０００秒[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
One thousand seconds until
defensive field collapse.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Shielding will be disabled in T-minus one-thousand seconds.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 繰り返します[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Repeating.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Repeat:[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: セントラルライフ制御[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Central Life Control[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: This is Lifehold Core Control...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: １５分しか持たないのか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It will only last fifteen minutes![ST:wait ]
localized version: What? 15 minutes and we lose the shields?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どのみちエネルギーが尽きたら
フィールドだけ残ってもしょうがないさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
In any case, if the energy runs out, it won't
matter even if the field itself remains.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If the Core runs out of power,
the shields will be the least of our problems.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 予備システムを起動させれば[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If we activate the backup system[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, yes and no.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
稼働限界時間も延びるし
防御フィールドも維持できる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
The operational limit will be extended, and
the defensive field can be maintained too.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We need to keep the Core powered,
but we do also need those shields.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 防御フィールドを維持できれば[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If we can maintain the defensive field[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's two birds with one stone's throw away.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
補給に限界がある敵を
撤退させられるかもしれませんね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We may be able to force the enemy to
retreat once their supplies run low.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The shields will cause the Ganglion
to use up their materiel and retreat.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
そういうこと
全ては　予備システムを確保できるかどうかよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Exactly. Everything depends on whether
we can secure the backup system.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Exactly. Everything comes down to
getting the backup power source online.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 行きましょう　エルマさん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's go, Elma-san.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right then—let's do it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 肯定
fan translation: Affirm
localized version: Nod

Original Japanese line: 否定
fan translation: Deny
localized version: Shake Your Head

Original Japanese line:
中に入ったら引き返している余裕はない
準備はいい？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once we go inside, there will be no
room to turn back. Are you ready?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Once we're inside, there's no turning back.
Everyone ready?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: しっかり準備しましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's prepare thoroughly.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Do what you have to do.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 本当にいいのね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Are you really sure?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You're sure now?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 覚悟を決めてうなずく
fan translation: Nod with resolve.
localized version: Tell Elma you're ready.

Original Japanese line: やり残したことを伝える
fan translation: Say you still have things left undone.
localized version: Tell Elma you need more time.

Original Japanese line: 強くうなずき覚悟を示す
fan translation: Show your resolve with a strong nod.
localized version: Tell Elma you're sure you're ready.

Original Japanese line: やり残したことを思い出す
fan translation: Remember things left undone.
localized version: Tell Elma you actually could use some more time.

Original Japanese line:
何を手間取っている！
いつになったら目標を破壊出来るのか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
What is taking so long! When
will the target be destroyed?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Why have we not received confirmation
that the target is destroyed? What is the delay?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はっ　それが[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah, sir... that is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Grandmaster, sir.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
目標の周囲にはトリオン型障壁が
展開している模様でして[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It appears a Trion-type barrier has
been deployed around the target.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The target appears to have
some manner of customized trion barrier...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: トリオン型障壁だと？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A Trion-type barrier, you say?[ST:wait ]
localized version: A TRION barrier?![ST:wait ]

localized version: Are you daft? These are HUMANS we're talking about.[ST:wait ]

localized version:

Original Japanese line: ４番副砲塔沈黙！[ST:wait ]

localized version:

This is[ST:wide ]— My intellectual

localized version:

なんだ　このだだっ広い空間は？

explained that your bodies are in capsules, and that your

that’s right, isn’t it? It’s not complete.

fan translation: Calm
localized version: Inquire

fan translation: He'll remember everything he did, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
All the things he did...

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
That's fine. If you die, you can't

localized version:
All the more reason.
You can't make up for your mistakes when you're dead.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あいつには生きてもらって
やったことに見合う分　働いてもらうさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We'll have him live and work enough

localized version:
Hell, he'd better come back.
He's got work to do. Wrongs he needs to right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうだな[ST:wide ]―　その通りだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right[ST:wide ]— Exactly.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Heh... She's right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ですよね
では急いでシステムの復旧を！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Right. Then hurry and restore the system![ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay then... Come on, let's hurry up and restore the system.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ大佐？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Colonel Elma?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Colonel?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
皆に一つ

localized version:

Original Japanese line: なんだ急に[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What is it, all of a sudden?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh man, what now...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ＮＬＡの[System:Ruby rt=ビービー ]Ｂ．Ｂ．[/System:Ruby]の中でたった一人だけ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Among NLA's [System:Ruby rt=B.B.s ]Blue Bloods[/System:Ruby],

localized version: The truth is, exactly one mim in New LA...[ST:wait ]

whose consciousness is being transferred

localized version:
actually is being controlled remotely

えっ？

Eh? I thought the Earthlife Colonization

localized version: Wait, someone isn't stored in the database with the rest of us?[ST:wait ]

localized version: That's right. This was a special case.[ST:wait ]

fan translation: What do you mean?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ大佐！[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんな[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 当たり前じゃないですか！[ST:wait ]

fan translation:

Original Japanese line: そうですも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's right, mo![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―リンの言う通りだ[ST:wait ]

fan translation: Yeah, I believe you too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah. Nothing's changed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 僕もです[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Me too.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ありがとう　嬉しく思う
[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなた達の信頼に応えるためにも
私が知る限りの真実を話すわ[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
To answer your trust, I will tell

Original Japanese line: でもその前にやることをやらないとね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But before that, I must do what must be done.[ST:wait ]
localized version: But first, there's something I must do...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私にしかできないことを[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Something only I can do[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: And it's something that...only I can do...[ST:wait ]

fan translation:
This will switch it to

Original Japanese line: 生体認証コード　確認[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Biometric code, confirmed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

本当に　切り替わってるのか？

Original Japanese line: ええ　大丈夫よ[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　ナギおじさまです[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: つないで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Put him through.[ST:wait ]

稼働限界時間の回復を確認した

why don't we go back to New LA,

localized version: [ST:wait ]

はい

localized version: It was 30 years ago when Elma first came to Earth.[ST:wait ]

地球圏に及ぶことを察知した

would reach the Earth sphere,
Elma-san, in order to save us...[ST:wait ]
localized version: and Elma knew that eventually, that war would come to Earth.[ST:wait ]

fan translation: descended to Earth all by herself.[ST:wait ]

and helped put into motion a grand plan

Her alien tech brought us Skells

[System:Ruby rt=B.B.s ]Blue Bloods[/System:Ruby] and the Life...[ST:wait ]

fan translation: I do not see it that way.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私はそう信じています[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That is what I believe.[ST:wait ]

believing that the day will come

localized version:

Original Japanese line: これは[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: This is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 壊れていただって？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Destroyed, you say?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Destroyed?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どういうことだ？

fan translation: What do you mean? Explain it to me![ST:wait ]
localized version: What do you mean? Explain yourself.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
データベースは稼働停止している

fan translation:
The database has stopped functioning.
It didn't break yesterday or today.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
The entire chamber is flooded. It's trashed.
The system is completely shut down.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ミラ落着の時に　すでに失われていたのよ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It had already been lost
when we crashed on Mira![ST:wait ]
localized version:
And not just recently...
It's been this way since we got to Mira.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そんな馬鹿な！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: That's impossible![ST:wait ]
localized version: That's absurd![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
で　では我々は[ST:wide ]―
今　ここにこうしている我々は[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Th-Then we[ST:wide ]— What about us,
standing here right now[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Then how are we...
How in the world would anyone be...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そう[ST:wide ]―　皆は何故　動いていられるの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Exactly[ST:wide ]— Why are you all still functioning?[ST:wait ]
localized version: I know. So then why...would you be alive?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
システムは壊れているのに[ST:wide ]―

fan translation:
Even though the system is destroyed[ST:wide ]— Even though your
consciousnesses and memories should no longer exist[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's not possible...
Without the database...all your identities should be gone, too.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何かあるというの[ST:wide ]―　この星に[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Is there something[ST:wide ]— about this planet[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's this planet. It's something about this planet...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―　データベース区画　[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]— Database Sector [ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: —Lifehold Database Chamber—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: This story is never ending...
fan translation: This story is never ending...
localized version: This story never truly ends...

Original Japanese line: 一体[ST:wide ]─[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What on earth[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: What in the...?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何がどうなっていやがるんだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: What the hell is going on here?[ST:wait ]
localized version: What in God's name is going on?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Let's continue the investigation and hope the

localized version:

Original Japanese line:

You're saying we shouldn't panic

localized version:

Original Japanese line: まぁ　そういうことだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Well, that's about it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yes, something like that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: でもこんなあやふやな状態のままじゃ[ST:wide ]─[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
But staying in such an

localized version: But... It's so disturbing to think about...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴァンダム[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Vandham.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Commander.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

localized version:

Original Japanese line: うっ[ST:wide ]─[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: すっ　すまん[ST:wait ]

But right now, our comrades in

Original Japanese line: その不安と戦いながら必死に調査を続けている[ST:wait ]

You aren't even a [System:Ruby rt=B.B. ]Blue
Blood[/System:Ruby] in the first place[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

localized version:

Original Japanese line: 消失現象？[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 各地で同時多発的に発生したこの現象は[ST:wait ]

This phenomenon, which occurred

localized version:

is expanding its domain while

and our escape from this

should join hands and aim for

localized version:
but set their eyes on a new universe while

localized version: The fact is, when Void faced us,[ST:wait ]

he doesn't want to bring anyone

is that why he doesn't want anyone else to

we'll just end up swallowed by the

whatever you could call my soul—

you have developed your

サマール　なおも私を[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Guu! Samaar, you still dare to[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: Gah! Samaar continues to vex me...![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おお[ST:wide ]―！
つまらない小細工を[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ooh[ST:wide ]—! Such trifling tricks[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: AAAAHHH! Tedious trickery...![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
くっ！
私を止めようなどと[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Kuh! To think you would try to stop me[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: Ughh... You think you can stop me...?![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hey, Elma![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

localized version:

Original Japanese line:

localized version:

Original Japanese line:

fan translation: I see. So this is the effect of the "spears."[ST:wait ]
localized version: I see... It must be the effect of the spear.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 確実を期すためにも残りの“槍”を起動させましょう[ST:wait ]

To make certain of it, let's

localized version: We need this to work. Let's activate the other one as well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あああ！
コアの[ST:wide ]―力が[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Aaaaaah! The core's[ST:wide ]— power is[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: Aaaaaaaahhhh! My cores, my power...![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
やったですも！
ヤリを全部打ち上げましたも～！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We did it, mo! We launched

localized version: Happy dance! All spears went flying sky-high![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: これでヴォイドとの戦いで優位に立てますね[ST:wait ]

Now we'll have the upper hand

localized version: This should put us in a better position when fighting Void.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ　今度は遅れを取ったりしない[ST:wait ]

localized version: He won't get the better of us this time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴォイドを倒し　アレスのコアを取り戻す[ST:wait ]

We'll defeat Void and

localized version: We'll take him down, then get the Ares back its cores.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 準備が整い次第　反撃開始といきましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Once we're ready, let's

localized version: Get ready—it's time for the counteroffensive.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お二人とも　無事だったんですね！

fan translation: You're both safe! Thank goodness[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's you two! I was so worried about you!
What a relief...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
やっと見つけましたも！
あちこち探しましたも～[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We finally found you, mo! We

localized version:
We finally found friends!

Original Japanese line: その様子だと　二人も大事ないようね[ST:wait ]

From the looks of it, neither

localized version: I'm happy to see you're both all right as well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Say, Elma...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
もう一度

fan translation: We're going back to where Void is, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
We're going back, right?

Original Japanese line: エルマ、元気そうな二人を見て微笑む
fan translation: Elma smiles, seeing the two looking healthy.

Original Japanese line: その前に　ちょっといいですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Before that, do you have a minute?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Before that, I wanted to say...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あれを見てください[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Please look at that.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You see that?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 塔[ST:wide ]―　ですかね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: A tower[ST:wide ]— I suppose?[ST:wait ]
localized version: That...tower place?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 何かの遺跡のようにも見えますけど[ST:wait ]
fan translation: It looks like some kind of ruin, but[ST:wait ]
localized version: It looks like some kinda relic, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: こんな場所に巨大な人工の構造物[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
a massive artificial structure
in a place like this[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: It's a pretty big structure to put in a place like this...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
何らかの意味があって
あそこにあるのだとすれば[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If it's there for some reason[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: I can't imagine that it was put here just for decoration.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あるいは[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Perhaps[ST:wait ]
localized version: Maybe...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴォイドに関係している可能性も[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: it may be connected to Void[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: it's connected to Void somehow...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい　私も同じことを考えていました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes, I was thinking the exact same thing.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Right. I was thinking that as well.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
タツも気になりますも
ちょっとヨリ道して調べてみますも！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Tatsu is curious too, mo. Let's take

localized version:
Tatsu also have big curious.

Original Japanese line:
そうね
今は少しでも情報が欲しい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Yes. We need any information

localized version: Yeah, info is our top priority right now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 念のため調査しておきましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's investigate it, just to be sure.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We should at least check it out.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: はい！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes![ST:wait ]
localized version: Right.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
おっ　やっと見つけたよ

fan translation:
Oh, finally found you. Glad to

localized version:
Oh, glad you finally found me.

Original Japanese line:
まったく　あたしらを分断させるなんて

fan translation:
Honestly, splitting us up like

localized version:
What's the big idea, scattering us all over the place?

Original Japanese line:
この借りは千倍にして返さないと

I won't be satisfied until I pay this

localized version:
We've gotta teach that bastard a lesson,

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Come on, let's get moving. We've got

localized version:
Good? Good, let's go.
I'm itching to give that ghoul a real good kicking.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
This time, we're settling it

localized version:
And this time, it'll be nice and final.
Just you wait...![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
はぁ～～～　よかったぁ

fan translation:
Haaaah... Thank goodness.
I finally found my team[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Maaaaaannnn...! You would not believe

Original Japanese line:
気づいたら　敵の本拠地に僕一人だけって

fan translation:
When I came to, I was alone in the enemy

localized version:
I woke up all by my lonesome here on enemy turf,

Original Japanese line:

Well, anyway, I'm glad you're safe too.

localized version:
But hey, I'm glad you're all right.
There's still everything to play for, isn't there?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

Let's hurry back to where

localized version: Let's hurry on over to kick Void's butt, and save Al.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それでヴォイドを倒して[ST:wide ]―

Then we defeat Void[ST:wide ]— and all

localized version:
And then, we'll head back,

Original Japanese line:

We can definitely do it. Let's hang

localized version:
I believe in us.

Original Japanese line: よう　待ってたぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yo, I've been waiting.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yo! You took your time.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
本当はこっちから

I honestly thought about going

localized version: I was almost ready to go out searching for you.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 生憎　俺のドールがいかれちまってな[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: unfortunately, my Doll gave out on me[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: Sadly, my Skell went kinda haywire.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ひとまずここに避難してたってわけさ[ST:wait ]

So I figured I'd take shelter

localized version: Thought it'd be good to lay low here for a while.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お前さんなら

localized version: But it's cool—I knew you'd find me one way or another.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ははっ　相変わらず期待を裏切らねえな[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Haha. As always, you never disappoint.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: よーし　待つのは終わりだ[ST:wait ]

localized version: Okay, enough sitting around.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 一転攻勢[ST:wide ]―　ここからは俺達のターンだ[ST:wait ]

Time to turn the tables[ST:wide ]— from

Original Japanese line: ヴォイドの奴に　目に物見せてやろうぜ！[ST:wait ]

Let's show that bastard

localized version: Void's done. He'll never even know what hit him![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

Oh, you were safe as well! Glad

localized version:
Oh, fondant greetings to you!

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―えっ？　私ですか？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Eh? Me?[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Hm? You ask about us?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Luckily, I was blown somewhere nearby,

localized version:
Oh, we were lucky to land not far from here,

Original Japanese line: こんな時こそ　故事に言う泰然自若[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
At times like this, as the

localized version: Times like these, slow and steady bakes the cake![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 慌てず冷静に行動すれば　火もまた涼しです[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Act calmly, do not panic,

localized version: Keep your goal in focus, and one may never fail![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Now, now, let's save the reunion celebration

localized version:
But come, let us stick a thumbtack in the celebrations.

Original Japanese line:
敵の本拠地へ

fan translation: To the enemy stronghold, Iza Kamakura![ST:wait ]
localized version: Into the lion's gullet! As flies to wonton soup are we![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―ところで
カマクラって何でしょうかね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—By the way, what exactly is a Kamakura?[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Incidentally, we may need to further look into that last one.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 無事だったか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You were safe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: You're intact.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 俺か？　ああ　見ての通り俺は問題ない[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Me? Yes, as you can see, I'm fine.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Me? Oh, perfectly fine, as you can see.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
I decided wandering alone would be unwise,

localized version:
I adjudged that wandering alone was inexpedient,

Original Japanese line:
だが君が来てくれたのなら

fan translation:
But now that you've come, there's

localized version:
But, now that you are here,

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Let's take back Al and the

localized version:
Let us liberate Al and the Ares,

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
We won't just keep having things taken from

localized version:

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
Ah, thank goodness[ST:wide ]—! You

localized version:
Oh, thank the stars!
You must've spotted my flare, yes?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
私一人じゃ

fan translation:
I just couldn't find a way

localized version:
I do not think I could have escaped here

Original Japanese line: 本当に助かりました[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You truly saved me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Thank you for the timely rescue.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたには助けられてばかりですが
今度は[ST:wide ]―　私があなたの力になります[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You're always the one saving me, but

localized version:
You have come to my aid many times before,

Original Japanese line:
私達でこの戦いを終わらせて[ST:wide ]―

fan translation:
We'll end this battle ourselves[ST:wide ]— and

localized version:
Let us bring this fight to an end,

Original Japanese line:
こんなことなら

If I'd known this would happen, I would've

localized version:
Let this be a lesson, never leave home without

Original Japanese line:

fan translation:
The location is terrible, but right now even

localized version:
The background's pretty bleak, but I could use

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―ってお前さん　生きてたか！
ハッ！　だろうと思ったぜ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Whoa, you're alive! Hah! I figured as much.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
...Whoa, you're still kicking?
Nah, I'm not really surprised.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ずいぶんな目に遭ったが

fan translation:
You've been through hell, but you

localized version:
We took a bit of a bruising,

Original Japanese line:
仕方ねぇ　付き合うぜ

fan translation:
Can't be helped. I'll tag along. Pushing ourselves

localized version:
Will I help? Oh, sure thing!
It's in the job description, after all.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
帰ったら飲みに行こうぜ
活躍できなかったほうの奢りでな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Let's go for a drink when we get back.

localized version:
Let's hit up a bar when we're back.
Least kills buys the round—how 'bout it?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　良かった！
あなたも無事だったんですね[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah, thank goodness! You were safe too.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, phew! You're still in one piece![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ボクは気づいたらここにいて
どうしようかと迷っていたんですが[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
When I came to, I was here, and I
was wondering what to do, but[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I came to right over here,
and was trying to figure out how best to proceed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
昔　兄さんに教わった対処法を思い出し

fan translation:
I remembered what my brother taught me long
ago, so I sent up a flare and waited.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
In the end, I decided to pop a flare and sit tight,
just like my brother taught me.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―ってすみません
ボクばっかり喋ってしまって[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
[ST:wide ]—Oh, I'm sorry. I ended up
doing all the talking.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Oh, s-sorry. I'm rambling, aren't I?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
まだ全部終わったわけじゃないのに

fan translation:
It's not as if everything is over

localized version: I guess it's a little premature to be celebrating, huh...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
でも任せてください
ボクもまだまだ戦えます！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: But leave it to me. I can still fight![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Anyway, you can count on me.
I've still got some fight left in me![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全力であなたをサポートしますから！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll support you with everything I've got![ST:wait ]
localized version: I'll back you up with everything I've got![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ！　よかった[ST:wide ]―
あなたもご無事だったのですね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah! Thank goodness[ST:wide ]— you're safe as well![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, goodness! I'm so glad you made it out alive![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その[ST:wide ]―　私どうしたらいいか
わからなくて[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Um[ST:wide ]— I didn't know what to do[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: I... I wasn't sure what to do, how to help...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ここであなたに会えて
本当によかったです[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'm truly glad I met you here.[ST:wait ]
localized version: So seeing you here... It's truly a blessing.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あっ[ST:wide ]―こんな話をしてる
場合じゃないですよね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ah[ST:wide ]— this is no time to be having
a conversation like this, is it.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ah! I guess this is no time to get sentimental.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ行きましょう
私達の未来のために[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Come, let's go. For the sake of our future[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay...be brave. This is for our future![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私も精一杯頑張りますから！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: I'll do my absolute best as well![ST:wait ]
localized version: I'll fight... I'll fight with all I have![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あら　奇遇ね
こんなところでどうしたの？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Well, what a coincidence. What are
you doing in a place like this?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well, well, what a surprise.
Fancy meeting you here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―冗談よ
あなたなら来てくれると思っていたわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—I'm joking. I knew you would come for me.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Kidding. I knew you'd be along any minute now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: さあ　行きましょう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Now, let's go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Come on. Let's get going.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
お金にならない仕事なんて
さっさと終わらせるに限るわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Jobs that don't pay are best
finished as quickly as possible.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
No paycheck at the end of this one.
Best to get it over and done with.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ストレス溜まってるの
せいぜい暴れさせてもらうわね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I've got a lot of stress built
up, so I'm going to cut loose.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I'm feelin' pretty tense.
Might have to go off the chain shortly.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あなたも
ちゃんとついてこなくちゃ駄目よ？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You'd better make sure you
keep up with me, okay?[ST:wait ]
localized version: You too. You better keep up, or else.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―あ　センパイ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Ah, Senpai![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, hey, Chief![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
わざわざ　わたしを探しに
来てくれたんですね　感心感心[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
You came all the way out here to look for
me, didn't you? I'm impressed, impressed.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
You came all the way out here just to find me?
Aw, you shouldn't have![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こっちはドールは壊れちゃうし
グロウスに襲われるし　もう散々でしたよー[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
My Doll broke, the Growth attacked
me, and it was a total disaster![ST:wait ]
localized version:
What with my Skell breaking down, and the Ganglion mooks,
it's just one thing after another![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ほら　センパイ　早く行きましょ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Come on, Senpai, let's hurry up and go.[ST:wait ]
localized version: C'mon, Chief, let's get hustling![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こんな不思議空間
冒険者として探索しなくちゃ損ですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As an adventurer, it'd be a waste not to
explore a mysterious space like this.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
What kinda explorers would we be if we didn't
turn this bizarro place upside-down?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―え？　それどころじゃない？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Eh? This is no time for that?[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Huh? No time for that?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: もー　センパイ細かすぎ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Geez, Senpai, you're too fussy.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Aw, Chief, live a little![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
どうせ　大ボスのところまで戻るんだし
どっちでも同じじゃないですかー[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We're heading back to the big boss
anyway, so isn't it the same either way?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I mean, we're gonna kick the Big Bad's butt, right?
Might as well take a teensy detour![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　センパイ　そうと決まれば
レッツゴーです！　遅れないでくださいね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Alright, Senpai, now that it's
decided, let's go! Don't fall behind![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Right? Then it's settled! Ten-hup, Chief!
This chunk of rock ain't gonna ransack itself![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
よう相棒！
元気そうだな！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yo, partner! You're looking lively![ST:wait ]
localized version: Hiya, pard! Up and at 'em, I see?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―ってこんなとこで言うことじゃねーか[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, this ain't the
place to be saying that.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Uh, guess that's a little too cheerful, huh?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺か？　俺は大丈夫だ
ピンピンしてるぜ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Me? I'm fine. Full of energy![ST:wait ]
localized version: Me? Oh, I'm right as rain. Totally rarin' to go![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
相棒　向こうに戻るんだろ？
目を見てりゃわかる[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Partner, you're heading back there, right?
I can tell just by looking in your eyes.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Say, we're headin' back, right?
I could tell by your grimace.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺たちならやれる
あんなのに負けやしねぇさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
We can do this. We won't lose
to something like that.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Don't worry, we got this.
That donkey won't get the last word.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ行こうぜ
今度こそぶっ叩いてやる！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come on, let's go. This time,
we're beating him down for sure![ST:wait ]
localized version: Let's get going! I've been itching to shoot something![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
やれやれ[ST:wide ]―
とんだアクシデントに見舞われましたね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Good grief[ST:wide ]— we've been hit by quite
an unexpected accident, haven't we.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Well, well. Isn't this a woeful predicament?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
戦力を分断させるとは
バケモノのくせに知恵のまわることだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Splitting our forces like this...
quite clever for a monster.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Trying to divide and conquer, is it?
The heartless ape's got brains, I'll give him that.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―ああ
僕でしたら問題ありませんよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Ah, I have absolutely no issues, of course.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...What, me? Five by five, self-evidently.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
君が来るまで敵情を視察していました
おおまかな分析も済んでいます[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I was inspecting the enemy situation until you
arrived. My rough analysis is already complete.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I've been gathering enemy intel while waiting.
I'm roughly done with the analysis.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ふっ　この僕が合流したからには
万事の解決は目前ですよ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Heh. Now that I have rendezvoused with
you, all matters are close to resolution.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Heh. Now that you've regained my services,
all will be resolved forthwith.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この決戦で軍功をあげれば
次期司令の座に着実に近づく[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If I earn military merit in this decisive battle,
I'll draw ever closer to the next commander's seat[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version:
And with my leading the decisive rout,
a promotion to command will be but a step away.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　モタモタしてないで行きますよ！
敵は待ってくれませんからね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Now, no dawdling! The enemy
won't wait for us, after all![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well? Don't drag your heels now.
This is my time in the sun![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: おお！　オヌシも無事であったか！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Oh! You were safe as well![ST:wait ]
localized version: Aha! I see you unharmed—good![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
新白鯨の明かりが見えてはいるのだが
ドールがなければ行くこともかなわん[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I can see the lights of the New White Whale,
but without a Doll, I cannot reach it.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I could see the White Whale 2's lights from afar.
Couldn't do much without a Skell, though.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それゆえどうしたものかと
途方に暮れていたところだ　ハーハッハッ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Thus I was at a loss, wondering
what to do. Ha ha ha![ST:wait ]
localized version:
And so I did what any warrior would—
I sat and waited! Aha ha ha ha ha![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それにしてもオヌシのその目[ST:wide ]―
まだ戦いを諦めていないように見える[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Still, those eyes of yours[ST:wide ]— they tell
me you have not given up the fight.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But in your eyes, I see fire. Flame.
I see you intend to carry on the fight.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さすが俺の見込んだ者よ
逆境に立ち向かう意思　確かに受け取った！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As expected of the one I set my sights on. I have
received your will to stand against adversity![ST:wait ]
localized version:
You do not betray my expectations.
The will to strike back, oh! It rings loud and clear![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
その心意気がある限り　このボゼ・ロウズ
宇宙の果てまでも付き合おうぞ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
As long as you possess that spirit, I, Boze Lowes,
shall accompany you to the ends of the universe![ST:wait ]
localized version:
So long as you carry that attitude, I, Bozé Lowes,
shall attend you to the ends of space![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
オヌシの矛となり
いかな敵をも蹴散らしてみせよう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I shall become your spear and scatter
any enemy that stands in our way![ST:wait ]
localized version:
I shall be your lance,
and no foe under the stars shall elude my point![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: あっ！　キミも無事だったんだね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Ah! You were safe too![ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, you're still alive! Score![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
え？　あたし？
うん平気平気[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Eh? Me? Yeah, I'm fine, totally fine.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Huh? Me? Yeah, fit as a fiddle![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
照明弾があったから
それを上げて救助を待ってたの[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I had a flare, so I sent it
up and waited for rescue.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
I just happened to have a flare,
so I shot it and waited for the cavalry.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
大事なドールがどっか行っちゃって
それで少し困ってたくらい[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
My precious Doll flew off somewhere,
so I was just a little troubled.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
My Skell went AWOL, and...
Well, I was a bit lost without it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
こんなことなら自動帰還モードでも
積んでおくべきだったかなぁ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If I'd known this would happen, maybe I
should've installed an auto-return mode.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
If I knew this'd happen,
I'd have tried to put in some kinda auto-return mode...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
[ST:wide ]―って　こんな話してる場合じゃないよ
帰れなくちゃ意味ないしね[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
[ST:wide ]—Wait, this is no time to talk about that.
It won't matter if we can't get back.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
...Right, sorry, I'll keep the shop talk to a minimum.
Staying alive comes first.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ちゃんと勝って
みんなで戻ろうね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's win properly and all go back together![ST:wait ]
localized version: That's up to us. So let's fight like hell![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あっ　でも戦闘データぐらいは
取っておいてもいいよね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ah, but can I at least
record our battle data?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Oh, full disclosure—
I'm recording your battle data, okay?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ここで貴公らに会えたのは僥倖であった[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Meeting you here was a
stroke of good fortune.[ST:wait ]
localized version: It is a stroke of luck that we should meet here.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
俺は　奴に近づくすべはないかと
周囲を見て回っていたのだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I was surveying the area to see if
there was any way to approach him.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Attend. I have been scouting the surroundings
for a way to approach our foe.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ヴォイドはグロウスを統べる存在[ST:wide ]―
我らラースの誇りを踏みにじった仇敵だ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Void commands the Growth[ST:wide ]— he is the mortal
enemy who trampled the pride of us Larsians.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Void has command of the Ganglion...
That wretch ground Wrothian honor into dust.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
なに案ずるな
一人で斬りかかる愚など犯さん[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Worry not. I will not commit the
folly of charging in alone.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Fear not. I dare not try to slay him alone.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
今は頼もしき仲間[ST:wide ]―
貴公らがいることだからな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
For now, I have reliable allies[ST:wide ]—
I have you here with me.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Now, with valued allies,
we bring our joint might to bear.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　共に奴を倒し
本懐を遂げようぞ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come, let us defeat him together and
fulfill our long-cherished desire.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Come, our goals are aligned.
Let us venture forth![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
これは[ST:wide ]―　宇宙史が
ひっくり返るレベルの発見だね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
This is[ST:wide ]— a discovery on a scale that
could turn cosmic history upside down![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Well! This is a discovery that will turn
galactic history on its head![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: まさかこんなところで[ST:wait ]
fan translation: To think that in a place like this,[ST:wait ]
localized version: And here is where we made it...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
正真正銘　古代サマールの遺構を
見られるなんて！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
I would get to see genuine
ruins of Ancient Samaar![ST:wait ]
localized version:
To think I'd get to stand amidst
genuine Samaarian ruins...![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
それに　この不可思議な空間[ST:wide ]―
狭間の世界とやらの一部なのかな？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And this mysterious space[ST:wide ]— could it
be part of the rift between worlds?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
And then, this inexplicable space...
Could it be part of the "rift between worlds"?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああもう　知りたいことだらけだよ！
とにかくできる限り調べなくちゃ！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Ahh, there are so many things I want to know!
Anyway, I have to investigate as much as I can![ST:wait ]
localized version:
Oh my heart, the sheer wonder of it!
I have to take in all I can![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
さあ　行こう！
こんな機会は二度とないからね！[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Come on, let's go! An opportunity
like this will never come again![ST:wait ]
localized version: Quickly! This is a golden opportunity![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
ああ　お前か
無事で何よりだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Oh, it's you. I'm glad you're safe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Oh, look who it is. Glad you're unharmed.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: せめてドールがあれば動けたんだが[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
If I at least had a Doll,
I could have moved, but[ST:wait ]
localized version: If I'd had a Skell, I could've at least done something...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
この状況じゃおれに出来ることは
ほとんどなくてな[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
in this situation, there was
almost nothing I could do.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
But the way things are,
I was stuck twiddling my thumbs, pretty much.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
不気味な場所だが[ST:wide ]―
お前は奴のもとへ戻るんだろう？[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's an eerie place, but[ST:wide ]— you're
going back to where he is, right?[ST:wait ]
localized version:
It's a strange old place...
You want back into the fray, right?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ああ　もちろんおれも行こう[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yeah, I'll go too, of course.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Okay. I'm with you all the way.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line:
あいつもおれの帰りを待ってる
生きて戻るためなら何だってするさ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Someone is waiting for me too. I'll do
whatever it takes to make it back alive.[ST:wait ]
localized version:
Leesh is out there waiting for me.
Let's take this guy off his high horse, and go home.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―来たか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—You came.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...You came.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この闘争に　もはや意味はない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There is no longer any
meaning to this struggle.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There is no longer any meaning to this fight.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なのに君達はどこまでも抗おうとする[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And yet you still try to
resist me to the very end.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And still your efforts to resist me do not cease.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私を[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: How long...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どこまでも不快にする[ST:wait ]
fan translation: displease me to no end.[ST:wait ]
localized version: For how long will you displease me?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: アルを返してもらうわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You will give Al back to us.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Give Al back to us, Void.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴォイド[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Void.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 間もなく私は　逃走を果たし[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Soon, I will complete my escape[ST:wait ]
localized version: In mere moments, I will effect my escape.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 勝利する[ST:wait ]
fan translation: and achieve victory.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I will win.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 君達に残された時は　すでに僅かだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The time you have left is already scarce.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There is a limit to the time you have left.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 抵抗は悉く無意味だと知るがいい[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Know that all your resistance is meaningless[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: You need not waste it on this meaningless struggle.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマさん　コアが[ST:wide ]―！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Elma-san, the core is[ST:wide ]—![ST:wait ]
localized version: Elma, look! The cores![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ええ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Yes.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Yeah...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 少しずつだけど起動状態に入っている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Little by little, it's
entering an active state.[ST:wait ]
localized version: They're charging up little by little.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: コアがヴォイドの力の根源だとすれば[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If the core is the source of Void's power,[ST:wait ]
localized version: If they really are Void's power source...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全てのコアが起動した時[ST:wait ]
fan translation: then when all the cores are activated,[ST:wait ]
localized version: then as soon as they're done,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その力でこの宇宙から逃亡する気よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
he intends to use that power
to escape this universe.[ST:wait ]
localized version: he'll use them, and try to make a break for it.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: そうなる前に　アレスを[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Before that happens, we'll rescue the Ares[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: We have to act now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: アルを救出する[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Rescue Al.[ST:wait ]
localized version: We need Al—[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この状況を打開するには　それしかない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
It's our only way to break
through this situation.[ST:wait ]
localized version: he's our only way out of this mess.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: いいわね？[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Are you ready?[ST:wait ]
localized version: Ready?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 了解です！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Understood![ST:wait ]
localized version: You bet![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 行きましょう！[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Let's go![ST:wait ]
localized version: Come on![ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: エルマ、ヴォイドに向き直る
fan translation: Elma turns back to face Void.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: うなずく主人公
fan translation: The protagonist nods.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―来たか[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—You came.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...You came.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: この闘争に　もはや意味はない[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
There is no longer any
meaning to this struggle.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There is no longer any meaning to this fight.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: なのに君達はどこまでも抗おうとする[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
And yet you still try to
resist me to the very end.[ST:wait ]
localized version: And still your efforts to resist me do not cease.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 私を[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: How long...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: どこまでも不快にする[ST:wait ]
fan translation: displease me to no end.[ST:wait ]
localized version: For how long will you displease me?[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: アルを返してもらうわ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: You will give Al back to us.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Give Al back to us, Void.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: ヴォイド[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Void.[ST:wait ]
localized version: Now.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 間もなく私は　逃走を果たし[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Soon, I will complete my escape[ST:wait ]
localized version: In mere moments, I will effect my escape.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 勝利する[ST:wait ]
fan translation: and achieve victory.[ST:wait ]
localized version: I will win.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 君達に残された時は　すでに僅かだ[ST:wait ]
fan translation: The time you have left is already scarce.[ST:wait ]
localized version: There is a limit to the time you have left.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 抵抗は悉く無意味だと知るがいい[ST:wide ]―[ST:wait ]
fan translation: Know that all your resistance is meaningless[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]
localized version: You need not waste it on this meaningless struggle.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: [ST:wide ]―見て[ST:wait ]
fan translation: [ST:wide ]—Look.[ST:wait ]
localized version: ...Look.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: コアが少しずつ起動状態になっている[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
Little by little, the core is
entering an active state.[ST:wait ]
localized version: The cores are charging up gradually.[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: コアがヴォイドの力の根源だとすれば[ST:wait ]
fan translation: If the core is the source of Void's power,[ST:wait ]
localized version: If they really are Void's power source...[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: 全てのコアが起動した時[ST:wait ]
fan translation: then when all the cores are activated,[ST:wait ]
localized version: then as soon as they're done,[ST:wait ]

Original Japanese line: その力でこの宇宙から逃亡する気よ[ST:wait ]
fan translation:
